**It's official** \- I'm running for reelection to continue serving as your Congressman for North Carolina's Tenth District.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=1ca59cd528994e2298c6c24f5e24bb1a&_e=SN43SqcfUqyWYdLkwR_6xyoCryrdfV6aBWQZ8xp5emg3P3hk-c9jE3Wo3Qao-nddTSYBH7uwp_HMoH59gYWN5gvT3VybtgVBqqBE5o11AWhLJUgr3LzZBnYJ0pdQ9SVII_FWtIi0gPSjivtx3CIbMxCM8fiXjj4fTrs126vbkPZltxPp58arJCmJVZL-ZSkxbdLStgmU3x9oYfCGO2eFXh9SffLUCiGF1M7TgTjcpgduksNJwmMPZMzLCyMdRJI18rcpsT_qnpn7CeYfZJ0cF1SPY2rD6GQmsvtHnjpaorZ1YMrlGokklmftkfvnojwwKZksiFzhUQ-G01PoyrQTDyS1XpBP5lw-5h2srfhblpjbMY43BGAhSUjgmBgaw3jmCi0LM2NiqpLTHSExEQyiH3O50BwUv4zUunrpJWj7vvGBAHaFwiv4t5tFSHsd5HWU-foqGSeeOoGwgvAwwqDFQPIfBrLl1-03sOL2WovTlRyAPWRSgckGgEHalL4liNgF0pkvP8zZwjDo73alK5gJEk5eT7iEy7XTM1WBzUlDsQY%3D)
Alongside President Trump we've accomplished:

**\- Passing the largest tax cut in American History
\- Eliminating federal taxes on tips and social security
\- Unleashing American-made energy, bringing down costs
**
But this is only the beginning.

Washington is broken. Too many politicians are serving themselves, not the American people. That's why I ran in the first place, and **_that 's why I'm running again._**

| [**ENDORSE MY REELECTION**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=1ca59cd528994e2298c6c24f5e24bb1a&_e=SN43SqcfUqyWYdLkwR_6xyoCryrdfV6aBWQZ8xp5emg3P3hk-c9jE3Wo3Qao-nddTSYBH7uwp_HMoH59gYWN5gvT3VybtgVBqqBE5o11AWhLJUgr3LzZBnYJ0pdQ9SVII_FWtIi0gPSjivtx3CIbM4uzc8X7ZsLN5NLSXn0MjIJBqeBa2uX2EYCnsp0HHwSioQXlggFzT0HdlFO5auaMPhPwnOIQf6wYbVcLkixEne2PIjs0QVu5xe_pGKlqrSE9gpoEDilQvMxy6sJvwWzNLuOr1yWV4GU9KA-vMZW-CVmDVw9huh89llT3o94rNexfbxpP-ur9AUOVY0sIWo2bMRqTcci1wWlN6lUbvr-OuTijZ4aP119HJp14w4KuHPZGBzDxNMAyzRy-lTgSykS-q2jJbohh4RjsBzhvQ0jMH2YwTXuOlpG5NAWcmhzk2O5yrLRJgCFz3-zQSrIOmjFTkE5oCJTFIyGb-3qpKYru5jg1TiPSFp5jVqCixBuN2-6v3k4NKFH4aztbfEB0z1NkWTFmJ8wlPbxiipT5Yw0sv-ZE4fE_2f9REBys5WwrVHID)

Because working families are tired of being left behind. Because this country needs real leadership. Because North Carolina deserves someone who will never back down from a fight and never forget who sent him to Washington.

Let's keep putting hardworking Americans first.**[Join President Trump and endorse my reelection campaign today! ](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=1ca59cd528994e2298c6c24f5e24bb1a&_e=SN43SqcfUqyWYdLkwR_6xyoCryrdfV6aBWQZ8xp5emg3P3hk-c9jE3Wo3Qao-nddTSYBH7uwp_HMoH59gYWN5gvT3VybtgVBqqBE5o11AWhLJUgr3LzZBnYJ0pdQ9SVII_FWtIi0gPSjivtx3CIbMzbqbrGbqUs5RTchBVEzCitlyFJ_bsr-RS8EKx6FySf3g9DKMpE7pEeKNre2nsNRes5RWjcV6PyNBNOVkPaF4ntPu6Fxo8erqhT2O-lIGPCNIVIRpVamlj_Hc5CnZeYFf7MUh2p9tnW7uafe6oX7MLUaYESETzh3zTVfqcQxEQDXuXepafZr_Mb0ONqUMatm47U4COuXs8Ql7yV-S8C_VZEU8cpxxqYDdh7iHGSboNmAWHwd6fm1ceT9ybt6x2zVxEoT-dHIyoaCo2AHaJ_V2-PduaqfQ2OtC39kiVesQ3LCqvgqCfeIOyqiu30a0AnZ2ZTX2l0TksObWkHe78DUMbVkyiyz5CnNgVGjrUv6pa7p7SfPABzV_apLbVfzXpV41hZpLhUif8h-G_W1rxrE0zm7N7la66rG88i7ZwI1NMDe)**

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Two Republican candidates have led in the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
If nothing changes, there’s a serious chance only Republicans will be on November’s ballot.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40664%2E3422442%2EFXbTdd)
Peter,
Republicans are gaining ground in California and the polling shows it.
Take a look at how this race has shifted ⬇️
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260105_1_ak.kR-EQ_&refcode=em20260105-40664&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40664%2E3422442%2EFXbTdd)
_Source: RealClear Polling_
When we launched this campaign, Katie Porter was the Democratic frontrunner. But now, **two Republican candidates have led in the polls.**
We need to take them seriously. Only the top two candidates in June’s primary move on to the general election. If nothing changes, there’s a real chance only Republicans will be on November’s ballot.
We have to shake up this race right now. Katie needs a surge of support so she can pull into the lead and widen the gap enough to win the June primary.
**[Let’s keep California blue in 2026: Donate today to help Katie Porter win this race!](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260105_1_ak.kR-EQ_&refcode=em20260105-40664&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40664%2E3422442%2EFXbTdd)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260105_1_ak.kR-EQ_&refcode=em20260105-40664&t=23&akid=40664%2E3422442%2EFXbTdd)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260105-40664&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40664_3422442_FXbTdd&akid=40664%2E3422442%2EFXbTdd)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122744455/593327556/-2000534896?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.05_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTM4OWJkOC05NGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fFhjhgb_I0hpxEEdWe1UkARQNC-E91UPmR4ysgFSiM=) Team:

Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.

I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.

My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.

You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.

If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.

name: Team Mallory
subject: The forecast is chilling
body:
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?t=1001&akid=3505%2E898137%2EoxrJSK ][IMG]

Winter in Michigan is a challenge, friend, and that goes
double when you’re outfitting staff and volunteers on a political
campaign. We’re looking at the forecast for the next few months, and it’s
chilling! 🥶

There are always general expenses, like ordering yard signs and mailing
materials, office rent, utilities, etc. On top of that, this time of year
we have a staff and volunteers to keep safe and warm. That means getting
handwarmers for our volunteers who are out canvassing, and even getting
snow tires for staffers’ cars so they can hit the road safely across
Michigan!

We can’t take snow days here — not when there’s so much at stake this
election — so we need to make sure we’re ready to hit the road no matter
what Mother Nature throws at us.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/126?c0=mam-em-jan2026.ShOXHx&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM1_V1_S1&t=1002&akid=3505%2E898137%2EoxrJSK ]That’s where you come in. Can you donate $5 or $10
to make sure our campaign doesn’t slow down this winter?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: Christian Menefee
subject: A new year of opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christian D
body:
| | [ ](https://menefee4.us/l/1j6mhkBbAnmN)
---
Friend, Last year, Greg Abbott and Donald Trump denied our Congressional District representation for almost the entire year. While that was a new (but unsurprising) low, it just means we have more ground to make up for this year. At the end of this month, we will finally have a congressperson for Texas’s 18th Congressional District. I promise you that if I win, I won’t go to Washington and shrink. I will fight back. **Trump is testing the limits of what he can get away with. He’s tried it here before, and I took him on and won.****When I get to Congress, I’ll follow the same playbook and get results.**
**Now more than ever, we need strong leaders who know how to fight and win – I’m ready.** [**Will you support me by becoming a Founding Donor to my 2026 campaign?**](https://menefee4.us/l/VlslYG47hLvl)
---

People are hurting. Paychecks are stretched thin. Health insurance is cut. We need leaders who will focus on the things that matter most in your life, rather than carrying water as Trump illegally invades another country. I’m ready to join my Democratic colleagues in Congress to demand accountability. [**Less than a month to go before the final round of voting in this special election — help me finish strong as a 2026 Founding Donor.**](https://menefee4.us/l/27159TB45Ukq) Thank you,

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

Peter, it's Mark Kelly.
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
**[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Kamala Harris' Fight for the People PAC and me so we can fight back.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-mek?refcode=em260105&refcode2=883_2563979_tY2AHS&akid=883%2E2563979%2EtY2AHS)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-mek?refcode=em260105&refcode2=883_2563979_tY2AHS&akid=883%2E2563979%2EtY2AHS)**
Don’t give up the ship.
Mark

Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac.com](http://fightforthepeoplepac.com/)) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=883%2E2563979%2EtY2AHS)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Hegseth’s threats
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
---
Derek: Pete Hegseth decided he’s going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. name: Seth Moulton
subject: Enough of the same mistakes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
We don’t need another unnecessary war.

| |
---
Team, I want to be clear. Senator Markey should vote for the War Powers Resolution to end this nonsense in Venezuela. We can’t afford any more of his regrettable votes. And this isn’t hypothetical. We’ve seen where these kinds of votes lead. Congress is told there isn’t a choice, that intelligence is solid, that war is necessary. Those claims turn out to be lies, and young Americans pay the price. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122744723/593337100/-1583957776?s=46&t=MGAD-Lsr_lCzTP8QeAJqmQ&refcode=260105_sm_ven&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTkzNDEwMy05N2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Z6umpfUbYexCEFkQ9CIry-4mNl2OhOiJNULL-ZjII4=&emci=6814edde-90ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=ae934103-97ea-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=194769) Senator Markey voted yes on the Iraq War based on a lie. Millions of lives were lost. Trillions of dollars were wasted, and an entire generation was sent to fight and die in a war we never needed. Years later, he rubber-stamped Marco Rubio based on another lie. Now we’re watching the same pattern repeat as the Trump Administration pushes us toward confrontation in Venezuela based on claims that don’t hold up. This isn’t abstract for me. I was one of the young Americans sent to fight these wars. I’ve seen what happens when Washington gets it wrong. Service members and their families pay the price. We can’t afford leaders who keep repeating the same mistakes, or Democrats who go along with Republican war-mongering instead of stopping it. **[If you want a Senator who won’t repeat the same mistakes, I’m asking for your support. Chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122744724/593337115/2090747700?refcode=260105_sm_ven_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTkzNDEwMy05N2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Z6umpfUbYexCEFkQ9CIry-4mNl2OhOiJNULL-ZjII4=)** | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122744725/593337119/1375639745?amp;refcode=260105_sm_ven&refcode=260105_sm_ven&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTkzNDEwMy05N2VhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Z6umpfUbYexCEFkQ9CIry-4mNl2OhOiJNULL-ZjII4=)

Let me start by saying thank you — Democrats couldn’t have swept November’s elections without grassroots supporters like you! = | = Last November was the first major referendum on Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress, and we couldn’t have shown a more unified front to fight against their agenda. – We won historic governor’s races in NJ and VA. – We PASSED Prop 50 in California, ruining Trump’s gerrymandering plan – We made incredible strides in districts that overwhelmingly voted for Trump last year With these major wins under our belt, experts are predicting major victories for Democrats in 2026! But we can’t get too comfortable. Peter ,
Over the weekend, Trump launched an illegal military operation in Venezuela – then declared the U.S. would “run” the country, and MAGA Republicans cheered.
This isn’t just foreign policy. It’s a litmus test.
Trump didn’t go to Congress. He didn’t get international approval. He acted unilaterally – risking lives and dragging us toward another forever war.
GOP candidates across the map are falling in line, while Democrats are pushing back – but they need backup.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. |
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122745553/593357030/1451210133?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ4YjEwNS05ZGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pssHcFSFP_gJwF8M2JoeeXdzUU6qaO1daU9E8x69hYY=) Team: Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. **[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Jason Crow and me so we can fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122745554/593357033/-1586053728?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ4YjEwNS05ZGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pssHcFSFP_gJwF8M2JoeeXdzUU6qaO1daU9E8x69hYY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Jason Crow will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122745555/593357034/1451210133?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQ4YjEwNS05ZGVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pssHcFSFP_gJwF8M2JoeeXdzUU6qaO1daU9E8x69hYY=)

clean_body: You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. | = Team: Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Jason Crow will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Don’t give up the ship. Mark Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: Zohran Mamdani is officially Mayor of NYC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
You helped make this moment happen.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260105-1&t=1&akid=3017%2E587540%2ES3hOkI)
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260105_1_mamdani.yKndde&refcode=em20260105-3017&amount=5&t=2&akid=3017%2E587540%2ES3hOkI)
**Peter, you helped make this moment happen.**
When the clock struck midnight on New Year’s, Zohran Mamdani officially took office as the Mayor of New York City, promising to deliver on his bold agenda.
Zohran’s victory was powered by young voters. He didn’t pander to them. He treated New Yorkers of all ages with respect, offering specific policies to improve their lives, and meeting them in the places where they already consume content. He did something rarely seen in politics — he actually listened. He asked voters what he could do for them instead of telling voters what he thought they wanted to hear.
Leaders We Deserve made a major investment in Zohran’s primary election because he is the kind of leader we were built to support: young, unapologetically progressive, ready to win. He mobilized an entire generation in NYC by giving them something to vote _for,_ not just something to vote against and in doing so, he inspired thousands of young people to run for office themselves. Leaders like Mayor Mamdani are exactly why we exist. Gen Z understands that no single person is coming to save us, but that together, as a generation, we can put this country back on track.
The first step is believing that it is actually possible to win elections by running grassroots campaigns grounded in progressive values without support from special interests. To make that belief real, we have to elect young progressive leaders who don’t simply replicate the politics of those currently in power, but raise the standard. Leaders who reject special-interest money and govern with one clear priority: serving their constituents. You are what makes that possible. So thank you.
**[Will you help us continue growing this movement to elect more young leaders like Zohran Mamdani all across the country? Contribute $5 right now.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260105_1_mamdani.yKndde&refcode=em20260105-3017&amount=5&t=3&akid=3017%2E587540%2ES3hOkI)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260105_1_mamdani.yKndde&amount=5&refcode=em20260105-3017&t=22&akid=3017%2E587540%2ES3hOkI)**
Thanks for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260105-1&t=23&refcode2=3017_587540_S3hOkI&akid=3017%2E587540%2ES3hOkI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=3017%2E587540%2ES3hOkI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3017%2E587540%2ES3hOkI)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

subject: BREAKING: Republicans Just Dropped BOMBSHELL on Tim Walz

name: Mai Vang
subject: Join our Field Team Today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAI VANG FOR CONGRESS
body:
View our upcoming canvassing and field events!

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
We started canvassing in October and so far we’ve spoken with over 3,500 neighbors across the District! This January, we are kicking things into high gear and launching our Field Academy and field program. At our Field Academy you will have the opportunity to learn about the best ways to plug into the campaign and engage in skill building activities with other members of the Heart and Hustle team!Whether it's your first time campaigning or your 100th, we’ll have everything you need to learn to knock doors, talk to voters, and organize your neighborhood block by block.RSVP for our Field Academy here: [https://www.maiforus.com/academy](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=a926b37808&e=dd5af5b7b1)**If you can’t make it to our Field Academy, do not worry! You can also sign up to canvass here:** 🗓️[ January 6, 2026 - Pocket Canvass](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=9783a650c6&e=dd5af5b7b1)🗓️ [January 8, 2026 - Pocket Canvass](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=17c5890c84&e=dd5af5b7b1)🗓️ [January 10, 2026 - Pocket Canvass](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=209a4eaaed&e=dd5af5b7b1)**Can’t make these dates?** 👉 [View all of our upcoming canvasses and RSVP here!](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=918e6e7226&e=dd5af5b7b1)👉 [Sign up to canvass your own neighborhood here!](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=940b522ee3&e=dd5af5b7b1)👉 [Sign up to write thank you cards here!](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=4ece322ad3&e=dd5af5b7b1)If you’re ready to join us or want to learn more about upcoming volunteer shifts, just let us know. We can’t wait to see you out there!
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
With Deep Gratitude, **~ Team Mai**

At our Field Academy you will have the opportunity to learn about the best ways to plug into the campaign and engage in skill building activities with other members of the Heart and Hustle team!Whether it's your first time campaigning or your 100th, we’ll have everything you need to learn to knock doors, talk to voters, and organize your neighborhood block by block.RSVP for our Field Academy here: you can’t make it to our Field Academy, do not worry! You can also sign up to canvass here: 🗓️🗓️ 🗓️ ’t make these dates? 👉 👉 👉 you’re ready to join us or want to learn more about upcoming volunteer shifts, just let us know. We can’t wait to see you out there! | | | | | | | | | | | | With Deep Gratitude, ~ Team Mai | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Donors like you keep us going. To Give By Check: Mai Vang for Congress1700 Tribute Rd. Suite 201, Sacramento, CA 95815 | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY MAI VANG FOR CONGRESS You can or |

name: Bianco for Governor
subject: December From The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=20f404ca54&e=7d5d879074)
| | | | | |
# December From The Campaign Trail
---
| |
Happy New Year, everyone! December marked a strong finish to the year, with meaningful conversations, growing true grassroots support, and important progress across the state. Because of supporters like you, the Bianco for Governor campaign is energized, focused, and ready to win in the months ahead. Here are some updates from the month of December.
---
|
---
| |
# Sheriff Bianco is still leading in the polls
---
| | Sheriff Bianco closed out the year topping numerous reputable polls. Check out this December [poll from Emerson College](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=1dc099b6ff&e=7d5d879074), where the Sheriff topped all candidates.
---
|
---
| |
# More statewide events
---
[|
---](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=f6981dff77&e=7d5d879074)
| | Sheriff Bianco continues to reach voters all across California. He is dedicated to talking to every voter willing to listen.
---
|
---
| |
# Volunteer of the month
---
[|
---](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=eb356327e4&e=7d5d879074)
| | Our volunteer of the month is Kira Boranian. Kira is the owner of Lather Hair Studio in Corona, California. Her story became widely known when she refused to shut down her salon in compliance with Newsom’s COVID-19 policies. Lather Hair Studio is home to many self-employed hairstylists, and shutting her salon down would take away their ability to support their families. Sheriff Bianco was a strong support to her, refusing to close down her business. On this campaign, Kira is a leader on our volunteer team and frequents campaign events. We are so grateful to have her unwavering support along the campaign trail with us.
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# New podcasts
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=4f4f53a016&e=7d5d879074)
| | | My favorite new podcast episode from this month is Sheriff Bianco’s appearance on the True Hustle Podcast. They discuss business, the oil industry, regulation, taxes, wildfire prevention, and Prop 47.
---
| [Watch here](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=1c76a2486a&e=7d5d879074)
---
|
---
| | As always, we are grateful to have you on board with Team Bianco. Your support fuels our campaign to travel the state on a daily basis in our mission to save California. To learn more about Sheriff Bianco’s policies, I encourage you to visit his [‘Priorities’ page](https://BiancoForGovernor.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4b6e495875b38a7541a7d5217&id=ff86fb3a8a&e=7d5d879074) on our website. We will be back next month for another update from the campaign trail.
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. |
---
Peter:

Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. [**And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Yassamin Ansari and me so we can fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122745924/593363088/1933629171?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQ1ZjE4Yi1hNWVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tkrNVULW0fwPqOUn4JQXWE1JiHQfiCjV_CarUQoterg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to Yassamin Ansari and Mark Kelly immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122745925/593363089/1933629171?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260105_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmQ1ZjE4Yi1hNWVhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tkrNVULW0fwPqOUn4JQXWE1JiHQfiCjV_CarUQoterg=)

body:

This is it, null: **This is my** _last call_**to become one of the final 150 2026 Founding Donors we need from 18326 before tonight's midnight deadline.**
I know we can win this race – but _only_ if folks like you come through to make sure we have the resources we need to go up against the MAGA megadonors, reach independent voters across our state, and get Michiganders out to vote later this year.
**That's why your grassroots support today is so important – because we must kickstart this election year in the best position possible to win this battleground seat. So please, I'm counting on you:**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to become a 2026 Founding Donor of my campaign to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11330?t=2&akid=1800%2E49239%2EmBaS0b)**
Thank you so much,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11116?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1800%2E49239%2EmBaS0b) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11331?t=4&akid=1800%2E49239%2EmBaS0b)

Thank you,
Haley

Dear Hoosier Republican,

⏰ Time is almost up! ⏰

Congress of Counties is coming up fast, and tickets are almost sold out!

Congress of Counties is your chance to join statewide, congressional, and local Republican leaders from across Indiana to prepare for the battles ahead!

Hope to see you there!

Lana Keesling

body:

✉️ EXTENDING YOU AN INVITATION ✉️
Friend, we've officially closed the books on our 2025 roster, so today, I'm extending an invitation to join our exclusive top 50 Patriots coalition of the Christian Conservative Network.
Our membership services team has been overwhelmed by the number of patriots like you that pledged to stand up for faith, family, and freedom.
So now that it is 2026, and as we approach the midterm elections, we wanted to invite just one Patriot from every state to join us in an exclusive coalition of our Conservative Christian Network. I would like to cordially invite you to join Champion American Values' Christian Conservative Network's Top 50 Patriot Coalition.

name: Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith
subject: They are not even hiding their open border agenda anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats have a plan to open our borders. We must stop them before it's too late.

Friend,

This is Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith, and Democrats are making their intentions crystal clear:

➡️ They want open borders.
➡️ They want to stop deportations.
➡️ They want to let fentanyl pour into our communities.

**[This isn't speculation: Democrats are openly campaigning on reversing the border security measures we fought for under President Trump.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpcv0ssnu4vhd148jq8plau41gtosbfln6ffdmu0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o76c5h2bs)**
******************************************************[STOP THEIR AGENDA](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zshft071r3n0kqs7n242ck654gpq1seunqo9icko_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o76c5h2bs)******************************************************
I've been a strong voice for border security throughout my time in the Senate. _**[I voted to build the wall. I supported our law enforcement. I fought to keep deadly drugs and criminals out of our country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpr49vgaj5a5ebrqjdlo37sc4qq8q2pjapeio0a8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o76c5h2bs)**_

**[And I WILL NOT let Democrats undo that progress.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za87ofr6unjog747aro602s8badmb5fghpaaltgo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o76c5h2bs)**
******************************************************[DEFEND OUR BORDER](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb5ecnb60irhl0qjcmarq7spvq1puqgmsf487dlo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o76c5h2bs)******************************************************
**[Will you stand with me to defend border security and stop the Democrats' dangerous open border agenda?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zev5rhpohtfukef0dioj6mrjq3mta83r3g2tm020_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o76c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7ml3nffffbii4ru3g7j2mdrahv6u328ei42ilio_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za025eiqel3epg6qe09s1v2anq5ju27g359orit8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)
---
**[And when you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book -- as our thank you for carrying his legacy forward.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqnv66o6odfacrad9pdo64mausdd1u307avjbqq8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdingbt4264hj6bilj4p6fvofb15n5g77sph8kt0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)
---
Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we'll ship you a copy of Charlie's final book straight to your door.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpo5ev85ro78aci4map8q3mkdiognh309dgs7q7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqqs0enngbnh18lhmkeu3qsq2a6g6thl28cavp3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)
---
Friend, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- _the very things Charlie gave his life for. _

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zus1h5tr9uqqdqdkgn30fgccoaule801m4dbq4tg_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zns8p0hf7r0u47q0hm988iqj0bpvn8ktkb77cvl0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)**
---
**P.S.** Charlie Kirk's final book, _**Stop, in the Name of God,**_ is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God.

[**Please make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, and we 'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book to your door.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuskmllr469ia8ocho575d35hc7okdap5e3goo90_rp22sh2s8i6eor7ctg60o72cjh2bs)

name: Team Downing
subject: It’s time to LOCK DOWN our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t afford to wait for our elections to fix themselves.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Q)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._eqU0QyA)Peter,
The integrity of our electoral process is fundamental to the survival of our democracy. Now, one of the world's most influential voices is demanding immediate, commonsense action to ensure every legal vote is counted and election results are trusted.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)In his recent statements, the world's richest man laid out four essential safeguards that every American should be able to agree on to ensure election transparency and security:
1. Voter ID to stop fraud before it starts
2. Paper ballots to verify every vote
3. Same-day voting to keep the process secure
4. Proof of citizenship to protect the integrity of every election

These aren’t radical or partisan ideas. They’re simple, commonsense protections that are standard practice in developed democracies worldwide.**
**Now more than ever, securing our elections must be Congress’s top priority. Our majority, the integrity of our democracy, and President Trump’s America First agenda ALL DEPEND on delivering on this urgent voter ID mandate.
Peter, we’re begging you: [Please add your name today if you agree it's time to lock down our elections, restore trust in the vote, and support Elon Musk's call for mandatory national election standards:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._RXLgv_KL0RQ)[PROTECT OUR ELECT – SIGN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._vI9MlNhfg)The integrity of every future election cycle rests in the hands of Patriots who are unwilling to compromise on the fundamental principles of our Republic.

Thank you in advance for your participation,
Team Downing | |

| ❗️ SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE ❗️ Marjorie Taylor Greene resigning effective January 5, 2026, setting off a special election that will determine control of the House.
My name is Shawn Harris. I'm a Democrat, a husband, a father, a Retired Brigadier General, a farmer, and I intend to win that election for Georgia and for the American people. In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in any amount you can, but first let me explain why chipping in right now before our end of quarter deadline is so important.
After spending 40 years in the military, I retired from the military as an Army General, and Karla and I came right back here to Georgia to live on the farm. Karla and I have been married for 35 years. She became a family doctor while I served, and we raised 5 kids and have 4 grandkids.
But while we have felt blessed, our neighbors struggle every day.
The way I see it, Georgians work hard. But our hard work would go a lot farther if we had someone in Congress working to raise our pay and lower the everyday costs of life.
For years, we've watched Marjorie Taylor Greene on TV, prioritizing national drama over people. And we have an opportunity to finally bring real leadership back to this district.
We need a surge of support to build the field program, digital operation, and voter outreach plan to win a special election on a short timeline. [Anything you give right now will have an immediate impact. Please, can you chip in?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bcHXrjV-CwcYZjSxcCQji1hP_VTAkQu7Sa3j0utr23NjkLVXfHb-Dq87x7VmP_9o41X69k1HUXU12ulT3DVIlXc1P7WkkVR_cXXkOFpNiPCIIaH3cO_7ET227TsQcm1Ms0VmuWjfRSjwMhjNdWVBDoEvE_U1cmtuUCIuPZbI_HZIfc42x5BGWB0FMiIovxAxEj6xyICqXD2XP6mQHbIE-rAc3x2umo50&c=CeHdOjZT_yf2ZcSLQulo3JnHRtF21U2ALoecnAWpEp5Z_t7P9ZzbKQ==&ch=Al_Iu8YHvodhkBZ6DcYdSWMRTqpQgQ5hn7Uan18d5bZp3qkEZLQySw==)

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

| | | [](https://email.alerts.usconservativenetwork.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKw8tjG4oIiyoru3iaKUaLBnwVqwiX_2vn5Esi-QduabT5pzfn3MH-h3H9ZPPGisNswpz2WjJcan3TDtnnZ6lIU2H9wsuNAth5brC5ONG3FACTQ0NEKve216obpmG2FwYui5MICdXjhwoK7vQSyDeVglsPHj5eLANQDnSt0WI1EBdEKh0VorpjjulEq-1WxjyJReWPyLApWvmJ43G49mH7dSzszkNyYmJqZMtia6YSAXy0UwMZWagg9re0YfSlszMjEJ03WGjG1RKtcqtF2LoHULRls99EhADyanHGuyNNvoiMn7zx_fPwduFDChaznmg5yvB5N3OtDv7-G_EybvGyaH-Tmj_f1eWTxO9Gtg8p59CXGdr4ybNLrzy--7z7pniq-X7O9z5b_beI3iTwAAAP__Il2WgQ)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---
[](https://email.alerts.usconservativenetwork.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKw8tjG4oIiyoru3iaKUaLBnwVqwiX_2vn5Esi-QduabT5pzfn3MH-h3H9ZPPGisNswpz2WjJcan3TDtnnZ6lIU2H9wsuNAth5brC5ONG3FACTQ0NEKve216obpmG2FwYui5MICdXjhwoK7vQSyDeVglsPHj5eLANQDnSt0WI1EBdEKh0VorpjjulEq-1WxjyJReWPyLApWvmJ43G49mH7dSzszkNyYmJqZMtia6YSAXy0UwMZWagg9re0YfSlszMjEJ03WGjG1RKtcqtF2LoHULRls99EhADyanHGuyNNvoiMn7zx_fPwduFDChaznmg5yvB5N3OtDv7-G_EybvGyaH-Tmj_f1eWTxO9Gtg8p59CXGdr4ybNLrzy--7z7pniq-X7O9z5b_beI3iTwAAAP__Il2WgQ)
---
**[And when you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book -- as our thank you for carrying his legacy forward.](https://email.alerts.usconservativenetwork.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKw8tjG4oIiyoru3iaKUaLBnwVqwiX_2vn5Esi-QduabT5pzfn3MH-h3H9ZPPGisNswpz2WjJcan3TDtnnZ6lIU2H9wsuNAth5brC5ONG3FACTQ0NEKve216obpmG2FwYui5MICdXjhwoK7vQSyDeVglsPHj5eLANQDnSt0WI1EBdEKh0VorpjjulEq-1WxjyJReWPyLApWvmJ43G49mH7dSzszkNyYmJqZMtia6YSAXy0UwMZWagg9re0YfSlszMjEJ03WGjG1RKtcqtF2LoHULRls99EhADyanHGuyNNvoiMn7zx_fPwduFDChaznmg5yvB5N3OtDv7-G_EybvGyaH-Tmj_f1eWTxO9Gtg8p59CXGdr4ybNLrzy--7z7pniq-X7O9z5b_beI3iTwAAAP__Il2WgQ)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](https://email.alerts.usconservativenetwork.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKw8tjG4oIiyoru3iaKUaLBnwVqwiX_2vn5Esi-QduabT5pzfn3MH-h3H9ZPPGisNswpz2WjJcan3TDtnnZ6lIU2H9wsuNAth5brC5ONG3FACTQ0NEKve216obpmG2FwYui5MICdXjhwoK7vQSyDeVglsPHj5eLANQDnSt0WI1EBdEKh0VorpjjulEq-1WxjyJReWPyLApWvmJ43G49mH7dSzszkNyYmJqZMtia6YSAXy0UwMZWagg9re0YfSlszMjEJ03WGjG1RKtcqtF2LoHULRls99EhADyanHGuyNNvoiMn7zx_fPwduFDChaznmg5yvB5N3OtDv7-G_EybvGyaH-Tmj_f1eWTxO9Gtg8p59CXGdr4ybNLrzy--7z7pniq-X7O9z5b_beI3iTwAAAP__Il2WgQ)
---
Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we'll ship you a copy of Charlie's final book straight to your door.](https://email.alerts.usconservativenetwork.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKw8tjG4oIiyoru3iaKUaLBnwVqwiX_2vn5Esi-QduabT5pzfn3MH-h3H9ZPPGisNswpz2WjJcan3TDtnnZ6lIU2H9wsuNAth5brC5ONG3FACTQ0NEKve216obpmG2FwYui5MICdXjhwoK7vQSyDeVglsPHj5eLANQDnSt0WI1EBdEKh0VorpjjulEq-1WxjyJReWPyLApWvmJ43G49mH7dSzszkNyYmJqZMtia6YSAXy0UwMZWagg9re0YfSlszMjEJ03WGjG1RKtcqtF2LoHULRls99EhADyanHGuyNNvoiMn7zx_fPwduFDChaznmg5yvB5N3OtDv7-G_EybvGyaH-Tmj_f1eWTxO9Gtg8p59CXGdr4ybNLrzy--7z7pniq-X7O9z5b_beI3iTwAAAP__Il2WgQ)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](https://email.alerts.usconservativenetwork.com/c/eJyUkb2unDAQhZ_GdKw8tjG4oIiyoru3iaKUaLBnwVqwiX_2vn5Esi-QduabT5pzfn3MH-h3H9ZPPGisNswpz2WjJcan3TDtnnZ6lIU2H9wsuNAth5brC5ONG3FACTQ0NEKve216obpmG2FwYui5MICdXjhwoK7vQSyDeVglsPHj5eLANQDnSt0WI1EBdEKh0VorpjjulEq-1WxjyJReWPyLApWvmJ43G49mH7dSzszkNyYmJqZMtia6YSAXy0UwMZWagg9re0YfSlszMjEJ03WGjG1RKtcqtF2LoHULRls99EhADyanHGuyNNvoiMn7zx_fPwduFDChaznmg5yvB5N3OtDv7-G_EybvGyaH-Tmj_f1eWTxO9Gtg8p59CXGdr4ybNLrzy--7z7pniq-X7O9z5b_beI3iTwAAAP__Il2WgQ)
---
Friend, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- _the very things Charlie gave his life for. _

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. | | | | | Friend, | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal. It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war. His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before... It was about the Sabbath. About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God. Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself. He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling... The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. To rest. To reflect. To return to God. This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. Friend, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- the very things Charlie gave his life for. And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. Charlie Kirk's final book, Stop, in the Name of God, is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
Minnesota Governor Tim Walz abruptly [dropped his bid for a third term](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy3CAMRb8Gd9oBbONsQZHG3Uub0iOD7CWRwQPsc5yvz5BfeI0a3bnSOT8_lg8MHOL-Aw-ydUtLpKsw1Up5uZD_0p9QS0ZHLoVYdqqRLl601AakAmkWj4HvZei83Yg09R1ZNZnJPKdRq-5l_WbG1anB9IPR2ve9cW59qglX-XRGj12wrU0qaZSSo3o-lCeavmnqkabV9V4MknyoKT9-pRDriza-0yflh0tHx_ZV61lE_13oWeg53mcqta2Enlux0LNUbYxCz-8CjU_ouYYDGh_gmt9n5Rt8TmeB9K6QNjhCjFRSRdjbqZhygWYBQoQLf1PLIDPt5GENzCFF8IkZM2wZ3x6Kw-iRhZ67bP15tUwxkxjkfmDg_7_XLwn_tPpfAAAA__9ZmZcl) on Monday amid a growing fraud scandal in which billions of taxpayer dollars were allegedly swindled on his watch.

| | |

| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwjAUxfGnsTci32uwk8FDK5ROUPVDYowc5wZuaxIUu7j06Sv6Ct1_5wz_w67beY48Hff-TC6PczdRSZFypqUrPv7QN-e0-EBh5ikdKU9UYocKzUrBSplu8Bxv3VoObiRC0pIcWGNNYzcI8uT8aHpvLJEPNXpUdQi6MYH6xjQe1Eayu78pUAZAbaCpYCCyNZL2ZPugB7FWNHCel-pj5imfaIy3-UpLFeazjO6U8yUJ_SCwFdiWUqqyhE-e-hjvQmCLT1ADvKAR2G4Pb83j6_6OdZu-ehB6-94-y8UNl8IxcjJWrNXx7PlvLvO_qlwd_gYAAP__dIF0pQ) | |
# Tuesday, January 6, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 2001, a joint session of Congress certified George W. Bush as the winner of the contested 2000 presidential election. Vice President Al Gore, the election's loser, presided over [the session](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAUheGnwR0WYIOdgmIbFytl2y0tAtf2XRGI4Cas5-lHGc0bTP1JR0f_3-t6dRgx7X_cHSxteU3QagQiKGtz8QP-I9XiPPiMqe5ACVpclVCGC8mFWYPDeK5jF-wGoGDowMrJTOYyaSW7w46zmeXsB5DDoEbhjNdh1nr02o3SOd2hfa8JKYyUQstLLwPANCsYHEw3PwQ2CghIufT_MiY6YItnfkHpfb530R5Ej8qGX0wtTC2ttf7ASrmcb2dqoQMrD-7kmPi3MLX8dunpyskNU4vPaS9QK_dQCDeEym_PevCGKUHheeNKCMEhgifMqXbFhkfDGLGaiY1ivzuMX2_oRwlfVn0GAAD__3UOh5g). America turns 250 this year, and your spare change is [getting a makeover](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFywyAQRL8GddbcIQx2QZFGndOm1GBxki-DwAFs4nx9xp78QaqdbXbfvI_TdHIcOK7vbiNblzRFaiVQrZSn5sIPfXMt2c00J45lpRqphUmC1DvAHejJOw6PSXXeLkSSho4sGm300ewldhcL6LTBw1kBkvKLlh6UIq3OgBIRoWP7XAMEjQh7PPboicxB0uDInOfBCwXkuabcfyaO9UJLeKQ75X5OWxfspdZrEcObkKOQY2utv5WNY-3XdBdyfHH_5e6a05rd9uyFNv66cZwpVoqRXRBy7LL118YhcNFGKFg3x-H1U_8l527lbwAAAP__NSd5-A). The U.S. Mint is rolling out one-year-only redesigns of the dime, quarter, and half-dollar this week, stamped “1776 ~ 2026,” as we report below. If you’re looking for a smart way to protect your home from expensive surprises, today’s sponsor, [Service Plus Home Warranty,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwjAUxfGnsTci32uwk8FDK5ROUPVDYowc5wZuaxIUu7j06Sv6Ct1_5wz_w67beY48Hff-TC6PczdRSZFypqUrPv7QN-e0-EBh5ikdKU9UYocKzUrBSplu8Bxv3VoObiRC0pIcWGNNYzcI8uT8aHpvLJEPNXpUdQi6MYH6xjQe1Eayu78pUAZAbaCpYCCyNZL2ZPugB7FWNHCel-pj5imfaIy3-UpLFeazjO6U8yUJ_SCwFdiWUqqyhE-e-hjvQmCLT1ADvKAR2G4Pb83j6_6OdZu-ehB6-94-y8UNl8IxcjJWrNXx7PlvLvO_qlwd_gYAAP__dIF0pQ) has a New Year's offer worth your attention.
|

## Walz Exits Governor's Race Amid Fraud Scandal
Minnesota Governor Tim Walz [dropped his bid for a third term](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy3CAMRb8Gd9oBbONsQZHG3Uub0iOD7CWRwQPsc5yvz5BfeI0a3bnSOT8_lg8MHOL-Aw-ydUtLpKsw1Up5uZD_0p9QS0ZHLoVYdqqRLl601AakAmkWj4HvZei83Yg09R1ZNZnJPKdRq-5l_WbG1anB9IPR2ve9cW59qglX-XRGj12wrU0qaZSSo3o-lCeavmnqkabV9V4MknyoKT9-pRDriza-0yflh0tHx_ZV61lE_13oWeg53mcqta2Enlux0LNUbYxCz-8CjU_ouYYDGh_gmt9n5Rt8TmeB9K6QNjhCjFRSRdjbqZhygWYBQoQLf1PLIDPt5GENzCFF8IkZM2wZ3x6Kw-iRhZ67bP15tUwxkxjkfmDg_7_XLwn_tPpfAAAA__9ZmZcl) on Monday amid a growing fraud scandal in which billions of taxpayer dollars were allegedly swindled on his watch. Explaining his decision, the Democrats' 2024 vice presidential nominee said, "_Every minute I spend defending my own political interests would be a minute I can't spend defending the people of Minnesota."_ Prosecutors have charged over 90 people for fraud involving bogus nonprofits set up to grab state funding for services to the homeless, hungry, and people needing daycare. The Trump administration has deployed [roughly 2,000 federal agents](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFu7CAARE-DO1uAjfkuKH7jbtOmtDAMXhIMK0BLNqePnCukG2mkGb33fttu2gcfjzd9QlWXtohWAmpF3poO3_jytWRtYJKP5UCNaGHjlM89ZT2dN6t9eG1TZ5UDOMYOislZzosUnHV3JYXAboxx0mksk5CjhZ7kAiZ2IeA6r641yujMGBVsGZgF5D-OUUPuZrRkorC-pjx8JB_rHS680hN5MOnsgrrX-ihk_E_4SvjaWhvMXi6Kqyd8vSLh6-ljhH6k4EvvYJF16PWBWEtvsjafNrVI-NplZR_Nh-DLLMlEj1P78PtU_6TnqfhPAAAA___Y-Xxn) from Homeland Security and ICE to Minneapolis for a 30-day surge to investigate the schemes, with estimates of the theft ranging from at least $1 billion to possibly $9 billion or more. [Senator Amy Klobuchar](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0O2yAUhZ8Gb1j8ODgeGBJV3tKllSp1sTBcO7fCYAEJTZ--oq_Q7UpXOud834_H8jDoMexfzQG6bHEJULOHUiAt1fg_8BtLTsaCjRjyDiVA9YtgQlHGKVOLM-g_y9A5vQEIkB1oPqpRTeNF8O6pheOblOtVGSsmfhndygc7WceU4lcGvEPd0hhninN24VPPHcB4FSANjKuVjgwMHJaY-l8RQ3nC5j_xDam38ei8fpZyZiJvRMxEzLXW_sih_YiYIdBXJmJuUETMZ_RY0Laz4EEbHy2RuhRPGl-Fxo0eGALkWAzdW0eIiWba-ImYTaK3G_9-f_1ciZyjRUfkl3uTBzV_g3R2SbuzoveY1UgGth8G_b-Z5b_cvrX4GwAA___iso--) is viewed as a top contender to jump into the Minnesota governor's race.
## Venezuela's Maduro Pleads Not Guilty
Captured Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro [declared himself "a decent man"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb8Gd7MCbPDbwkUady9tSgvDeHcSDAjGz3G-PnJ-Ic1trnR07_nxuXw6ipRe392OE295SXi2iMxYl9PFP_ibuFXn0WdK7YWc8IyLltqCVCDtEhzFaxm6MG2IGvsOJzXa0T5Ho1X3njZnvNGDxQ_7RKXWtbfrIFF5I402znQ03TSppFVKGvV8qIA4fmjsHY6r74MYJAbiXB8_MyV-4xav_IX14fPexenNXJrovwk9Cz2nq-TGdyX0fIOFnqW6wwg9Hw3uf0LPnEuJGCCQZ8e5QiKfo2uwu3DUDD462hu8EU7X4BeF5ErBAOsFR4MtV48NKIHPR2XIB69HbQwlogsNUmZ4HRT5Enru6hTKSTFSs6MY5Gt3FP-N5_8y_jXpvwEAAP__CUGXzg) and claimed he was "kidnapped" by U.S. forces during his first court appearance Monday in Manhattan. The 63-year-old deposed dictator, wearing orange prison garb with shackled legs, pleaded not guilty to narco-terrorism charges while insisting, _"I am still president of my country."_ The United Nations Security Council [held an emergency meeting](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO2yAYRZ8Gb0SAbSADQxdvf9eOFoYb81UYftkkrvP0VfoKna90j8759TV_ecpU1p9-g2uPOhecR0Zr2OfT5zf-UDt2HxAqlWNFKzjzrITSXEgu9Bw95WseuugegELfwUmjjb6bUckuuWBtDEO_6GWIwlujRmPFKKLG3S5xCR25z5uQQkspRnm_yQgYq9B7mCX0kQ0CkVrdb78rlZbwyFd9Yb-FunXZpda-D9b_YGpiamoJiXL-bExNqW74CDE1jdooaw0_fQuJZ3qBPws_EJ47tYuH-iyBMk81x4Njw76ihItvQKOy8lr4CwXvJ7Jnaup2F79PypkObdgg1s3TP2jX_qviy6m_AQAA__-zmolY) to discuss the U.S. military operation, with U.N. Under-Secretary-General Rosemary DiCarlo warning of potential escalation as Venezuela and its allies accused the Trump administration of illegal actions. Meanwhile, the [gray Nike Tech Fleece tracksuit](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSqyAYhZ9GOxxAhVhQ3MYut72lg3I0_12EDJCw2affyb7CFqc833zz_bsuV0uewvHXnjBlj0tAzR6lIC3V-i98UsnJbtgihXygBFS_SC4V44JxtThL_rUMrTM7ING3MEIrrSY9StHezLRuGCa38xHioi4TF3p1_aSlU_3glG7JvGlccCUEH8XUCQfoi0Rvodetd83A4ajE1P2PFMoNu3_FJ1K3xbP15lbKPTf9n0bOjZxrrd1hTyTY7X3Bo5FzoA-wDO8zi4_y3k6F1ZgCW1_stO6RIrN7QWI2JeTC6LQHMjsie1Kyngk1jpPsGzm3ybh7Je8pK90M_Dgt-R-V8qt-TyO_AwAA__9Jb4Zn) Maduro wore during the capture sparked a surge in online searches and sold out within hours on Nike's website after Trump shared the photo on Truth Social.
## New Coins Mark America's 250th Anniversary
The U.S. Mint [unveiled commemorative coin designs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQhU8jdTT4T7Ngkcbdpk0pjMiRPQFFGhR3Gef0gZwjbDXAPODD-96vj-UDKFO5_4QdQ9_qUnAcGXvHtgzIf_EP9aNBxFipHHfsBUdeJJeWccG4XRJQfi16TmFDlKhmDMJZZ70zUsyPILmO3LgtqatXq1q9MF5HC0Z5qUU0M4WTxgW3QnAj_EUkRHeVqADdGlWaNMdEvbbL70qlP3DLr_qF7RLrPufw6P15TOrHJG-TvI0xLiOWeIaTvEHrFDNO8nZ6nQc61cJGbTn9_7K3GYMdG0U4mDScrdT6I8GLfR5sp9LZk2L_bHgSDHeMOyUdrMhs1J5pXC27KgNMewtpBb-BM3ML6TkoZzqsmzS_70D53bl_a-ivIP8FAAD__0QXkKk) celebrating America's 250th birthday that will begin circulating this week, featuring one-year-only redesigns of the dime, quarter, and half-dollar with dual dates reading "1776 ~ 2026." The quarter features five different designs honoring the Mayflower Compact, the Revolutionary War, the Declaration of Independence, the U.S. Constitution, and the Gettysburg Address, replacing earlier proposed themes that included abolitionist Frederick Douglass, civil rights pioneer Ruby Bridges, and women's suffrage. [See the coins here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFywyAQRL8GddbcIQx2QZFGndOm1GBxki-DwAFs4nx9xp78QaqdbXbfvI_TdHIcOK7vbiNblzRFaiVQrZSn5sIPfXMt2c00J45lpRqphUmC1DvAHejJOw6PSXXeLkSSho4sGm300ewldhcL6LTBw1kBkvKLlh6UIq3OgBIRoWP7XAMEjQh7PPboicxB0uDInOfBCwXkuabcfyaO9UJLeKQ75X5OWxfspdZrEcObkKOQY2utv5WNY-3XdBdyfHH_5e6a05rd9uyFNv66cZwpVoqRXRBy7LL118YhcNFGKFg3x-H1U_8l527lbwAAAP__NSd5-A). The dime showcases Lady Liberty with "the winds of revolution" wafting through her hair and a liberty cap adorned with stars and stripes, while the half-dollar depicts the Statue of Liberty passing the torch to a new generation. The [semiquincentennial coins](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGS3CAQRU-DMqYASTAKCJwoW6cOKQw9Q3sRbEF7NPLpXdIVNu5Xr_r9Xx_uw2PG8vzpN7D0qK7A3jMQQXO7z__gjdSbDxAqlv4EKrBnp4TSXEgutIse8-GmIdoHgIJxACuNNnoxs5JDskFNIYxyuUetp7Do-zIvd6EnrYIR47gMaE-bkEJLKWa53GQEMHcFowfzO4yRTQIiUm23PxULJXjko76g3ULdhmwT0Vdn4w-mVqZWSpAw5_PG1JrqBmcQU2uBdyff3AYRvduxAVPrrI0yWvACO78CeaqlNixPXjxhLZ2rWVDivhR8Qeu-HRwKwYUEbOFvvji-J0-cEhw81_rJM36e_qHZ-LVjzti1YZN4bh6v3wb61tgvq_4HAAD__4v-lrE) were authorized under the Circulating Collectible Coin Redesign Act of 2020, signed by President Trump, with acting Mint Director Kristie McNally saying the designs "depict the story of America's journey toward a 'more perfect union.'"
* * *

On this day in 2001, a joint session of Congress certified George W. Bush as the winner of the contested 2000 presidential election. Vice President Al Gore, the election's loser, presided over . America turns 250 this year, and your spare change is . The U.S. Mint is rolling out one-year-only redesigns of the dime, quarter, and half-dollar this week, stamped “1776 ~ 2026,” as we report below. If you’re looking for a smart way to protect your home from expensive surprises, today’s sponsor, has a New Year's offer worth your attention. | Walz Exits Governor's Race Amid Fraud Scandal Minnesota Governor Tim Walz on Monday amid a growing fraud scandal in which billions of taxpayer dollars were allegedly swindled on his watch. Explaining his decision, the Democrats' 2024 vice presidential nominee said, "Every minute I spend defending my own political interests would be a minute I can't spend defending the people of Minnesota." Prosecutors have charged over 90 people for fraud involving bogus nonprofits set up to grab state funding for services to the homeless, hungry, and people needing daycare. The Trump administration has deployed from Homeland Security and ICE to Minneapolis for a 30-day surge to investigate the schemes, with estimates of the theft ranging from at least $1 billion to possibly $9 billion or more. -- is viewed as a top contender to jump into the Minnesota governor's race. Venezuela's Maduro Pleads Not Guilty Captured Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro and claimed he was "kidnapped" by U.S. forces during his first court appearance Monday in Manhattan. The 63-year-old deposed dictator, wearing orange prison garb with shackled legs, pleaded not guilty to narco-terrorism charges while insisting, "I am still president of my country." The United Nations Security Council to discuss the U.S. military operation, with U.N. Under-Secretary-General Rosemary DiCarlo warning of potential escalation as Venezuela and its allies accused the Trump administration of illegal actions. Meanwhile, the Maduro wore during the capture sparked a surge in online searches and sold out within hours on Nike's website after Trump shared the photo on Truth Social. New Coins Mark America's 250th Anniversary The U.S. Mint celebrating America's 250th birthday that will begin circulating this week, featuring one-year-only redesigns of the dime, quarter, and half-dollar with dual dates reading "1776 ~ 2026." The quarter features five different designs honoring the Mayflower Compact, the Revolutionary War, the Declaration of Independence, the U.S. Constitution, and the Gettysburg Address, replacing earlier proposed themes that included abolitionist Frederick Douglass, civil rights pioneer Ruby Bridges, and women's suffrage. . The dime showcases Lady Liberty with "the winds of revolution" wafting through her hair and a liberty cap adorned with stars and stripes, while the half-dollar depicts the Statue of Liberty passing the torch to a new generation. The were authorized under the Circulating Collectible Coin Redesign Act of 2020, signed by President Trump, with acting Mint Director Kristie McNally saying the designs "depict the story of America's journey toward a 'more perfect union.'" name: Retribution
subject: Five years later Dems are finally retaliating for Jan 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
Now Democrats can get retribution for January 6th and its updated iteration, red state redistricting, by beating MAGA at their own game.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SZ7PMNQIMr5ioF9BQFfKm1HNgRc5tLvhjU-NZHITqLFFMxi4ZIgQd41eSJ92pArdVlAizTbuRvYpG17YxZSJUgmREHgdHWsnyM61j9a59iCY2fgi2vaCmQ2wogejJQix3w_kVIGQgzLOlzaXogaYiETH8uCgv7J0i8UmyPWCoq3AUsEcQxjwy9XZtbbcHsRb3ddk93_3mUvwO0U2KG2dL-u1HW4Wkijj&c=3qJxdxmU8R0_MWt_Sy-ec92r9A8_qe90K9dk1vkXnFCTxG0CfsDzeA==&ch=kcx8RLmihI-0jMOmTQlATD4lBxE0ROT4xvFLbPQBwlEKqn7lT1bP1Q==)
---
Peter,
Five years ago this morning MAGA rioters gathered in front of the Capitol in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election results.
Some carried concealed firearms and zip ties and were prepared to carry out detailed plans to breach the security perimeter and detain and execute key Democratic members of Congress like Nancy Pelosi.
Although it was ultimately unsuccessful, Trump learned that he could push the Constitution to the absolute limits and that he would not be punished. This gave birth to a recalibrated and updated iteration of January 6th: Red State Redistricting.
Rather than coming in hot with guns, ski masks, and zip ties, MAGA found that if they operate within the system and rig state congressional maps, they can implement one party rule whilst drawing far less attention to themselves.
However, in doing so they've sowed the seeds of their own demise. Now Democrats are enacting retribution for January 6th and its updated iteration by beating MAGA at their own game and redistricting in blue states.
Already California and Virginia have done it and now Colorado is poised to join them via the ballot measure that Colorado Draws the Line is introducing to make CO bluer and erase up to 3 MAGA seats.
Take for instance CO-04, Lauren Boebert's district -- she's the one who gave rioters reconnaissance tours of the Capitol prior to the riot.
Our ballot measure will turn Boebert's district so blue that she will never step foot in DC again.
But there are forces in DC and Denver who prefer the status quo, funding for this effort will rely entirely on the Democratic party's grassroots. [If you are ready to retaliate and fight back in a way that causes excruciating pain for MAGA, we need you. Please, can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to ensure that this critical ballot measure gets in front of CO voters? ](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SZ7PMNQIMr5ioF9BQFfKm1HNgRc5tLvhjU-NZHITqLFFMxi4ZIgQd41eSJ92pArd14emhmgtPa_0Zhjj229hjlasZ8faNkYvD1DQimTWkBDuWH6Rt32MT4wBxEyJmr1RJAb-54GQCQsgEs4C0GJfNkye59u46ESpVq1PkMuuX-yNCoP1b5OHKESBtGoTJNDUvSPKaofQc_MXRm0P2bVzNivVVQuu0PvLaaL8_ReounM=&c=3qJxdxmU8R0_MWt_Sy-ec92r9A8_qe90K9dk1vkXnFCTxG0CfsDzeA==&ch=kcx8RLmihI-0jMOmTQlATD4lBxE0ROT4xvFLbPQBwlEKqn7lT1bP1Q==)

subject: Your $2,000 Check from Trump Is Just the Start ∕ Tuesday, January 6, 2026

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]
