Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | Trump’s $2,000 Checks Are Rolling Out → | ---|--- | | Did you hear? | Trump’s $2,000 checks are more than just payouts. They’re the first signal of a massive wealth restoration plan already underway. While the media laughs it off, insiders are preparing. Because Phase One isn’t about free money — it’s about taking back control of your savings, your retirement, your future. Trump calls it “Restoring the American Dream.” Some call it “The Great Wealth Reset.” Either way, you don’t want to be the last to know. body:
The driver of a “military-style tractor trailer” led police on a [75-minute chase](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OwyAQhJ8Gd0QLIcYuKK5xl2uvtDBs4tVhY8Hmx29_cl7hmmlG-jTf_FzHq6dE6_3bL-j4fcvjiq-akBnL-KIUt5woYJh9Rc-85Cetdz9q0K0EJaEdo6e0j6aJboLYqwadsq21AF1nmtmBUZNGb-00taY3U0SEAAqmXqu2w74hd8BAQas0KK1OBuMUPZ6DtR46OAsDGIlzOfGMjG9fb2nPTyynkJcmuZl5q-L8JfQg9LDuW658VEIPB1noAdQRF6GHR5WHn9DDQonYl11W3hNKLo_wKyuuscqQtyrzKu1FLrTKj7v0N8YiQ_F1Fnpoiovbi1Ki2lph4L54Sp89_L8Xn07_BQAA___I8YYo) across Houston after a hit-and-run Sunday night. The suspect, 53-year-old Omar Moreno, hit at least 10 vehicles prior to the pursuit and attempted to ram several law enforcement vehicles before he was apprehended, according to authorities.

## Military-Style Truck Leads Police on Wild Chase
The driver of a “military-style tractor trailer” led police on a [75-minute chase](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OwyAQhJ8Gd0QLIcYuKK5xl2uvtDBs4tVhY8Hmx29_cl7hmmlG-jTf_FzHq6dE6_3bL-j4fcvjiq-akBnL-KIUt5woYJh9Rc-85Cetdz9q0K0EJaEdo6e0j6aJboLYqwadsq21AF1nmtmBUZNGb-00taY3U0SEAAqmXqu2w74hd8BAQas0KK1OBuMUPZ6DtR46OAsDGIlzOfGMjG9fb2nPTyynkJcmuZl5q-L8JfQg9LDuW658VEIPB1noAdQRF6GHR5WHn9DDQonYl11W3hNKLo_wKyuuscqQtyrzKu1FLrTKj7v0N8YiQ_F1Fnpoiovbi1Ki2lph4L54Sp89_L8Xn07_BQAA___I8YYo) across Houston after a hit-and-run Sunday night. The suspect, 53-year-old Omar Moreno, hit at least 10 vehicles prior to the pursuit and attempted to ram several law enforcement vehicles before he was apprehended, according to authorities. An off-duty Harris County deputy called for help after witnessing the crash just before 10 p.m. Authorities located the vehicle within minutes, and when Moreno didn't stop, they deployed spike strips and fired at the truck. A bystander captured part of the wild pursuit on [video](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOwyAUBNDT4A4LPhjsgmIbd9l2S-sbPjFabCKbxMntV8kVth5pNG9-LtMFU07b9RtXcvUZy7TReWSqlfbpTDncSk6e_IIHYa1reaTtihMIMFxILswUMOXXpJvgZhEG2ZCT1lgrRN_rZnFawmy0n6Oag4XBGjJ-sAJ81wslO2ySe5cJKYwEIUG2msIckJS3FkUvFNOCQqplb-tClZ54xPwqD9pbX9Ymu6XW28HUF4ORwXieZ_u7lPs7ZDDiXpPPxGB8uxiMuXjMDMaPiBMelZ487kQnvvhS7kctG4MR-o6TDcaoTnFLg-U6KsN7BOC9irMPADHG2Owu3M6UczqMZVpcV0z5M6z-786Hg78AAAD__xqzh7A). After the truck was disabled, a SWAT team [gassed Moreno](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAQRb8GM6agZcQNDDYxe5tuaCG0I_VasKAdx7_f8v3CJh2d6lvn_P2avlykmF5_3IYDf5Y8JTwrITOW6YwU9kzRo19dRce85XdMLzeBgk4qLVU3BRfpmkwThlmFX7rBQdvOWqX63jTrgE8zd72Bp_UtzLYNqgVt--UZjF-UNU0c7mdKq06D0qAfBsMcHLbeWqd61QqjMETO5cErMn5cXejKbywPn7eGhpV5r6L9LWAUMJ7n-fAU_Tes-aic000JGG8tASNl70jAeG8KGJW-z1PAuEWK7MolK1-EksvhvyWhC1UG3A-OWGVOcs1HkZTTS66RpUtBliPJnzxyxiUXlPUoBVPAcvPoKuNHLgXxdJeAsSlD2M9IFGtnhVGvzUX6MeH_6_8e4F8AAAD__xFynB4) out of the cab and took him into custody. He is charged with aggravated assault and evading arrest. His lengthy criminal history includes an April 2025 arrest when he was found naked in a stolen car. "_We don't really have a motive or anything at this point_ ," [said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMo_aze8GBJuQvU03RD12G6xnMLL7wXD71cwVNq2SSvV9f7_mLwox7Msf2niUl0_zzleJLMJ5vkJ0R4rBsl2pMIls6Qz7QjMCdhqMhm52FOI9N5Ubn-B-mYpH03d9DzAMTbWOzK3zTcOEg-_bJ1gARg--Bdd2iFiF8T0GBjqDYNA8GnZPR1zbvicYoFYNsAuS8kNWFn5R8fFOJ-eHTVsVx1XkKKr-rXBSONHTmvrdKJyOVEThJPnHfmuXw8lZ258iyd0607aFfdEnr8FGLroclL_fyYdV8-7Y6XKR6CK0u-S9ZirCL-0z80W3Xm1JutBdFE5mqNsW20bhVOXRHVeIMZSuVw0sG4X4-Sr_Z_gc8V8AAAD__06Ukpo) Harris County Sheriff’s Office Chief Deputy Tommy Diaz. The chase shut down part of the Eastex Freeway for several hours.
## Big Bend National Park Facing Water Shortage
Big Bend National Park could be [forced to close](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdKDx4NikcLENXbbdEg14AiMZjGAUkr9f5f3C66_u0Tn_HsODJMs2_6WVo76fZdj4OjOr8jFcktNeskw8LXQyqa7lJdtMAwL6GmwNfkgk-TO4KsUR0t1WHG3wIQB0nauW2OIUXBrJYXfjDgD8zft27Do_3u8t-0ri9wwseItg0TaO05iI2ykEgg5a44CTaDkaXVj5Teczf8qLj2Yqa5Xjorqfpv1jsDfYX9fVrJ-TNtq0bFK-I4P918pgn8tE2WBPh8qU2WA_ylyPvKX6IuWjPpdyKM1co8Vw8842-7JXR0z7JTnL6YNxMK8k-Yeuv2v2ivg_AAD__woqgJo) the popular Chisos Basin after water pumps for the area failed two days before Christmas, causing a "critical water shortage." Officials implemented immediate conservation measures and are "urgently trying to expedite repair of the pumps," but those repairs are [expected](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU9jOpBtHNgtXKSh27Qp0dgeYCSDkT3Cu7ePNkUukAv8_977fswPoEjH-gU7Wn4uaT6wlojMmOdKMZwpkke_QUFg3tNFxwqzlnpopWrlMAeg-JpNE6yT4a4atGocxlHK2800m9XBjRoc3DEsxqkAizIKDKD7uHsTQkP2PSaVHJSWSqvOYHABsPfjCPIme2EkBuKUO96Q8Qllia90Ye582ptoN-aziP5T6EnoqdbaHWfp1nQJPTlyKPQUEfIh9PR2E3r6o-9bn4nJQ2wrMOa2bCkzrNhtvDfZhrNSjFSGURi57kDx95P_V-qy-icAAP__VyN-Hg) to take "several weeks, at best." If storage tanks drop below the levels needed for firefighting, the park will close the area. Some of Big Bend's most popular hikes are in the Chisos Basin, which also contains lodging, campgrounds, and a visitor center. The park's busy season typically runs from February through April. An infrastructure overhaul to replace the Chisos Basin's water distribution system and the pumps at Oak Spring—the area's only water source—is [scheduled for May](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2unDAURldjOiP_8DBTuBgpopsoRaSU6GJfwIqxkX0HZnYfTbbw6u_T0dH585geEGJI60_Y0dJryVPCq0YkwjJdIfojx-DQbVARiPZ8hrTCpITquZBc9JOHEN9T13g7C3-TDVppemOEGIau2azT-gbzYDR-qQG_lt7MQjmBWnunesQm2A9MSNFLJaSSbYd-9oDaGQNiEJp1An2gXFrakPAFdYnvfGJpXd6baDeiozJ9Z2pkaryuq91r-mxMjZj4szI1UoETI1Njpg3L5waEhdctF4IVucvP6PmSi0PuYq7PgjwkPoeVz5g8T0AhJ4j8gPKXqREKv9_l7x_519oU648rxBhqb1gn1h1C_K9G3wt6WvUvAAD__3jdjHQ). "_This emergency illustrates the importance of that project_ ," the National Park Service said in its announcement.
## AT&T Moving to Plano
AT&T will [build a new global headquarters](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFygzAQRU8DHcxKKMIUKtLQOW1KZkGL0WRBBC2WffuMfYV0v_jz3sz7vg5XDBy22xeu5OQxx2GjnJhE6BhyYL9HDhNNCyZCkTXew3bDQYO2FagK7OAx8HMwpXcj-E6V5FRr2xbgcjHl4jQ0FiffqK7zWn_oEdEYaxFMNyk7z2VwLxgosEqD0qo25EeP1Exti3CBpjBAPkg8allI6IFp5me801FPcS3ZLSJ7KprPQveF7nPO9Rwf45nCRim9PoXuVzx-SFKhexSpdsYtVRvlajwD-_daCP3viYfQkap4SgqeKo_MmMrD-T0H5pBsWxi4rRj4LZf_Jbs7_RcAAP__Kt6DZg) in Plano to consolidate the company's operations in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, according to an internal email from CEO John Stankey on Monday. As of 2022, AT&T had nearly 6,000 employees assigned to its downtown Dallas offices, which received a $100 million renovation in 2021. The 54-acre campus will be built on property previously owned by Dallas investment firm NexPoint, which is [overseeing a large development](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL9G6miQlCxaBQsjiKpcqgAphZW4lggsSYdcmee_D3S_cOVgBg8z8_dj_gBPPm6_IaDlz0eaI9ZCyIx5rp7cM5Ffcd2hIDCH9PJxg1lLPQiphBxmB57ec986u0g3qhatMoMxUt5ufbvbTg5OD3oYRzVer9pdO-UAFIJR42q6R-vtCZNKDkpLpdWlR7c4wG41BuRNdk0v0XlO-cI7Mn5CedA7vTBf1hRasjvzszTdvdFTo6da6yWUeHqNnjCKozR6Ciniu9ET47rHRGk7BbBgwUkshycnNkoLkNgR3L8DMmMuwkdRjuXIiyCEc7lwqUZONQoHRFDECuF5fAXJhyWd1Czud_Xnx89f9zZb96yeyJfBNL3cAnj6as3f-_pl9f8AAAD__zNoleg) in Plano called The Texas Research Quarter. Stankey said he anticipates a move to the new headquarters "as early as the second half of 2028." Big Bend National Park Facing Water Shortage Big Bend National Park could be the popular Chisos Basin after water pumps for the area failed two days before Christmas, causing a "critical water shortage." Officials implemented immediate conservation measures and are "urgently trying to expedite repair of the pumps," but those repairs are to take "several weeks, at best." If storage tanks drop below the levels needed for firefighting, the park will close the area. Some of Big Bend's most popular hikes are in the Chisos Basin, which also contains lodging, campgrounds, and a visitor center. The park's busy season typically runs from February through April. An infrastructure overhaul to replace the Chisos Basin's water distribution system and the pumps at Oak Spring—the area's only water source—is . name: Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General
subject: What Michigan Law Requires of Its Attorney General
body:
The Law Is Clear. The Experience Matters.
| | |
---
| | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-2fevLUqwomrtC6Ku9-XMP-0Z90kyYC8NoSOx8VoWFZKviL9n2suCCFC1_P8ZefrXScy3HoQynoSgQDlJwe05b8g4CFxjanh_7WWF5rvYvB3bWj-e-20Nq1-1IfxeJfCakKdlRSnd5uNFyipIrQ1atLjb2h1UWvMexAYFarj_c4=&c=xq8yEGBHQo7dX8B4hZ_QF5g7MXOwxKTCghfMuSmySWRxu--OqUK27Q==&ch=dGBQVbdqfdUHRuQY_bididQKdRat2VQrgaB6jvqyNSkPVjplR2bh2Q==)
---
| | | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-2fevLUqwomrtC6Ku9-XMP-0Z90kyYC8NoSOx8VoWFZKviL9n2suCCFC1_P8ZefrXScy3HoQynoSgQDlJwe05b8g4CFxjanh_7WWF5rvYvB3bWj-e-20Nq1-1IfxeJfCakKdlRSnd5uNFyipIrQ1aiBD9bWPtqFtRvqX8G4ft-g=&c=xq8yEGBHQo7dX8B4hZ_QF5g7MXOwxKTCghfMuSmySWRxu--OqUK27Q==&ch=dGBQVbdqfdUHRuQY_bididQKdRat2VQrgaB6jvqyNSkPVjplR2bh2Q==)
---
| | Friends,
As we begin the new year, I want to start with something that too often gets overlooked: what Michigan law actually requires of its Attorney General.
[Michigan Compiled Laws, Chapter 14, Section 30](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-2fevLUqwomrtC6Ku9-XMP-0Z90kyYC8NoSOx8VoWFZKviL9n2suCEWJr9JWWV-lxRzNW1JM2ny1gORbesBCbKdvITGryn6Zz8LITj3qiCQRF_sAYqq7tBNItEWG6T0ywgTeDgIGh7xY0f7UgHXW9x8xT8H2m7WWh7DVGBKFpSCbouTfox0ABqLQ1jxAX1MDd1L9e9iJOHLLJiKk928hYIBs9ar4KDzGPimKS92-qSysq_PuhOdW05jo3knPKxAVD-wnYOmkhqpBOXCHp6LIy-FXLOvRBuZn96_LWfyuLH0YVZ7gdpPgbttAOBvMbOzSWaZfQgF1eULPUBfQOiVqNtFzc3qYTFUT0gkbi0yDy9JNFEdlz9kMG-KrrCYZQbAr&c=xq8yEGBHQo7dX8B4hZ_QF5g7MXOwxKTCghfMuSmySWRxu--OqUK27Q==&ch=dGBQVbdqfdUHRuQY_bididQKdRat2VQrgaB6jvqyNSkPVjplR2bh2Q==) states plainly that the Attorney General shall "supervise the work of, consult and advise the prosecuting attorneys" across our state, and report that work to the Legislature.
In short, the Attorney General is not meant to operate in isolation. The office exists to support, guide, and strengthen local county prosecutors and, through them, uphold the rule of law in every Michigan community.
That raises a simple but important question: who is best prepared to do that job?
I believe the answer is someone who understands prosecution from every angle. Someone who has spent decades inside the system, not learning on the job. My background includes more than four years practicing real estate and business law alongside criminal defense, nearly 30 years serving at every level of a prosecutor's office, and over a decade as an elected public official accountable directly to the people.
I have spoken before about the support of 60 of my fellow elected prosecutors. That support matters not because I am an elected prosecutor myself, but because experience matters. On the other side of this race, there are two Democratic elected prosecutors, along with a former U.S. Attorney. All of them entered the race months before I did and had ample time to earn that same backing.
They did not.
The reason is simple. [The 60 prosecutors, more than 30 sheriffs, and dozens of retired judges, prosecutors, and law enforcement leaders supporting this campaign](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-2fevLUqwomrtC6Ku9-XMP-0Z90kyYC8NoSOx8VoWFZKviL9n2suCFEVUOieWqxp7gYRBWKLE54oTBSotPmMb-Xww0ZwGtfJMZHAzDLXpQ5lVgQhHYcu3ApL8ZFDkKgbyN9wM3zLwll7BtlQuoWTMJWxiDIE8RxQnBl1hqtjqehqm3gH-jlIoQ==&c=xq8yEGBHQo7dX8B4hZ_QF5g7MXOwxKTCghfMuSmySWRxu--OqUK27Q==&ch=dGBQVbdqfdUHRuQY_bididQKdRat2VQrgaB6jvqyNSkPVjplR2bh2Q==) do so because they understand what this job requires, and they know I have the experience, values, and steady leadership Michigan needs to fix what has gone wrong in the Attorney General's Office.
If, like me, you believe Michigan can do better, if you want to win in November and restore integrity, accountability, and the rule of law, I respectfully ask for your support at the Convention.
Because together, we can take Michigan back.
Sincerely,
Doug Lloyd Eaton County Prosecuting Attorney Candidate for Michigan Attorney General

👉 [Become a Delegate for Doug](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-2fevLUqwomrtC6Ku9-XMP-0Z90kyYC8NoSOx8VoWFZKviL9n2suCAXEz_i_jOCUvRX6e4l_FdYdJwQk3nPlno-1ahvbe0D8AFstgIS3ck8DchZP1TZ4VmcnXXOooS1OHoAI_K1Szt3CWfZTk2ZPpz88aw0liJIUPBOy3nOvvUj0-DkdC2R1Ew==&c=xq8yEGBHQo7dX8B4hZ_QF5g7MXOwxKTCghfMuSmySWRxu--OqUK27Q==&ch=dGBQVbdqfdUHRuQY_bididQKdRat2VQrgaB6jvqyNSkPVjplR2bh2Q==)

clean_body: The Law Is Clear. The Experience Matters. | | | | | == | | | == | | Friends, As we begin the new year, I want to start with something that too often gets overlooked: what Michigan law actually requires of its Attorney General. == states plainly that the Attorney General shall "supervise the work of, consult and advise the prosecuting attorneys" across our state, and report that work to the Legislature. In short, the Attorney General is not meant to operate in isolation. The office exists to support, guide, and strengthen local county prosecutors and, through them, uphold the rule of law in every Michigan community. That raises a simple but important question: who is best prepared to do that job? I believe the answer is someone who understands prosecution from every angle. Someone who has spent decades inside the system, not learning on the job. My background includes more than four years practicing real estate and business law alongside criminal defense, nearly 30 years serving at every level of a prosecutor's office, and over a decade as an elected public official accountable directly to the people. I have spoken before about the support of 60 of my fellow elected prosecutors. That support matters not because I am an elected prosecutor myself, but because experience matters. On the other side of this race, there are two Democratic elected prosecutors, along with a former U.S. Attorney. All of them entered the race months before I did and had ample time to earn that same backing. They did not. The reason is simple. == do so because they understand what this job requires, and they know I have the experience, values, and steady leadership Michigan needs to fix what has gone wrong in the Attorney General's Office. If, like me, you believe Michigan can do better, if you want to win in November and restore integrity, accountability, and the rule of law, I respectfully ask for your support at the Convention. Because together, we can take Michigan back. Sincerely, Doug Lloyd Eaton County Prosecuting Attorney Candidate for Michigan Attorney General 👉 == | | | | | == Upcoming Stops on the Road to Restore Law & Order == == == 1.11.26 - Stand Up Oakland AG Forum == == == 1.16.26 - Ionia County GOP Meet & Greet == == == * | | | | == == == == | | | | | == | | | | Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General | PO Box, 80536 | Lansing, MI 48906 US | | | | | | | |

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: A Pause, not a goodbye...
body:
Time for me to focus on the next big thing...

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/98ab1207c47e/when-we-vote-we-win-14766669?e=8763c56857)

---
|

| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
# We are accepting Investors
# Contact: info@queraltinc.com
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=f8db436a87&e=8763c56857)
| |

**Subject:** 2026: The Year I Pause My Political Work 🇺🇸

**Dear Friends, Patriots, and Subscribers,**

As we step into 2026, I want to take a moment to speak to you—not just as a political voice you’ve come to know, but as a fellow believer in American greatness.
This is going to be an _amazing_ year for our country—and for each and every one of you.
Over the past several years, I’ve poured time, treasure, and heart into Connecticut GOP politics, fighting for our shared values: _faith, family, freedom,_ and _a future we can believe in._ That fight continues. But as we begin this new year, **I’m shifting gears to take on a mission that’s just as vital: protecting that future in the digital arena.**
I’ve launched a bold cybersecurity company, **Queralt Solutions** , based on technology we developed in partnership with Homeland Security. Our flagship product, **QX.509** , literally _eliminates passwords_ —which are responsible for over 87% of network vulnerabilities.
This isn’t theory. We just received our _first national order_ —from the country of **Senegal**. We’re opening a West African office and working to secure their entire digital infrastructure, freeing an entire nation from the risks of password-based systems. Most Americans don’t know that _30% of crime in Africa is cybercrime_. We’re going to help fix that—and what we’re doing there will soon take root here in the United States.
**This work is groundbreaking. It’s patriotic. And it’s personal.**
As much as I love the world of politics—and I always will—I need to pour my energy into this extraordinary opportunity. So I’m hitting the “pause” button on my regular political emails.
But fear not—I’m not disappearing. You’ll still hear me twice a month on **The Gary Byron Show** , sharing perspective and calling it like it is. I’ll always be in the fight with you.
And while I’m building the future of digital freedom, I ask that _you_ remain vigilant here at home. As Connecticut Republicans prepare to choose our next nominee for governor, choose boldly. Choose someone who _reflects our conservative principles_ , someone who stands with _President Donald J. Trump_ , and who will adapt _America First_ into a _Connecticut First_ agenda.
We need _fearless_ candidates—not focus-grouped, poll-driven, Democrat-pandering cowards. Independents are listening. Republicans are ready. Democrats? Most of them already made up their minds—and not in our favor. Focus on energizing _our base_. Be bold. Be clear. Be unapologetic.
**Stay frosty. Stay fearless. Stay in the fight.**
Thank you for your unwavering support, your friendship, and your commitment to our great state and country. God bless you. God bless Connecticut. And God bless the United States of America.
**Signing off for 2026,**
**Dominic Rapini**
CEO, Queralt Solutions
Constitutional Conservative
Servant of the People
My WEBSITE: **www.queraltinc.com**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/782f570e-2fcc-4b29-8d52-8bac558cb699?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For decades, Venezuela was held hostage by a regime that never earned democratic legitimacy and instead ruled through repression, corruption, and narcotics trafficking.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..yOCC7acWCt1iq0U7OuIV-btkaT6qhEUTWZ8rhG9W7BA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183549044)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=183549044&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTQ5MDQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3Njc3MDI5NzAsImV4cCI6MTc3MDI5NDk3MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.L-4hmfn4eX-QpSc4z4jz8iuxybNIuGmq4KiJIJwccJs)
Under **Nicol as Maduro**, the country became a proxy for hostile foreign powers (Russia, China, Iran) and a permissive base for criminal networks (Tren de Aragua) whose violence and fentanyl reached directly into American communities.
**Venezuelan Nationalization and Economic Collapse**
Venezuela's history also includes the **systematic nationalization and seizure of American and Western companies in the name of Venezuela.** Beginning in the mid-2000s and accelerating after 2013, U.S. energy, manufacturing, and agricultural assets were expropriated, contracts voided, and investment capital was driven out under the banner of "social justice." _The result was not equity or growth, but economic collapse and mass poverty. What was once one of the world 's great oil economies became a warning label for state-controlled socialism. Just pure socialism, not the hybrid democrat socialism sweeping the nation._
**Human Cost of Bad Government - Exile and Narcotrafficking**
The human cost for Venezuela has been staggering. **Since roughly 2014, an estimated 7.7 to 8 million Venezuelans have gone into exile** , creating one of the largest refugee crises in modern history. People didn't flee ideology--they fled hunger, violence, and fear. **This is an 800 percent increase over the million Cubans that fled to escape Castro.**
The consequences of Venezuela's collapse did not stay overseas. Gangs like Tren de Aragua followed migration routes into American cities, bringing extortion, violence, and fentanyl. From apartment complexes overtaken by gangs to overdose deaths in Connecticut and beyond, Venezuela's lawlessness was exported here.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/619f9a30-7111-4b19-aaf4-fd14fd7e8be8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Contradictory Celebrations versus Protest**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45030ad8-98b2-4e19-b786-10592d4e6c33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/72e61938-0dc2-4d7f-8cc4-7a8c328bd705?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Source Angie Wong - ](https://substack.com/redirect/897cd393-dcea-481e-b36f-c63f03b7faa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Miami GOP Committeewoman
[Pledge your support](https://substack..yOCC7acWCt1iq0U7OuIV-btkaT6qhEUTWZ8rhG9W7BA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=183549044)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=183549044&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzNTQ5MDQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3Njc3MDI5NzAsImV4cCI6MTc3MDI5NDk3MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.L-4hmfn4eX-QpSc4z4jz8iuxybNIuGmq4KiJIJwccJs)
Watching Venezuelans celebrate around the world this weekend was so powerful. Families who actually lived under the oppressive regime rejoiced at the possibility of freedom and restored democracy. That joy stood in stark contrast to protests in parts of the U.S. and Europe calling for Maduro's return--demonstrations made up largely of **non-Venezuelans**. Those who suffered were celebrating.
**Angry Protestors Erupt Everywhere**
Yet there were many protests with protestors resembling those participants in "NO KINGS" day, yet to get rid of a dictator like Maduro is the removal of an un-elected king who illegitimately came to power.
**Those romanticizing the regime were not the ones who paid the price. If you love democracy and don 't like Fentanyl you can't like Maduro.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/47657ff0-81be-4458-a883-ab743364428c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source [WFSB ](https://substack.com/redirect/618dc3eb-f977-4492-b9d0-9cdfca3403c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**How Does Connecticut Feel About Maduro 's Removal?**
That Depends on Who You Ask?
**Venezuelan Association of Connecticut reacts to Nicolas Maduro 's capture by U.S. forces.**
Here in Connecticut, **Venezuelan Association of Connecticut President Clodomiro Falcon** was interviewed and stated "There are no legit authorities of government in Venezuela. On July 28, 2024, elections were on, and Edmundo Gonzalez Urrutia was elected president. But Maduro took the government by, I would say, cheating. In my opinion, this is my personal opinion, it was the right move to move forward the restoration of the democracy and life in Venezuela and also to defend the interests of the United States. Because what's happening in Venezuela affects the United States, because it's not only Venezuela, it's Iran, it's Russia, it's China.
**How About Our Elected Officials?**
If You Ask Connecticut's Congressman Murphy - He claimed it had nothing to do with National Security but Oil and Money - See the exchange between the WH and Murphy below:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c5f0f28-7a06-4c9b-be49-2acca91ccc83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[See WH Rapid Response Account on X](https://substack.com/redirect/eca26007-502a-4c87-bcbf-15cce76330f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Congressman Jim Himes, the ranking Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee, faced the nation and said Congress should have authorized any use of military force and called M**aduro 's capture as "clearly illegal under international law"**

**Former Mayor Adams highlights the hypocrisy of the political reactions**
That contradiction was captured plainly by **Eric Adams**. You don't place a **$25 million bounty on a narco-dictator** one year and pretend he's harmless the next because politics changed. Public safety isn't partisan.
This isn't diplomacy.
It's denial.
_**Fentanyl doesn 't care about party lines.
Cartels don't respond to talking points.
And history doesn't lie.**_
Calling out hypocrisy shouldn't be controversial--especially when lives are at stake.
The future of Venezuela is unknown, but its chance for a restoration of democracy has increased dramatically with the removal of Maduro.
_Dr. Goldstein was in Caracas in 1979 and it was a beautiful city that he called it the Los Angeles of South America. Maybe in a post-Maduro world, it will look like the Miami of South America._

name: Matt Ortega
subject: I am going to be outspent in this campaign
body:
Here’s the deal: I am going to be outspent in this campaign. | | | Hey there, So a former mayor, a state senator, and a city councilmember enter a race. This may sound like the beginning a joke but I assure you it's no joke. Politicians can raise money and fast. **Here’s the deal: I am going to be outspent in this campaign.** That was clear going in. Our path will be paved by hard work, knocking on doors, and meeting voters face-to-face. We will win them over by offering a bold vision for America’s future and showing we have the fight to get us there. **[Will you make your first contribution today? Chip in to help us keep up with the politicians.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs15CI1un4mqQ-2mQT9dbYIqcCZP1Y0joiOOi9lunSZuGTE_MdruQz3JemxrVTuIv70lJCMkwThntmPHA4kYi7Y12MwBMVg7-nx4VWn4gIIUGqvsn78jlMlXrmeX1ydRXDVKOvluHJCanN9Mi95tXaeV-H4k3-U0EhlHKW0H_RZCy3MGYr2eDTsomOfFzy04YtTmfzJa-8fXsgiWDfu93BFxfzphQHnuXjKWHJ8EYaiU8rUCPzPk25THHKd6dpTAQMMyXRGzBlvlfFEm8is5_zmfk99k1gYF2tpTL6pJoTguLHg4SjvFNjiSnAnWdYLHPBdGl_C2yf96YRVN2j8pEewE4JQqp6NM4DpjHF-JVHWKw/4n2/howNIw0TRXCFbsEFWF-aYw/h0/h001.o0USF-Plj6p28jnYa2GtpfLyyt4A6Bme7PhVmVTX5iA)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [**Contribute $14**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs15CI1un4mqQ-2mQT9dbYIqcCZP1Y0joiOOi9lunSZuGtZbbZAazDXavbl4bkGsYFbNyRZ7YrIBUgnmLi1Lohwwfe4Gpnvp8opNpVVx9p1y8l0cZ-QFYHqbzbWtfSVDBOXW0SaKlfRcS3JBmwLb-G6r8zzINOxZOqpI6XB7thBLmDz0eVt2l8e4V4_G8pF42lNZ8STNWiDAcQWHwiPNJWVeDlbGkQGCCZs0bB0nQ_GXRm53ILUTIbnA1sBKQKG9mWJBU4rUmF3gqKYXyprMM_0BmZem4XbR-fqv1hN3RH2qShAdrQess1A4VFhfC7Q_NUFlUneuRyfVkN4xzfV9vTJC_8Qzxu5GVrdDyQmxSK6EtBBZFC62rwGc3Q1qHHDMbtQK5nEg4XsIpfNRHyI_5Eo/4n2/howNIw0TRXCFbsEFWF-aYw/h1/h001.XLzKfdEYMXUW5r5EmAQKnQmQBwSD0Pg-yZ7vN89fGlo)

clean_body: Here’s the deal: I am going to be outspent in this campaign. | | | Hey there, So a former mayor, a state senator, and a city councilmember enter a race. This may sound like the beginning a joke but I assure you it's no joke. Politicians can raise money and fast. Here’s the deal: I am going to be outspent in this campaign. That was clear going in. Our path will be paved by hard work, knocking on doors, and meeting voters face-to-face. We will win them over by offering a bold vision for America’s future and showing we have the fight to get us there. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. I may be a first-time candidate but I’m no rookie. I’ve been in the national fight for nearly twenty years and I can tell you: it is a different beast than supermajorities in the state legislature and city councils. Thank you. name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: January 2026
body:
National security activity doesn’t stop during the holidays
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
#### Teichert in the Trenches - January 2026
#### **🎆 🎇 Happy New Year – 2026: Our Nation’s 250th Birthday!**
**
**Welcome to this month’s installment of Teichert in the Trenches, a monthly newsletter highlighting a snippet of my attempts to maximize my impact on people and our great nation and to develop the leaders our nation needs!
🙏 A deep THANK YOU to several of you who reached out with some advice and recommendations on making this product even better! I have incorporated several recommended updates to the format and content based on your awesome feedback! ** _Teichert in the News_**
---
| | | National security activity doesn’t stop during the holidays. The following videos provide a sample of key topics from last month. Please follow me on LinkedIn for up to date thoughts on Venezuela.
---
| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeFuBmP64SPACXkt7Xr7g/DKzApbmPaP9b)
---
The double-tap boat strike in the Caribbean was big news during the first part of the month (w/ Nick Smith, 6 December, NewsNation).
* Secretary Hegseth would only be asked to step aside if Trump loses confidence in his Secretary of War or if the President believers that what’s going on in the Department is a distraction from Trump’s desire to increase lethality and readiness of our military force.
* 76 Percent of the American public is clamoring to better understand what we are doing in the Caribbean and the Eastern Pacific.

| | | | [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG13EXv1dZJgdaBrW9hw/cCc9BLZMbfzN)
---
The sanctioned tanker blockade against Venezuela has been big news during the last portion of December (w/ Connell McShane, 12 December, NewsNation)
* With the blockade, President Trump has dialed in to something that can actually impact Venezuela, President Maduro, and his inner circle.
* **At some point there will be a clash between Maduro believing that the United States is bluffing with its military buildup and the need for President Trump to maintain the credibility of the United States.**

| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeG7uggjyojTAjPUbUSIC/gvDqeuv8e_GV)
---
More on the ramifications to Venezuela of the tanker blockade (w/ Jody Hice, 12 December, Family Research Council)
* There are around 1,000 shadow tankers around the globe.
* We are essentially cutting the Venezuelan federal budget in half by the tanker blockade.

| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGEm8pYvztcepEnLSksS/tkFMZO21ZntH)
---
| | | A pre-New Year run-down of Russia/Ukraine and Israel/Gaza (w/ Keleigh Beeson, 30 December, NewsNation)
* On Putin’s claims of a Ukrainian attack against his residence: Putin is seeing momentum between Ukraine, the United States, and Europe in consolidating our negotiating position and these false claims are his attempt to scuttle it.
* On Trump’s comments about Hamas’s need to disarm: His words were also a shot across the bow of the Arab partners of Hamas who have the responsibility to coax them to disarm.

** _Thoughts by Teichert_**
---
| | | | [ Maryland must come before governor’s political ambitions](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGLdayNtB3m8v465R3Si/87-_MM-2gq8C "Maryland must come before governor’s political ambitions")
---
Thanks to The Baltimore Sun for publishing these thoughts about the gerrymandering plans of Maryland's Governor Wes Moore (December 9th):
* “The people of the great state of Maryland are suffering the embarrassment of their governor’s naked ambition while he doubles down on his talking points.”
* Marylanders are fleeing “to other states, seeking locales where economic opportunity and human flourishing are not afterthoughts ... [We] must demand that our governor focus on our priorities instead of his own.”

| | | | [ Billy Mitchell: Lessons a Hundred Years Hence](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGSV37CqMDvd0tOpPM2y/AgvbJh8LI6QA "Billy Mitchell: Lessons a Hundred Years Hence")
---
It was a joy to publish this one alongside of Jason Korman (CEO of Gapingvoid Culture Design Group) about a court-martial a century ago that changed the course of history and American power!
* A timeless lesson derived from Brigadier General Billy Mitchell: "Despite the best traditional arguments, culture keeps its firm grip on a system designed to protect itself until shaken loose by something provocative, captivating, and relentlessly socialized."
* Through his performative leadership, Billy Mitchell paved the way for American air power dominance. By utilizing his unique version of culture design, he changed both perception and reality to overcome a system effectively designed to sabotage progress. Employing similar methods, we can apply his tactics to overcome substantial challenges in our own context 100 years hence!

| [ ](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGZMVG1nXO576ihZNedE/4_k9Zt48Khm6)
---
| | | 🏈 These thoughts are NOT about football – Comparing Two Responses to this year’s College Football Playoff results (Notre Dame vs. Vanderbilt)!

📣 Both teams had valid arguments that they belonged in the playoffs. Neither made it into the final 12.

🍀 Notre Dame responded by refusing to play in any bowl game, blaming the system and not their own shortcomings. It was indicative of culture that is rotten and an attitude that is entitled. It is also a horrible reflection of an entire university system.

⚓ Vanderbilt was reflectively disappointed. Yet, they responded with grace, relishing the challenge of playing Iowa on New Year’s Eve. They shouldered the responsibility for their two losses and intend to use this as a springboard for future success. It is also a wonderful reflection of an entire university system.

!?️ How do you respond when things don’t go your way? Are you using it to prepare for the future or sulk about the past?

!?️ Do you rightly remember that your response to setbacks reveals your true character? What does your response say about who you really are? Does your response come with collateral damage or collective determination?

🔥 🔥 🔥 Your response to shortcomings, challenges, and setbacks reveals much about you and your organization. People are always watching, and will use what they see during your times of trial to determine what they think about what you say you represent!

!?️ When things don’t go your way, do you whine, or quit, or Anchor Down?!
---
| | | |
---
| | | ✈️ Unmatched Air Dominance for 20 Years!

💥 Twenty years ago (December 15, 2005), the F-22 Raptor was declared IOC (Initial Operational Capability)! Flying as a test pilot on this amazing warfighting platform three different times, including during those pivotal years before IOC, continues to be a true life highlight and a humbling honor!

🔥 One World Class Team that spanned the country – military, government, and contractor – has ensured American air dominance for the last two decades ... and beyond!

🙏 A huge thanks to Hooter Rainey and Snap Russell for this awesome picture during my fini flight in January 2020.
---
|
---
| | | !?️ Are you ready to snap an opportunity that comes your way?

📷 On December 17th, 1903, lifeguard John T. Daniels took one of humanity’s most iconic photos – the world’s first flight with Orville Wright at the controls. Interestingly, Daniels had never taken a photo before. In fact, he had never even seen a camera and had only just received abbreviated instructions in its use by the Wright Brothers prior to that moment.

🎶 To quote Eminem:
🎤 “If you had one shot or one opportunity
To seize everything you ever wanted – one moment
Would you capture it or just let it slip?”

💥 John T. Daniels took the shot and captured it brilliantly! ** _Teichert in the Trenches_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | ✈️ One world class team ... the American air dominance legacy continues!

A few weeks ago, I was at Edwards Air Force Base for other activities and spent quality time with some amazing flight test professionals. While they have rebranded from the F-22 Combined Test Force (CTF) to the Air Dominance CTF, their culture is still strong and thriving! They are now responsible for molding and shaping the F-22, the F-47, and our portfolio of Collaborative Combat Aircraft!

🫡 A huge thanks to Baja Gilliland, Snap Russell, Cheryl Hamblin, and Evan Wagner for your incredible hospitality and for sharing some of the details of what will keep our nation ruling the skies well into the future!

🇺🇲 The CTF plays a major part in supporting the United States to win in competition, deterrence, and war!

🤣 I may be a bit overdressed, but I'm still ready and lethal!**

****_Behind the Scenes_**

---
| |

---
|

🎄 🐲 🚁 Nothing says Christmas like an inflatable dragon and Santa helicopter (with rotating main and tail rotors)!

💥 It might not be the norm, but it’s a great way to interweave the personal with the traditional. Don’t worry, when we go into deflated mode, it's classic candles in the windows!
|
---
🐲 Things that last – from 1998 (the marriage, the callsign, and the gift)!

💥 Melonie got me the following pub sign for our first married Christmas! We were in the United Kingdom at the time, and the gift is a fitting reminder of a memorable period that provides a proper reminder of a major part of my life and identity. What gift have you received through the years that has endured the test of time?!
| [ Chemistry for the Warfighter: Midshipman Research at the U.S. Naval Academy](https://eufi5.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK1E8tHeGgDxOqkiYEbCY0JLxDU/oPDecQGjWw9C "Chemistry for the Warfighter: Midshipman Research at the U.S. Naval Academy")
---
⚓ Chemistry for the Warfighter!

💥 The core purpose of the United States Naval Academy – preparing future Naval and Marine Corps officers. Melonie and her colleagues are killing in in fostering lethality and readiness at USNA through research and practical applications embedded in the chemistry curriculum. ** _My Bookshelf_**
| | | |
---
“We are all on a collision course with the inevitable next global health emergency, with climate change, and with the power of disruptive new technologies to destabilize our lives and societies. These are the risks to our common future. Every moment, every idea, every ounce of energy, and every dollar wasted on fighting one another, at home or in some potential war zone, increases the risk that we all suffer together when these global threats grow beyond our ability to control them.”
| | | |
---
“The best adult life is lived in making commitments and staying faithful to those commitments: commitments to a vocation, to a family, to a philosophy or faith, to a community. Adult life is about making promises to others, being faithful to those promises. The beautiful life is found in the mutual giving of unconditional gifts.”
“Division is healed not mostly by solving the bad, but by overwhelming the bad with the good. If you can maximize the number of good interactions between people, then the disagreements will rest in a bed of loving care, and the bad will have the tendency to take care of itself.”
|
---
📣 These two devotional books played a key role in my daily spiritual development during this past year!
🔑 Don’t forget to include a time of prayer and Bible-based devotional reading to start your days in 2026! ** _PLUS Posts for the Month_**

Friend,
---
It’s a dark day for America.
---
**New York Attorney General Letitia James has officially sworn in Zohran Mamdani as the first communist mayor of the largest city in America.**
---

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=600fcdad0f764ae69a10228c3a7c74c4&_e=e63l7dWN7p0Gv5ySjCsw53x_y0X063Y1A6LGGi8kvzSWb5equ3vKwWxoC4OUTQU4wuXkXEZ-GFtHxBwkXUbInvt77ZJeibdK1OHClhENtCauGvOuJOliIHFwCZ8a-gbqdyzTucuEqhTtP_m_Fiv9eWegSbsNDv4Df7EfrDJndusnhdZhs911bpCic9_mserjaoxifPzrRViMBp0mH28tN2TAukGY9mfnAJOby8e6X-fliLqCnKrFJDyCwJCSOXAeytSE2mgm0i40hESp5FdAkqeZPAwTJipGmoS9eRprnEQdNQftJJSMB5swSG-DstEDnFrb20ZmpisF4Zie10OrxLk_DX8texJYULRNGI28XM7lpcWbZ_W4mpreLuIBN35_Nzkr3diaYWORQ7kQc7IEjDFtsfr62p9ussj09RtnC6xfY873y6CG2cjziowH6CIo7ux630dNzPxQYkjF3RvMPJRF96pdHVMYLdwNFGtP_eZ3e47icVdg8AkkzN4V0FbP16-QlaW98i2RuoV9lbrXs6IbIZ2d-YnkPqeXB1cb-6fKBbE9Wf-qxjx2uDMkU31dU_Mjk1-TjqfBpFVScMTzfwtB6SP9YRyqRqMcEa8azhXFn7q4yTZEYIfeB-60QAL4G-4RzwYTDeN-kwttkuUBLQ%3D%3D)
---

This is a man who has called for abolishing prisons, ending private property, defunding the police, and has cozied up to anti-Semites and terrorist sympathizers.
---
In fact, just before his inauguration, Mamdani appointed Joe Biden’s former immigration advisor – _and a man who defended an al Qaeda terrorist_ – to be his chief legal counsel.
---
**We cannot sit idly by as the most radical fringes of the Left take over America.**
---
I am the Republican running to FIRE New York Attorney General Letitia James who enabled Mamdani’s rise to power and just swore him in.
---
...But also, as the next Attorney General of New York, I will serve as the **_FINAL_ _LEGAL_ _FIREWALL_** against Mamdani’s unconstitutional and radical agenda.
---
**_For the first days following Mamdani’s Inauguration, I need your help showing just how many freedom-loving Americans stand against the new Mamdani Administration._**
---
And here’s the best part...
---

# History In the Making!
---
| |
---
| **Yesterday marked a moment that few thought we would ever see.** [The CDC formally adopted ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc1ODUxNzYzODIyMjMyODE0LFwiclwiOjE3NTg1MTgyMTA2ODE5MTc0M30iLCJzIjoiMTdlNjM3ZTI3OWI3OGZlZCJ9)a revised childhood and adolescent immunization schedule following a Presidential Memorandum directing federal agencies to align U.S. policy with international best practices. **The result is the largest rollback of routine childhood vaccination in U.S. history.** After reviewing peer-country schedules and the scientific evidence behind them, federal health leadership has effectively acknowledged what parents and advocates have been saying for years: **American children have been hyper-vaccinated.** The new schedule dramatically reduces the number of vaccines labeled “routine for all children,” **cutting approximately** **55 routine doses**. **This is a major victory for informed consent, parental rights, and medical liberty.** It’s important to be clear about what this change does and does not do. No vaccines were banned. None were removed from availability. Instead, vaccines lacking international consensus have been reclassified away from “routine for all children.” That distinction matters because “routine” status has long been used to justify pressure, coercion, and the erosion of true informed consent. At the same time, this change does **not** mean the remaining routine vaccines are “safe by default.” These products still lack long-term, placebo-controlled safety trials, have never been evaluated as a cumulative schedule, and continue to raise serious concerns—particularly when administered during critical periods of development. **Still, this decision represents a historic course correction.** For the first time in modern history, federal policy has moved closer to **proportion, transparency, and accountability**. That door is now open, and Texans for Vaccine Choice will continue pushing it wider until real safety science, real informed consent, and real medical liberty are fully restored.

clean_body: | | Massive Changes To the Vaccine Schedule Announced! | | | | | | History In the Making! | | | Yesterday marked a moment that few thought we would ever see. revised childhood and adolescent immunization schedule following a Presidential Memorandum directing federal agencies to align U.S. policy with international best practices. The result is the largest rollback of routine childhood vaccination in U.S. history. After reviewing peer-country schedules and the scientific evidence behind them, federal health leadership has effectively acknowledged what parents and advocates have been saying for years: American children have been hyper-vaccinated. The new schedule dramatically reduces the number of vaccines labeled “routine for all children,” cutting approximately 55 routine doses. This is a major victory for informed consent, parental rights, and medical liberty. It’s important to be clear about what this change does and does not do. No vaccines were banned. None were removed from availability. Instead, vaccines lacking international consensus have been reclassified away from “routine for all children.” That distinction matters because “routine” status has long been used to justify pressure, coercion, and the erosion of true informed consent. At the same time, this change does not mean the remaining routine vaccines are “safe by default.” These products still lack long-term, placebo-controlled safety trials, have never been evaluated as a cumulative schedule, and continue to raise serious concerns—particularly when administered during critical periods of development. Still, this decision represents a historic course correction. For the first time in modern history, federal policy has moved closer to proportion, transparency, and accountability. That door is now open, and Texans for Vaccine Choice will continue pushing it wider until real safety science, real informed consent, and real medical liberty are fully restored. | News | | | | | | Apply To Be a TFVC OC | Have you been looking for a way to get engaged with the mission? With just 3-6 hours per month, you can join the best team in Texas ...Team TFVC! Apply today to be a TFVC Outreach Coordinator. Our next round of training is January 22! | | | | | | Protect Your Family | TFVC has partnered with the Family Freedom Project to support parents in their most challenging moments. Your discounted FFP membership offers direct access to attorneys, help during CPS cases , and a 24/7 support hotline. Medical liberty begins with protecting your right to raise your family without fear. | | | Upcoming Events | | | | | | Privacy Webinar | Privacy is foundational to medical liberty, but Big Tech profits from your personal data and uses it to influence what you see and believe. Texans do NOT have to accept a surveillance state as inevitable. You are invited to join privacy and security expert Glenn Meder for a free webinar on Thursday, January 29 at 7pm. No tech expertise required - just a desire to protect your family. | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, KellerTexas, United States of America | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | You are receiving this email because you donated or signed up. |

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
#

Peter, it's Mark Kelly.
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
[**And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Jon Ossoff and me so we can fight back.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26-kelly.V_G3tO&refcode=em260106-1-full&t=1&akid=1389%2E5691347%2EVUQdI0)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26-kelly.V_G3tO&refcode=em260106-1-full&t=2&akid=1389%2E5691347%2EVUQdI0)**
Don’t give up the ship.
Mark

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=1389%2E5691347%2EVUQdI0) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1389%2E5691347%2EVUQdI0) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

---
Peter - It’s Charlie Bailey. Five years after January 6th, the dangerous lie that incited an insurrection hasn’t disappeared. It’s being revived right here in Georgia, by Lt. Governor Burt Jones. Last month, Jones appointed Salleigh Grubbs — a pro-Trump election denier — to oversee Georgia’s election security. It’s an intentional effort to place an enabler of the Big Lie in charge of Georgia’s elections. By putting an election denier in a position of authority, Jones is undermining the very foundation of our democracy — the freedom to choose our leaders and have our votes counted fairly. **We’ve seen where this leads, Peter.** And if Burt Jones becomes governor, this won’t be an exception — it will be Georgia’s blueprint. Our state’s elections will be run by those who refuse to accept their outcomes. Our democracy will answer only to Donald Trump, not to the people of Georgia. name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0sfi7i9kgqj1tq1rdo5hbsvfu6ggdmi3rsc9ug_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpilathuct81bujsi8f1p0kf0us9f5j5vr3g7eig_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmvq7p585vkfifdsesacb3h0utbt195qsusv6c3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6a615piqjie8unpg719qle46ig56ue1h1kbr9oo_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z62oagtn4klrpv4ilavq85htv126iun2k8hqgji0_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu969knb2ernprvdotaia6ep3lkvsfiso8du6n1o_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtdlq0op6fp72dsn8rvgjah7vn30tm5v0akatbg_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqv0c9k40rfp8s62j3bot4rg6g0gechhe9odjms8_rp22sh2s8i6eor7cth66p74cph2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Do not be afraid. Do not be silent. Speak out.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If you’re reading this, you definitely remember what happened on this day five years ago. Donald Trump sent a mob to the Capitol to steal an election.
#

Hey everybody, it's Mark.
If you’re reading this, you definitely remember what happened on this day five years ago. Donald Trump sent a mob to the Capitol to steal an election.
He had just lost, fair and square, and he didn’t like the result. So he decided he was going to try to silence the voices of 81 million people.
It was one of the darkest days in the history of our country, but we made it through.
Now he’s back, five years later, and it’s the same scheme. His Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, is trying to silence me right now. He thinks he can make an example out of me, and intimidate others into staying quiet.
But here’s the thing: Americans really like freedom of speech. You sign an oath to defend it when you join the military. Trying to silence people into compliance is just about the most un-American thing you can do. Period.
There is nothing Trump or Hegseth or anybody in that administration can do to shut me up. I am going to keep fighting for our people, our democracy, and our Constitution.
We’re not going to let him win. Not a chance. So, five years on from January 6th, I want you to take this to heart: **Do not be afraid. Do not be silent. Speak out.**
We’re going to get through this the same way we did back then: together.
[**Please, make a grassroots donation to help support my fight against Trump. This is our toughest yet, and I need a huge team behind me.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.oeiXQe&refcode=em260106-1-90&t=1&akid=6323%2E6688874%2EISKZuU) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.IYmzt9&refcode=em260106-1-90&t=20&akid=6323%2E6688874%2EISKZuU)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.MJy2qR&refcode=em260106-1-90&t=21&akid=6323%2E6688874%2EISKZuU)**

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.NuVdFx&refcode=em260106-1-90&t=23&akid=6323%2E6688874%2EISKZuU)**

Thank you.
Mark

Friend,

It’s a dark day for America.
---
**New York Attorney General Letitia James has officially sworn in Zohran Mamdani as the first communist mayor of the largest city in America.**
---

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

This is a man who has called for abolishing prisons, ending private property, defunding the police, and has cozied up to anti-Semites and terrorist sympathizers.
---
In fact, just before his inauguration, Mamdani appointed Joe Biden’s former immigration advisor – _and a man who defended an al Qaeda terrorist_ – to be his chief legal counsel.
---
**We cannot sit idly by as the most radical fringes of the Left take over America.**
---
I am the Republican running to FIRE New York Attorney General Letitia James who enabled Mamdani’s rise to power and just swore him in.
---
...But also, as the next Attorney General of New York, I will serve as the **_FINAL_ _LEGAL_ _FIREWALL_** against Mamdani’s unconstitutional and radical agenda.
---
**_For the first days following Mamdani’s Inauguration, I need your help showing just how many freedom-loving Americans stand against the new Mamdani Administration._**
---
And here’s the best part...
---
_...We have qualified for a certified 600% MATCH on grassroots contributions between $5 and $250 made to FIRE Attorney General Letitia James, who literally put Mamdani in office._

[**Please make a contribution to FIRE Letitia James and STOP Mamdani’s communist agenda – and a *CERTIFIED* 600% MATCH will be activated for grassroots contributions.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

name: Trisha
subject: Jan 6th…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Could the next January 6th be weeks away with Boebert once again leading the charge?
| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001XvBc3bsHgRWXLyJfHoB0-w%3D&ch=005337f2-e4bf-11f0-bd14-0242b661c010&ca=1c5dc80b-13a6-48ae-930f-5bced14ad683) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
---
| | [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EXV09sTfU07J8bKLb6r7tBTDF1wVpIHqpcLmkaAEJYPTO9EfjmFBUMHlUcwZD1Lt0kVSKGes8Au2SDC_6pFKCgUgLUd4HLIxyPpFchmIayAQSsZIcNhi3eOEXINNCKsGmnzR1xUNfAIm-e1SVDJpuvsqvKlUMGA2P2UO-3eS2Vo9TZVp-6rBjHR68Mb74-WY2atFPiZx_IgYaKyoboZdBqRwBhCLPbjE&c=7vhBJ-Pq5Lapp4qXYMaILkaTqV6n04YJtM8n3Q9gs50RtgeR5fCYng==&ch=nzqiCvbPCzGeP12_ckOnCRDGt6ytvyukXweZkoIm2cIg8QYz5n4D1A==)
---
| Peter,
Today marks five years since the attack on our U.S. Capitol on January 6th 2021.
It was one of the darkest days for our democracy since the Civil War.
My opponent Lauren Boebert gave reconnaissance tours to the people who would storm the Capitol, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. On the day of, she tweeted out the location of the U.S. Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob.
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EXV09sTfU07J8bKLb6r7tBTDF1wVpIHqpcLmkaAEJYPTO9EfjmFBUMHlUcwZD1Lt0kVSKGes8Au2SDC_6pFKCgUgLUd4HLIxyPpFchmIayAQSsZIcNhi3eOEXINNCKsGmnzR1xUNfAIm-e1SVDJpuvsqvKlUMGA2P2UO-3eS2Vo9TZVp-6rBjHR68Mb74-WY2atFPiZx_Ii4Jmc9VYr6Yq1r6eglbE57&c=7vhBJ-Pq5Lapp4qXYMaILkaTqV6n04YJtM8n3Q9gs50RtgeR5fCYng==&ch=nzqiCvbPCzGeP12_ckOnCRDGt6ytvyukXweZkoIm2cIg8QYz5n4D1A==)
---
And what did she do just last year?
"I'll be the first member of Congress to offer them a guided tour in the Capitol tonight," said Lauren Boebert of pardoned Jan 6 offenders. "If there's another regret, I'm sure it's only on the Democrats who are regretting that they didn't just shut up because now they're finding out."
We are talking about people who brought zip ties and built gallows and hunted the Congresswoman's colleagues, and those who injured 150 law enforcement officers.
Capitol Hill Police Officer Brian Sicknick was an Air Force Veteran. He was pepper sprayed, suffocated, suffering multiple strokes and died a day later. Is it radical to suggest those responsible should not be pardoned and treated as heroes? And now, unfortunately, unless we can prevent it, the next January 6th might be weeks away and Boebert is once again leading the charge...
In 2020 Lauren Boebert worked with Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters to breach the election computers and then illegally publish stolen voter machine data. Peters was ultimately convicted for these crimes.
Despite President Trump's pardon and push to release Peters, CO's governor is refusing to release her, causing MAGA to threaten violence.
On January 31, 2026, MAGA extremists led by Jake Lang, a white nationalist and convicted January 6th rioter, are threatening to violently break Peters out of the Colorado jail where she is being held.
Boebert's fingerprints are on every aspect of this saga and unfortunately our opportunities to take away the pulpit she uses to call for violence may soon run out...
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as the Democratic nominee facing her we had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
We accomplished this because of our economic populist platform and the work I've done as a science & tech civil servant and for America's labor movement fighting for working Colorado families. Now we are back to finish the job and we need an influx of support.
[Please can you make a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to help our campaign defeat Boebert and take away the podium that she is using to escalate American political violence and manifest the next January 6th?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EXV09sTfU07J8bKLb6r7tBTDF1wVpIHqpcLmkaAEJYPTO9EfjmFBUMHlUcwZD1Lt5pAE37sNfGYfLkAggDLZdmaR3s7lsicjSyndmb6Jn1Kcg4Pv5CRKIlJW7B7ztYn1nP_HAZtqdzLclfaAaS1qLr59M_RujXHUps4yv97qSqnO3U2q2MR7Z0oXkezE_ORKefWSkyuK3IL28zKhNxlwabTOX_vLUbjajfbOKxbl7TU=&c=7vhBJ-Pq5Lapp4qXYMaILkaTqV6n04YJtM8n3Q9gs50RtgeR5fCYng==&ch=nzqiCvbPCzGeP12_ckOnCRDGt6ytvyukXweZkoIm2cIg8QYz5n4D1A==)
---
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Could the next January 6th be weeks away with Boebert once again leading the charge? | | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | | == | Peter, Today marks five years since the attack on our U.S. Capitol on January 6th 2021. It was one of the darkest days for our democracy since the Civil War. My opponent Lauren Boebert gave reconnaissance tours to the people who would storm the Capitol, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. On the day of, she tweeted out the location of the U.S. Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob. | == And what did she do just last year? "I'll be the first member of Congress to offer them a guided tour in the Capitol tonight," said Lauren Boebert of pardoned Jan 6 offenders. "If there's another regret, I'm sure it's only on the Democrats who are regretting that they didn't just shut up because now they're finding out." We are talking about people who brought zip ties and built gallows and hunted the Congresswoman's colleagues, and those who injured 150 law enforcement officers. Capitol Hill Police Officer Brian Sicknick was an Air Force Veteran. He was pepper sprayed, suffocated, suffering multiple strokes and died a day later. Is it radical to suggest those responsible should not be pardoned and treated as heroes? And now, unfortunately, unless we can prevent it, the next January 6th might be weeks away and Boebert is once again leading the charge... In 2020 Lauren Boebert worked with Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters to breach the election computers and then illegally publish stolen voter machine data. Peters was ultimately convicted for these crimes. Despite President Trump's pardon and push to release Peters, CO's governor is refusing to release her, causing MAGA to threaten violence. On January 31, 2026, MAGA extremists led by Jake Lang, a white nationalist and convicted January 6th rioter, are threatening to violently break Peters out of the Colorado jail where she is being held. Boebert's fingerprints are on every aspect of this saga and unfortunately our opportunities to take away the pulpit she uses to call for violence may soon run out... Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, as the Democratic nominee facing her we had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county. We accomplished this because of our economic populist platform and the work I've done as a science & tech civil servant and for America's labor movement fighting for working Colorado families. Now we are back to finish the job and we need an influx of support. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Lauren Boebert must be stopped and with your support we can do it. Solidarity, Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | == | | | == Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado | | | | 9609 S University Blvd, | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Peter:
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
**[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Heartland Patriots and me so we can fight back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99076?refcode=em20260106-9911&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9911%2E614464%2EM4Oj1W)**

I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: On This Day - 5 Years Ago...
body:
Today is January 6, 2026. 5 years ago, GREAT Patriots peacefully gathered in DC in support of President Donald Trump to protest the 2020 Rigged Elect
| | |
---
Today is January 6, 2026. 5 years ago, GREAT Patriots peacefully gathered in DC in support of President Donald Trump to protest the 2020 Rigged Election which is now and indisputable and proven fact that Joe Biden did NOT receive 81 million votes. Unfortunately, this patriotic assembly was infiltrated by many undercover agents from corrupt intelligence agencies intending to cause organized chaos. This premeditated act led to the greatest persecution of America's finest people from January 2021 to November 2024. However, **WE PREVAILED!** We defeated big-tech censorship. We defeated law-fare. We defeated rigged elections. We defeated the media mafia. We must never forget what happened on January 6, 2021 so that we NEVER allow it to happen again in our country that is becoming GREAT once again. Continue to pray for President Trump, his administration and the United States of America. Thank you Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
