name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: five years ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Five years ago, a violent attack on our Capitol threatened the core of American democracy, reminding us of the urgent need to protect our institutions and uphold the will of the people.

The January 6th Insurrection at the US Capitol five years ago today is one of the ugliest stains on our democracy since the Civil War. I will never forget that dark day; putting on a gas mask and helping my vulnerable colleagues escape from a violent mob that the President himself unleashed on the Capitol in a desperate attempt to overthrow his loss in the 2020 Election.

That was an attempt to end American democracy. It was an attempt to turn towards authoritarianism, to disregard and disrespect the processes of our constitutional democracy.

And most dangerously, that spirit of lawlessness continues to threaten us today, reminding us that political violence and misinformation campaigns are ongoing threats to our democracy.

**It’s up to us to safeguard American democracy and the right of all Americans to choose their leaders. I will never stop fighting to protect and defend our Constitution. And I will never stop fighting to end political violence in this country once and for all.**

Together, we have a shared responsibility to ensure our government earns the respect of the people, that we uphold the rule of law above all, and that our elected officials truly reflect the will of the people.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight,

Josh
---
|
---

* * *
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. clean_body: | | Five years ago, a violent attack on our Capitol threatened the core of American democracy, reminding us of the urgent need to protect our institutions and uphold the will of the people. The January 6th Insurrection at the US Capitol five years ago today is one of the ugliest stains on our democracy since the Civil War. I will never forget that dark day; putting on a gas mask and helping my vulnerable colleagues escape from a violent mob that the President himself unleashed on the Capitol in a desperate attempt to overthrow his loss in the 2020 Election. That was an attempt to end American democracy. It was an attempt to turn towards authoritarianism, to disregard and disrespect the processes of our constitutional democracy. And most dangerously, that spirit of lawlessness continues to threaten us today, reminding us that political violence and misinformation campaigns are ongoing threats to our democracy. It’s up to us to safeguard American democracy and the right of all Americans to choose their leaders. I will never stop fighting to protect and defend our Constitution. And I will never stop fighting to end political violence in this country once and for all. Together, we have a shared responsibility to ensure our government earns the respect of the people, that we uphold the rule of law above all, and that our elected officials truly reflect the will of the people. Thank you for standing with me in this fight, Josh | * Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

name: VoteVets
subject: Helmand + Fallujah… Caracas + Tehran
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
These guys want to drag us into another era of forever wars that will leave our sons and daughters dead and maimed.
#
Peter, we planned to send something about January 6th today.
It’s been five years since Trump sent a mob of his supporters to the Capitol to steal an election. It’s a day we can never, ever forget.
But then, we saw this:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan26.F9DuEZ&refcode=em260106-1-160&t=1&akid=34862%2E3013755%2EBEWQ5o)
In case you can’t read it, that’s a picture of Lindsey Graham and Donald Trump on Air Force One yesterday. Trump’s holding a black “Make Iran Great Again” hat.
On that same flight, Lindsey Graham said, “You just wait for Cuba.”
These guys want to drag us into another era of forever wars that will leave our sons and daughters dead and maimed.
Trump told us he learned the lessons of Iraq and Afghanistan. He literally ran on getting us out of those wars, and promised his supporters he’d focus on home instead. He lied, just like he always does.
Guys like Lindsey Graham lied us into those wars in the first place. Our friends got blown up in Helmand, Fallujah, and a million other places we had never heard of. When we came back, when more of our friends started taking their own lives, guys like Graham tried to stop us from getting help. And now, he wants to send more kids off to die in Caracas, or Tehran.
But 20 years ago, literally to the day, we founded VoteVets.
We fought for health care, fought for counseling, fought for coverage when our friends started getting sick from burn pits — and we won.
We fought to get out of Iraq and Afghanistan — and we won.
We fought to get our voices in places of power — and we won (a lot).
And the path to stopping any more of these wars is the same as it always was: A sustained, nationwide, grassroots movement. After 20 years we know how to beat these guys, and we CAN beat these guys.
We can’t do it alone, though. So we’ve got a question: Are you with us?
[**If you’re still with us, chip in $20 for VoteVets’ 20th Anniversary.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/13843?c0=vv-pac-em-jan26.rFnf7I&refcode=em260106-1-160&t=2&akid=34862%2E3013755%2EBEWQ5o)
[**Or if that’s too much, chip in $5 for the 5th Anniversary of January 6th.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/4573?c0=vv-pac-em-jan26.miFS0g&refcode=em260106-1-160&t=3&akid=34862%2E3013755%2EBEWQ5o)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CHIP IN $20](https://act.votevets.org/go/13843?c0=vv-pac-em-jan26.rFnf7I&refcode=em260106-1-160&t=4&akid=34862%2E3013755%2EBEWQ5o)**
---
****
| **[CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/4573?c0=vv-pac-em-jan26.miFS0g&refcode=em260106-1-160&t=5&akid=34862%2E3013755%2EBEWQ5o)**
---
****
Now is no time to quit. Thank you in advance for your support.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running for Congress
body:
Peter,
I officially ended my campaign for U.S. Senate and filed to run for Congress in Texas’ 33rd Congressional District.
I didn’t come to this decision lightly – I’ve put everything I had into my Senate campaign over the last five months, traveling to every corner of the state, talking to as many Texans as I could, building on the incredible grassroots campaign we started last year.
While it was clear that many Texans were ready to support me to the end, it was also clear that the Democratic primary would end up in a bruising and costly runoff in May. And if we want to prevent another MAGA loyalist from representing our state for six more years, that’s simply a risk we can’t afford to take.
So, today I am announcing my campaign to represent the newly drawn 33rd district in Texas. If you’d still like to see me head to Washington in November, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Real Texas to get my new campaign off to a strong start today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=122625_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Colin Allred and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=122625_2&amount=25]
District 33 was racially gerrymandered by Republicans in an effort to further rig our democracy, but it’s still the community where I grew up attending public schools and watching my mom struggle to pay for our groceries. It’s the community where Aly and I are raising our two boys. It is my home.
The threats that our democracy and our way of living are facing right now are real. It’s harder than ever for kids like me to get a shot, and for single moms like mine to afford their basic needs. But I am more confident than I have ever been that together, we can beat these threats. That’s why I am humbly asking for your help to return to Congress to fight for North Texans, our democracy, and the American Dream.
If you can, please split a donation of a few bucks between my campaign and Real Texas to help me get started. Thank you for reading, and for all of your continued support as we fight to get Texas representation we can be proud of. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=122625_2]
Colin Allred

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. name: James O'Keefe
subject: The investigations that made them sweat in 2025
body:
I shared the numbers. Today I want to share the stories. Because behind every statistic is a corrupt official who thought they'd never be caught.

Dear Friend,
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGuniAQhZ8Gd_6BAeHeBYsmxt3ttkszwqikAkbQpm_faPNvuutyzvnmZE7mx9f4hWELafmOkay7wniUsa4U0kWlhgVryKnUFWtETyNw0C0XLdc3JxpvndcSGrLCaGNAdCCa1XqSnCZNk9cfinfGSylxnlHDp3KzMU2wdxIXXAujOvH5wg8nlIJJy8koDTNT_Nw9Viovl1Oh48IaLgop5eu56eVybDa71roXJr8xGBgMhdx50AsT-VxvgsGQfxLNFMkHXI587rcUlxY4dK1qPf4ubZzaPe_I5HDWOJZ8Ho6Y7P_BGOjbvpPOyGT_rPzVHMYdw5KY7N-93k5OlVJlsndXYKAx5vMZoWsO6_dfYdtC0YYpvkQM21Or_v8jLgt_AgAA__9aAZb6) Yesterday I shared the numbers. Today I want to share the stories. Because behind every statistic is a corrupt official who thought they'd never be caught. A bureaucrat who assumed no one was watching. An institution that believed it was above accountability. **They were wrong. And we have the footage to prove it.** Here are five investigations from 2025 that changed the game:
* **1\. THE $100 BILLION FEDERAL CONTRACTING SCAM (October)**
* We exposed ATI Government Solutions exploiting the SBA's 8(a) minority contracting program -- outsourcing 80% of their work while pocketing over $100 million in no-bid contracts. This wasn't a one-off. It was a systemic scheme across multiple agencies.
* **THE RESULT:** SBA suspension. $253 million in contracts halted. A $9 billion Treasury Department audit. Seven additional companies suspended. And a 15-year review of 8(a) contracts across every federal agency.
* **2\. GAO DATA THEFT CONFESSION (November)**
* A GAO director admitted on hidden camera that staff "stole and backed up" vaccine data specifically to block RFK Jr.'s HHS reforms. They weren't just resisting policy -- they were breaking federal law.
* **THE RESULT:** The director's profile was scrubbed. A federal investigation was launched. And the nation finally saw what "deep state resistance" actually looks like.
* **3\. NIH PORTRAIT DESTRUCTION (December)**
* NIH contractor Joseph Olmert confessed on camera to destroying official portraits of President Trump, Vice President Vance, RFK Jr., and Dr. Jay Bhattacharya. That's a potential 10-year federal felony -- destruction of government property.
* **THE RESULT:** Contractor FIRED. NIH internal investigation launched. And a national conversation about the defiance embedded in our federal agencies.
* **4\. GEORGETOWN PROFESSOR EXPOSED (December)**
* We caught a Georgetown professor on hidden camera calling Black conservatives "coons" and mocking "stupid white people." When we confronted him, he tried to assault our cameraman. Police were called.
* **THE RESULT:** Georgetown wiped his bio from their website. The footage went viral -- over 2 million views. And elite academic bias was laid bare for all to see.
* **5\. INSIDE EPSTEIN'S ISLAND (May-December)**
* We released the first-ever footage from inside Jeffrey Epstein's private island mansion. We confronted a DOJ Deputy Chief who admitted plans to redact Republicans from the Epstein files. We published unredacted photos that Democrats tried to hide.
* **THE RESULT:** DOJ was forced to respond. Media outlets issued corrections. Joe Rogan covered our findings. And the truth about elite corruption reached millions who had been kept in the dark.

_This is what your support produces._ Not theories. Not speculation. **Results.** We're now at **$81,000 raised** -- just **$19,000 away** from hitting our $100,000 goal. [**Every dollar you give is still matched.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGuniAQhZ8Gd_6BAeHeBYsmxt3ttkszwqikAkbQpm_faPNvuutyzvnmZE7mx9f4hWELafmOkay7wniUsa4U0kWlhgVryKnUFWtETyNw0C0XLdc3JxpvndcSGrLCaGNAdCCa1XqSnCZNk9cfinfGSylxnlHDp3KzMU2wdxIXXAujOvH5wg8nlIJJy8koDTNT_Nw9Viovl1Oh48IaLgop5eu56eVybDa71roXJr8xGBgMhdx50AsT-VxvgsGQfxLNFMkHXI587rcUlxY4dK1qPf4ubZzaPe_I5HDWOJZ8Ho6Y7P_BGOjbvpPOyGT_rPzVHMYdw5KY7N-93k5OlVJlsndXYKAx5vMZoWsO6_dfYdtC0YYpvkQM21Or_v8jLgt_AgAA__9aAZb6) And [**every donor**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGuniAQhZ8Gd_6BAeHeBYsmxt3ttkszwqikAkbQpm_faPNvuutyzvnmZE7mx9f4hWELafmOkay7wniUsa4U0kWlhgVryKnUFWtETyNw0C0XLdc3JxpvndcSGrLCaGNAdCCa1XqSnCZNk9cfinfGSylxnlHDp3KzMU2wdxIXXAujOvH5wg8nlIJJy8koDTNT_Nw9Viovl1Oh48IaLgop5eu56eVybDa71roXJr8xGBgMhdx50AsT-VxvgsGQfxLNFMkHXI587rcUlxY4dK1qPf4ubZzaPe_I5HDWOJZ8Ho6Y7P_BGOjbvpPOyGT_rPzVHMYdw5KY7N-93k5OlVJlsndXYKAx5vMZoWsO6_dfYdtC0YYpvkQM21Or_v8jLgt_AgAA__9aAZb6) receives our exclusive 2025 Year-End Review. **SPECIAL DONOR THANK-YOU GIFTS:**
* **$100+:** Hardcover copy of _American Pravda_

Dear Friend, Yesterday I shared the numbers. Today I want to share the stories. Because behind every statistic is a corrupt official who thought they'd never be caught. A bureaucrat who assumed no one was watching. An institution that believed it was above accountability. They were wrong. And we have the footage to prove it. Here are five investigations from 2025 that changed the game: 1\. THE $100 BILLION FEDERAL CONTRACTING SCAM (October) We exposed ATI Government Solutions exploiting the SBA's 8(a) minority contracting program -- outsourcing 80% of their work while pocketing over $100 million in no-bid contracts. This wasn't a one-off. It was a systemic scheme across multiple agencies. THE RESULT: SBA suspension. $253 million in contracts halted. A $9 billion Treasury Department audit. Seven additional companies suspended. And a 15-year review of 8(a) contracts across every federal agency. 2\. GAO DATA THEFT CONFESSION (November) A GAO director admitted on hidden camera that staff "stole and backed up" vaccine data specifically to block RFK Jr.'s HHS reforms. They weren't just resisting policy -- they were breaking federal law. THE RESULT: The director's profile was scrubbed. A federal investigation was launched. And the nation finally saw what "deep state resistance" actually looks like. 3\. NIH PORTRAIT DESTRUCTION (December) NIH contractor Joseph Olmert confessed on camera to destroying official portraits of President Trump, Vice President Vance, RFK Jr., and Dr. Jay Bhattacharya. That's a potential 10-year federal felony -- destruction of government property. THE RESULT: Contractor FIRED. NIH internal investigation launched. And a national conversation about the defiance embedded in our federal agencies. 4\. GEORGETOWN PROFESSOR EXPOSED (December) We caught a Georgetown professor on hidden camera calling Black conservatives "coons" and mocking "stupid white people." When we confronted him, he tried to assault our cameraman. Police were called. THE RESULT: Georgetown wiped his bio from their website. The footage went viral -- over 2 million views. And elite academic bias was laid bare for all to see. 5\. INSIDE EPSTEIN'S ISLAND (May-December) We released the first-ever footage from inside Jeffrey Epstein's private island mansion. We confronted a DOJ Deputy Chief who admitted plans to redact Republicans from the Epstein files. We published unredacted photos that Democrats tried to hide. THE RESULT: DOJ was forced to respond. Media outlets issued corrections. Joe Rogan covered our findings. And the truth about elite corruption reached millions who had been kept in the dark. This is what your support produces. body:
I served on the original January 6th Committee — and I won’t stay silent now.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122792114/593467816/-1463031945?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-01-06_J6I_J6C_ES-37810&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWUxZjE3Mi0yN2ViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Klm3-4cVY9bM8dXz8XHnbTB6YuSkl5E1S1ueDXB6Vk4=)

| | Dear Peter,Five years ago today, our democracy was attacked when violent insurrectionists stormed the Capitol.

I served on the original January 6th Committee to uncover what truly happened that painful day, and I saw firsthand the evidence, the testimony, and the truth: Donald Trump incited the insurrection in a desperate attempt to cling to power.

That committee produced an 800+ page report laying out exactly what happened and who was responsible.

On fifth anniversary of the attack, I’m taking a moment to reflect on what we accomplished, and I’m grateful for my colleagues on the committee: Democrats Bennie Thompson, Adam Schiff, Pete Aguilar, Stephanie Murphy, Jamie Raskin, Elaine Luria; and two brave Republicans, Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger.

But now, Republicans are trying to make a mockery of our work. They’ve launched a sham, partisan “re-investigation” designed to whitewash history, attack witnesses, and shield Trump from facing the consequences of his actions.

I won’t allow them to get away with this, Peter. I will always fight to defend the truth, uphold the Constitution, and ensure that January 6th is never minimized, rewritten, or forgotten.

But in order to hold Republicans accountable, Democrats must retake the House and stop Trump’s trifecta.

**So on this solemn anniversary, I’m asking you to stand with me.__**[**_Will you donate to my re-election campaign and help elect Democrats who will defend our democracy along with me?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122792115/593467817/-1463031945?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-01-06_J6I_J6C_ES-37810&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWUxZjE3Mi0yN2ViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Klm3-4cVY9bM8dXz8XHnbTB6YuSkl5E1S1ueDXB6Vk4=)

clean_body: I served on the original January 6th Committee — and I won’t stay silent now.| | | = | | | Dear Peter,Five years ago today, our democracy was attacked when violent insurrectionists stormed the Capitol. I served on the original January 6th Committee to uncover what truly happened that painful day, and I saw firsthand the evidence, the testimony, and the truth: Donald Trump incited the insurrection in a desperate attempt to cling to power. That committee produced an 800+ page report laying out exactly what happened and who was responsible. On fifth anniversary of the attack, I’m taking a moment to reflect on what we accomplished, and I’m grateful for my colleagues on the committee: Democrats Bennie Thompson, Adam Schiff, Pete Aguilar, Stephanie Murphy, Jamie Raskin, Elaine Luria; and two brave Republicans, Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger. But now, Republicans are trying to make a mockery of our work. They’ve launched a sham, partisan “re-investigation” designed to whitewash history, attack witnesses, and shield Trump from facing the consequences of his actions. I won’t allow them to get away with this, Peter. I will always fight to defend the truth, uphold the Constitution, and ensure that January 6th is never minimized, rewritten, or forgotten. But in order to hold Republicans accountable, Democrats must retake the House and stop Trump’s trifecta. So on this solemn anniversary, I’m asking you to stand with me.= | | If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me and for believing in this work. Zoe Lofgren | | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. body:
The stakes of Wisconsin’s judicial elections are enormous, and powerful interests know it.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260106-992&t=1&akid=993%2E294397%2ELL9_v2)
Nine-figure judicial election spending wasn’t always the norm.
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260106_1_ak.QDgEYo&amount=10&refcode=em20260106-992&t=3&akid=993%2E294397%2ELL9_v2)
But last year, more than **$140 million** was spent on the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. If you’re asking yourself, “Why?” here’s the truth:
**The stakes of Wisconsin’s judicial elections are enormous, and powerful interests know it.**
Elon Musk said the _“destiny of humanity”_ rested on what happened during last year’s Wisconsin Supreme Court election. That’s why he personally dumped over $30 million in our state to try to tip the scales in his favor.
Far-right billionaires like Elon Musk have already shown they’re willing to pour unimaginable amounts of cash into these races to install extreme justices who will protect their agenda.
And now that we’re just three months out from Election Day, we know what’s coming next.
The floodgates are about to open again.
The only way to beat that kind of money is by building a campaign funded by thousands of people pitching in what they can. **That’s where you come in.**
[**If you’re able, will you chip in today to help us elect Judge Chris Taylor and stand up to far-right billionaire interference?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260106_1_ak.QDgEYo&amount=10&refcode=em20260106-992&t=4&akid=993%2E294397%2ELL9_v2)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots. Real machines — walking, turning, and working on the floor of what will become America’s first large-scale humanoid production line.

This isn’t decades away. Foxconn plans to begin production in 2026 — right here in the U.S. — rolling out two advanced models that could replace millions of workers.

Even President Trump, speaking at a recent rally, said: “We have to be very careful with where this is going.” But Washington is already betting big... and cutting contracts.

The real winners? Not the robot brands... but the 3 little-known companies supplying the hardware, chips, and systems for every AI humanoid built. These plays could move before the first Houston robots even ship.

If you wait for mainstream coverage, you’ll be too late.

clean_body: Washington didn’t expect this footage to go public. Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Washington didn’t expect this footage to go public. | Inside Foxconn’s massive new facility in Houston, cameras captured NVIDIA’s CEO standing shoulder-to-shoulder with humanoid robots. Real machines — walking, turning, and working on the floor of what will become America’s first large-scale humanoid production line. This isn’t decades away. Foxconn plans to begin production in 2026 — right here in the U.S. — rolling out two advanced models that could replace millions of workers. Even President Trump, speaking at a recent rally, said: “We have to be very careful with where this is going.” But Washington is already betting big... and cutting contracts. The real winners? Not the robot brands... but the 3 little-known companies supplying the hardware, chips, and systems for every AI humanoid built. These plays could move before the first Houston robots even ship. name: Steve Mietz
subject: A thank you from the forests of the future
body:
savetheredwoods.org [savetheredwoods.org]
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf]
Peter,
Happy New Year! Together, we begin the new year with an act of hope for the redwood range.
I want to extend my heartfelt thanks for all that you made possible through the Redwood Resilience Fund. Because of your support, we’re entering 2026 with renewed strength, focus, and hope for these extraordinary forests and the communities connected to them.
You are part of a community that has repeatedly shown up in remarkable ways for the redwood forests. Your interest and engagement help to carry this positive momentum into the future. It’s not too late to invest by making a gift to the Redwood Resilience Fund. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf] Across the redwood range, your impact is already taking root. Together, we are helping forests adapt to a rapidly changing climate, giving endangered species a better chance to thrive, and expanding access to nature for all people.
As history reminds us, it is in times of great uncertainty and great change that positive actions matter most. You are helping to make those actions possible.
Photo of Laura Lalemand [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/STRWL/STRWL/1/89574/images/Steve_Mietz_069-web-squared%201.png] With gratitude,
Steve Mietz
President and CEO
Save the Redwoods League
Help restore and protect the redwoods

Look, being a former Republican isn’t my whole story.

My mother immigrated from the Philippines as an organic chemist. I followed in her footsteps and majored in biochemistry before I went to Law School to pursue my true passion – Constitutional Law.

**Looking back, the Constitution was my first love.** At 10, I was obsessed with the Watergate Scandal. _(Little did I know that was child's play compared to what Trump would do)_.

I know that sounds boring and nerdy, but the promise of our democracy, freedoms, and the rule of law fascinates me – and for years I _thought_ Republicans upheld those same ideals.

**I was so wrong.** When I finally got a peek under the hood and saw what these lying, sleazebag, horrible MAGA loyalists were doing to our country, I couldn’t stomach it.

Let me be straight with you: **Republicans are failing America, and as someone who’s been fighting Trump for years, I know exactly how to stop them.**

It requires not running the same plays, election after election, hoping we’ll see different results. It means being bold and not afraid to fight fire with fire – like I’ve been doing at the cost of my career and reputation.

Look, Democrats’ success last November proved there’s hope. Trump may think he’s a king on a throne, but his wannabe dictatorship is built on a house of cards, and we are _this close_ to toppling it.

If we can take back Congress for Democrats, we can cut Trump’s MAGA agenda off at the knees. **To do it, we need a fearless candidate who knows what makes the MAGA machine tick, and who can rewrite the playbook and WIN.**
**[_That’s why I’m running. I’ve seen firsthand the devastation wrought by the selfishness and narcissism of Trump’s MAGA regime. We cannot let this be our future. |
---
| |
# Share Your Story: Join the DNC’s Storytellers Network
---
| |
We’re inviting you or members of your community to [join the DNC’s Storytellers Network](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=72347f977b&e=d6c5c7d7ec), a new effort to elevate real experiences from working people and ensure our message reflects the lives we’re fighting for.
**ABOUT THE INITIATIVE** : We’re building a national network of storytellers whose lived experiences, on housing, health care, food costs, jobs, and dignity, help shape how Democrats communicate and organize. These voices will guide our work and strengthen our narrative heading into 2026 and 2028.
---
| [SIGN UP HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d3c1e1239c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| |
**WHAT TO EXPECT** : Storytellers may be featured in written content, digital videos, press opportunities, or events, and can participate in optional training such as:
* Media 101: Framing for Impact
* Storytelling for Social Media
* Digital Safety & Accessibility

**SHARE YOUR STORY** : If you or someone you know has a story that reflects the challenges and resilience of America’s working people, please fill out the form.

Here are examples of the work we can do together:

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Share Your Story: Join the DNC’s Storytellers Network | | We’re inviting you or members of your community to , a new effort to elevate real experiences from working people and ensure our message reflects the lives we’re fighting for. ABOUT THE INITIATIVE : We’re building a national network of storytellers whose lived experiences, on housing, health care, food costs, jobs, and dignity, help shape how Democrats communicate and organize. These voices will guide our work and strengthen our narrative heading into 2026 and 2028. | | | | WHAT TO EXPECT : Storytellers may be featured in written content, digital videos, press opportunities, or events, and can participate in optional training such as: Media 101: Framing for Impact Storytelling for Social Media Digital Safety & Accessibility SHARE YOUR STORY : If you or someone you know has a story that reflects the challenges and resilience of America’s working people, please fill out the form. Here are examples of the work we can do together: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 * USA or |

name: Christina Hines
subject: January 6th still matters

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260106_januarysixth_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260106_januarysixth_act]
Five years ago, a mob stormed the Capitol to overturn the 2020 election in the name of Donald Trump. It was hours before Trump did anything to quell the violence.
This wasn’t just a fluke. It was the end result of a party that protects corruption and lawlessness at the expense of the American people.
Those same forces are still in charge, and they’re preparing to spend whatever it takes to keep this district red because they can’t afford to have a prosecutor with a record of taking on the powerful in Congress.
The only way we beat them is by remembering what’s at stake, and preparing NOW for the election in November. If you can, chip in $25 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260106_januarysixth_act&amount=25]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122793556/593473167/336227065?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODhhMjk4Zi0yOWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPXk4fEby_FVa6U5lDR-ajBxeCNVwH4eklPotiXiYiU=)
Peter:

Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.

I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.

My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.

You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.

If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.

**[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between George Whitesides and me so we can fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122793557/593473200/-156466199?refcode=em-1.6.26-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODhhMjk4Zi0yOWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NPXk4fEby_FVa6U5lDR-ajBxeCNVwH4eklPotiXiYiU=)**

body:
MAGA leadership is impressed with you, Peter

Peter,

This is for **YOUR** eyes only.

MAGA leadership is so impressed with your answers from our previous poll, that YOU have been selected for a private follow-up poll.

You can’t claim to stand for democracy while undermining elections.
You can’t claim to stand for working people while trying to throw out their votes.
And you can’t lower costs or make real progress for working families without a democracy people can actually trust.
We need people in Congress with guts and a conscience – who defend the rule of law, fight for working families, and make sure democracy delivers for people.
Bob

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Hegseth’s threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
| | |
---
Team,
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
**_[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Jacky Rosen and me so we can fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122794755/593476967/-1087597766?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5682-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVlNjVmMS0yYWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BB0CAUulRr7iUYUhm3Is8v_huZa-LhDiX671nu6tg7o=)_**

He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. = | | = Don’t give up the ship. Mark | *

body:

---

[**MESSAGE FROM NAVY SEALS TIM SHEEHY, ELI CRANE, & RYAN ZINKE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=27a33a5a88cb487ca6dde033c1dc16f4&_e=-VkCr3Wt12k9YKL4R_DzaZFGQfjLRwiJmVE_X6MPGlc_awYaDPPMF0Udh_e9L-WyrgHpdy9o9U7EIC3bxK2icFOQ6DJ86lUdYcqmPR4ef1s8GGbmZ6mMFKAnViKqvDsUpAa-B1T4C5Foh9s573c7DF1TMG6j228rZ00D18Nenb6YGHg_wIwiUbj0tHwASm72URpsr85RMZKhJ6nw2w3aqQKy10nl1umHp-xDdGSSkNKoyGF61J2yy-CsAvUB2FkapXxf4DB-aaIQy0zfFGXrrdBfCwm5_xmaOBNhSooe3GPBCqDGz6VCddnUYUKps--lg3iLI142h2eWrNOfFyRgkQ0vs-RUpeurbEELR7qg9hRsuDx2j65QqqU_VWyDpywE8PIrQbnu_kPsLpXi0fY-GkREvqexafQpcM_C4cj1L7AL9yGbFEczBk2EFz8_OyewzCxEn2mL9UzS34QZj18a8AEa28WqjVydeoxhqPep8EgZnOKPP0-IY3OkRun0ifNymZV5m4WlsRp01Y-Rc0RnDCovSqbun9IDX_yiqsbeDqMyrS9lrZ_dBQs6u4EhdioHCUY-iVNMsCu-Z2pUn46iwyN6LF1QhUI1Qc9Jt1SWucR_MAkn_WHTxaE2j6K2-PfX_x0jH0QF_JU1ju0Jj9AURlbndzERAI8Ov_0r6pq5jejJQPMgPfk2TMfxVvhxR9fbY9w3xStUuNn-YmY-NQa8oQ%3D%3D)
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=27a33a5a88cb487ca6dde033c1dc16f4&_e=-VkCr3Wt12k9YKL4R_DzaZFGQfjLRwiJmVE_X6MPGlc_awYaDPPMF0Udh_e9L-WyrgHpdy9o9U7EIC3bxK2icFOQ6DJ86lUdYcqmPR4ef1s8GGbmZ6mMFKAnViKqvDsUpAa-B1T4C5Foh9s573c7DF1TMG6j228rZ00D18Nenb6YGHg_wIwiUbj0tHwASm72URpsr85RMZKhJ6nw2w3aqQKy10nl1umHp-xDdGSSkNKoyGF61J2yy-CsAvUB2FkakBpaBFvHYI0IZoxRy7hgm_hiBGXAchATGEWnWK66c0cwxUQhtstkTySCYO65n6GuRiTBfnTtEPOTQ1iam9R3hDew2jq0UBMDXnr_SH7P5OMpDcmdFIj8rNo0VUdo5iFKb4b1zYoUGFe-KctTG_B8Jzzbzg_hdaQvGbW58ePhDspAKxgNnIt8zkhFpoK8WzZ-XL_eXpnR-XQ7G7BY8Ww929lrOxz_gC9NPhrDsGjxYKLsh6Re5ndRUVmjYSXEL_7qn8klpBDs7clHFybqn47r1XOPN817vRp_6poyX_1Nn_efY4IXs2lCv2sTp22AfxkNLWiOiMNvlm1DjDYCqS6Rt2YyWYRm6EX8sOsz0sumw0uU-UCZhBC5XC-YbvjPtR-Lydx5bXSwPrVAEDN9RL-fqhyySUT_CQ456LLSVkutDZDGy0xfyaKnqNZTICLhWOvG6jltJg6K6PFwpeIYGtOlVg%3D%3D)

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=27a33a5a88cb487ca6dde033c1dc16f4&_e=-VkCr3Wt12k9YKL4R_DzaZFGQfjLRwiJmVE_X6MPGlc_awYaDPPMF0Udh_e9L-Wy2ny7G5GeU5j6OOpdnhhBEPsej9CqGBHAU7nJQEU5f55GNsRmji1amPc5sP_WANQdn9CuAjqAO7AB_9rIJlwGVY6I4bVSHcw4gmgJTpOTZfswHSJ8t-qyb0ox7btPxsw4-GfpuTiXKEO66JRbsHyVG1lbgF1VqvI4mX6_0zctIj-ZoTQ5vrHseWX9g2Wf2_wvtu7T8d0j__Bd7BAKZzLARvjLFy6EvDHok_1089jWWS1Y1dTuURtSmLxsZn1UfQmELgcI8kmsrDbGEayxo4RFrRANnAT4XIgK6L0XfRqU3QhnW4h9kl9zcDoFCma59jkXdvSF_3Gi3FEhwYCa1cK6xgKVPd6iygr6ZbFYdu16Nxv9b85L-J7xxsDsEfPw2frGa66icoYXij2PSfusx2r7s23NlE9HCdTpHP1WvLIHjdEgp70SqnSQCxPXlbHe8h6Zs-fqu4j3xCBT7RzxvJV6rAqkMvvyvbxDdjwVpZfzZ2So0e5dx5vbNu0XC3MHNsLJYBbQtlQjusQgCDD48hovrkFrK2CZcOaEK9WXenvZgiRDOS0c33MF7oP0LGrlK5-qrCgGCBNsZYyJCxkugC8MhNiaLR-TJL7Yr0txb7i4GdSh4UEy-i6jkoXP3BoUR-HLvXlPZE7xwprX6ZuB7jFFJg%3D%3D)

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: My promise to you in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Happy New Year!

I hope you enjoyed quality time with your loved ones during the holiday season. I’m feeling particularly grateful as we begin the new year.

With your help in December, we met our end-of-year fundraising goal -- better equipping us for the challenges of the midterm election year. I can’t thank you enough for your continued support.

I want you to know that in 2026, I’m not giving up defending our communities from Donald Trump. I’ve stood up to him before, and I’m not stopping now.

I fought when he tried to gut Social Security. I fought when he cut healthcare, Medicaid, and SNAP while giving his billionaire donors tax breaks. And with the continued corruption and attacks on our democracy, the fight continues.

The stakes truly couldn’t be higher, and Election Day is closer than it appears -- primary day in Illinois is a little over two months away.

So as we look forward, I hope you’ll continue to have my back. I’ll always fight for Central and Southern Illinois, no matter the attacks that come my way.

Thank you,

Nikki

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q1-2026?refcode=em-1.6.26-all-b

https://www.facebook.com/NikkiforCongress/?
https://www.instagram.com/nikkibudzinski/?

# Trump vow sparks oil stock surge
U.S. **[oil stocks rallied sharply](https://substack.com/redirect/d1a333f3-7ae8-4402-ac6e-fd1e9f720c70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday, led by Chevron's biggest gain since April, after President Donald Trump pledged to have American companies invest billions to revive Venezuela's battered energy sector following Nicolas Maduro's weekend capture.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1a333f3-7ae8-4402-ac6e-fd1e9f720c70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Chevron leads gains** : Shares surged as much as 6.3%, positioning it to benefit immediately from expanded access to Venezuela's vast crude reserves as the only U.S. major still operating there.
* **Broader sector rally** : ConocoPhillips and Exxon Mobil rose alongside oil-service giants Halliburton, SLB, and Baker Hughes, all jumping more than 5%.
* **Canadian stocks decline** : Heavy crude producers like Canadian Natural Resources, Cenovus Energy, and Suncor fell as Venezuelan supply could compete with their output for U.S. Gulf Coast refineries.
* **Revival challenges ahead** : Experts estimate rebuilding Venezuela's corrupted and underinvested infrastructure could take years and cost over $100 billion despite Trump's optimistic pledge.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/ea7290bb-9a9e-4348-a839-dd79cb7b9230?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Trump wins global tax exemption for US giants
Nearly 150 countries have finalized a revised Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development agreement exempting large U.S. multinational corporations like Apple and Nike from **[a 15% global minimum tax,](https://substack.com/redirect/66a4b814-9840-4287-91b4-9d60b33bb8dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** following successful negotiations by President Donald Trump's administration to protect American businesses from overseas taxation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/66a4b814-9840-4287-91b4-9d60b33bb8dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Landmark OECD Praise** : Secretary-General Mathias Cormann hailed the deal as enhancing tax certainty, reducing complexity, and protecting national tax bases worldwide.
* **US Treasury Victory** : Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent described the exemption as a historic win preserving U.S. sovereignty and shielding workers from foreign overreach.
* **Critics Slam Rollback** : Tax transparency groups argue the changes undermine a decade of progress, allowing profitable U.S. firms to continue shifting profits to tax havens.
* **Republican Applause Echoes** : Congressional leaders celebrated the move as putting America first, reversing what they called the Biden administration's global tax surrender.

* * *
* * *
# **Morgan Stanley storms crypto ETF arena**
Morgan Stanley became the **[first major U.S. bank to seek regulatory approval](https://substack.com/redirect/84df755f-950c-44a4-95c2-935b79e335e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for spot exchange-traded funds tracking bitcoin and solana prices, filing with the SEC on Tuesday amid growing regulatory clarity under President Trump that is pushing traditional finance deeper into digital assets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/84df755f-950c-44a4-95c2-935b79e335e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Regulatory clarity fuels** mainstream adoption of cryptocurrencies once viewed as speculative.
* **Banks evolving roles** from mere custodians to active advisers in crypto investments.
* **ETFs offer advantages** like better liquidity, security, and easier compliance over direct holdings.
* **Prior expansions signal** Morgan Stanley's push, including broader client crypto access last October.

* * *
* * *
# **Burry 's Venezuela oil bet pays off big**
Michael Burry, the investor famed for predicting the 2008 housing crash, is seeing his **[years-long wager on Valero Energy surge](https://substack.com/redirect/6b2435d2-2229-40b1-8848-896b4e627e3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after the overthrow of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and President Trump's call for U.S. firms to revive the nation's vast oil industry.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6b2435d2-2229-40b1-8848-896b4e627e3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Long-Held Valero Stake** : Burry has owned shares in refiner Valero Energy since 2020, now more committed to holding amid improved prospects for processing optimal Venezuelan heavy crude.
* **Gulf Coast Refining Edge** : Many U.S. Gulf refineries, including Valero's, were built for Venezuela's heavy, sulfur-laden oil, promising better margins in jet fuel, diesel and asphalt as suboptimal feedstocks are replaced.
* **Infrastructure Rehab Opportunities** : Venezuela's deteriorated pipelines and refineries create demand for U.S. contractors like Halliburton, which Burry owns and may expand, plus Schlumberger and Baker Hughes.
* **Gradual Market Impact Ahead** : While meaningful Venezuelan export recovery could take years, even incremental supply boosts smaller refiners like PBF Energy and HF Sinclair, with Valero shares jumping 10% on the news.

* * *
* * *
# **GM surges ahead in US auto sales, Jeep turns the corner**
General Motors **[reported a robust 5.5% increase](https://substack.com/redirect/54066dee-b16c-4b99-9117-298a788d9522?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in U.S. vehicle sales for 2025, topping 2.85 million units to remain the nation's top automaker, while Stellantis' Jeep brand snapped a multi-year slump with its first annual gain since 2018.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54066dee-b16c-4b99-9117-298a788d9522?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **EV sales soar dramatically:** GM boosted electric vehicle deliveries by 48%, securing the No. 2 spot behind Tesla in the all-electric segment.
* **Market share climbs steadily:** GM expanded its U.S. market share by half a percentage point to 17%, outperforming a modest 2% industry growth to 16.3 million vehicles.
* **Jeep reverses long decline:** Stellantis saw overall U.S. sales drop 3.3%, but Jeep posted a slight increase of less than 1%, its first yearly rise in seven years.
* **Rivals post strong gains:** Toyota sales jumped 8%, while Hyundai and Kia achieved record highs with 8.4% and 7% increases, respectively, in a competitive mark

# Ford surges to best sales since 2019
Ford Motor **[reported a 6% increase](https://substack.com/redirect/a4545fcd-0e78-4e80-afaf-10f089267d2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in U.S. vehicle sales for 2025, reaching 2.2 million units and marking the Detroit automaker's strongest annual performance since 2019, fueled by strong demand for trucks and hybrids amid a cooling EV market.
* **F-Series dominates trucks** with 8.3% sales growth, securing its 49th straight year as America's best-selling truck line despite a fourth-quarter dip.
* **Hybrids hit record highs** surging nearly 22% to over 228,000 units, offsetting losses and positioning Ford for continued growth in electrified options.
* **EV sales sharply decline** dropping 14.1% overall and 52% in the fourth quarter, reflecting broader industry slowdown in battery-electric vehicles.
* **Market position strengthens further** with Ford claiming third place behind Toyota and GM while outperforming the industry's roughly 2% growth rate.

* * *
* * *
# **AI godfather slams young Meta AI boss**
Yann LeCun, the acclaimed "godfather of AI" who recently departed Meta, has **[sharply criticized](https://substack.com/redirect/072d093d-e886-41a9-b128-eaf921104e77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the company's 29-year-old chief AI officer Alexandr Wang as "young and inexperienced" in leading research efforts, warning of an impending staff exodus.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/072d093d-e886-41a9-b128-eaf921104e77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **LeCun questions Wang 's aptitude: **LeCun highlighted Wang's lack of research experience, noting it could repel top talent unfamiliar with what motivates researchers.
* **Exodus looms at Meta:** The former chief AI scientist predicted many researchers have already left and more will follow due to shifts in strategy under CEO Mark Zuckerberg.
* **LLMs declared dead end:** LeCun argued large language models are fundamentally limited for achieving superintelligence, advocating instead for "world models" based on video and physical data.
* **New venture pursues alternatives:** After quitting Meta in November 2025, LeCun launched a startup focused on advanced machine intelligence through world models, contrasting Meta's current direction.

* * *

clean_body: Companies eye massive opportunities in emerging Venezuela market | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Companies eye massive opportunities in emerging Venezuela market | | | Jan 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Oil companies surge after Maduro overthrow Trump and Bessent score huge US win over global tax rate Morgan Stanley charges ahead with Spot Crypto ETFs Michael Burry scores big with his long Venezuela bet GM, Ford and even Jeep roar ahead in auto sales Godfather of Ai slams Meta's "young and inexperienced" AI Research head Today 's markets + assets: ✅ DOW: 49428.14 (⬆️ 0.92%) ✅ S&P: 6937.16 (⬆️ 0.51%) ✅ NASDAQ: 23509.41 (⬆️ 00.49%) ⚠ ️🔴CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 14.82 (⬇️ 0.54%) ✅ Gold: $4498.50 (⬆️ 1.07%) ✅ Silver: $81.28 (⬆️ 6.08%) 🔴 Bitcoin: $91787.48 (⬇️ 2.66%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism Trump vow sparks oil stock surge U.S. Monday, led by Chevron's biggest gain since April, after President Donald Trump pledged to have American companies invest billions to revive Venezuela's battered energy sector following Nicolas Maduro's weekend capture. | | ---|---|--- Chevron leads gains : Shares surged as much as 6.3%, positioning it to benefit immediately from expanded access to Venezuela's vast crude reserves as the only U.S. major still operating there. Broader sector rally : ConocoPhillips and Exxon Mobil rose alongside oil-service giants Halliburton, SLB, and Baker Hughes, all jumping more than 5%. Canadian stocks decline : Heavy crude producers like Canadian Natural Resources, Cenovus Energy, and Suncor fell as Venezuelan supply could compete with their output for U.S. Gulf Coast refineries. Revival challenges ahead : Experts estimate rebuilding Venezuela's corrupted and underinvested infrastructure could take years and cost over $100 billion despite Trump's optimistic pledge. Dear truth-seeking American, This MAHA doctor's not only confirms the COVID pandemic was built on lies... | | ---|---|--- But he's holding undeniable proof the next "PLANDEMIC" is starting now. Before it comes for your family P.S. The new "Plandemic" will kill 600,000 mostly older Americans in 2026. Trump wins global tax exemption for US giants Nearly 150 countries have finalized a revised Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development agreement exempting large U.S. multinational corporations like Apple and Nike from following successful negotiations by President Donald Trump's administration to protect American businesses from overseas taxation. | | ---|---|--- Landmark OECD Praise : Secretary-General Mathias Cormann hailed the deal as enhancing tax certainty, reducing complexity, and protecting national tax bases worldwide. US Treasury Victory : Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent described the exemption as a historic win preserving U.S. sovereignty and shielding workers from foreign overreach. Critics Slam Rollback : Tax transparency groups argue the changes undermine a decade of progress, allowing profitable U.S. firms to continue shifting profits to tax havens. Republican Applause Echoes : Congressional leaders celebrated the move as putting America first, reversing what they called the Biden administration's global tax surrender. Morgan Stanley storms crypto ETF arena Morgan Stanley became the for spot exchange-traded funds tracking bitcoin and solana prices, filing with the SEC on Tuesday amid growing regulatory clarity under President Trump that is pushing traditional finance deeper into digital assets. | | ---|---|--- Regulatory clarity fuels mainstream adoption of cryptocurrencies once viewed as speculative. Banks evolving roles from mere custodians to active advisers in crypto investments. ETFs offer advantages like better liquidity, security, and easier compliance over direct holdings. Prior expansions signal Morgan Stanley's push, including broader client crypto access last October. Burry 's Venezuela oil bet pays off big Michael Burry, the investor famed for predicting the 2008 housing crash, is seeing his after the overthrow of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro and President Trump's call for U.S. firms to revive the nation's vast oil industry. | | ---|---|--- Long-Held Valero Stake : Burry has owned shares in refiner Valero Energy since 2020, now more committed to holding amid improved prospects for processing optimal Venezuelan heavy crude. Gulf Coast Refining Edge : Many U.S. Gulf refineries, including Valero's, were built for Venezuela's heavy, sulfur-laden oil, promising better margins in jet fuel, diesel and asphalt as suboptimal feedstocks are replaced. Infrastructure Rehab Opportunities : Venezuela's deteriorated pipelines and refineries create demand for U.S. contractors like Halliburton, which Burry owns and may expand, plus Schlumberger and Baker Hughes. Gradual Market Impact Ahead : While meaningful Venezuelan export recovery could take years, even incremental supply boosts smaller refiners like PBF Energy and HF Sinclair, with Valero shares jumping 10% on the news. GM surges ahead in US auto sales, Jeep turns the corner General Motors in U.S. vehicle sales for 2025, topping 2.85 million units to remain the nation's top automaker, while Stellantis' Jeep brand snapped a multi-year slump with its first annual gain since 2018. | | ---|---|--- EV sales soar dramatically: GM boosted electric vehicle deliveries by 48%, securing the No. 2 spot behind Tesla in the all-electric segment. Market share climbs steadily: GM expanded its U.S. market share by half a percentage point to 17%, outperforming a modest 2% industry growth to 16.3 million vehicles. Jeep reverses long decline: Stellantis saw overall U.S. sales drop 3.3%, but Jeep posted a slight increase of less than 1%, its first yearly rise in seven years. Rivals post strong gains: Toyota sales jumped 8%, while Hyundai and Kia achieved record highs with 8.4% and 7% increases, respectively, in a competitive mark Ford surges to best sales since 2019 Ford Motor in U.S. vehicle sales for 2025, reaching 2.2 million units and marking the Detroit automaker's strongest annual performance since 2019, fueled by strong demand for trucks and hybrids amid a cooling EV market. F-Series dominates trucks with 8.3% sales growth, securing its 49th straight year as America's best-selling truck line despite a fourth-quarter dip. Hybrids hit record highs surging nearly 22% to over 228,000 units, offsetting losses and positioning Ford for continued growth in electrified options. EV sales sharply decline dropping 14.1% overall and 52% in the fourth quarter, reflecting broader industry slowdown in battery-electric vehicles. Market position strengthens further with Ford claiming third place behind Toyota and GM while outperforming the industry's roughly 2% growth rate. AI godfather slams young Meta AI boss Yann LeCun, the acclaimed "godfather of AI" who recently departed Meta, has the company's 29-year-old chief AI officer Alexandr Wang as "young and inexperienced" in leading research efforts, warning of an impending staff exodus. | | ---|---|--- LeCun questions Wang 's aptitude: LeCun highlighted Wang's lack of research experience, noting it could repel top talent unfamiliar with what motivates researchers. Exodus looms at Meta: The former chief AI scientist predicted many researchers have already left and more will follow due to shifts in strategy under CEO Mark Zuckerberg. LLMs declared dead end: LeCun argued large language models are fundamentally limited for achieving superintelligence, advocating instead for "world models" based on video and physical data. New venture pursues alternatives: After quitting Meta in November 2025, LeCun launched a startup focused on advanced machine intelligence through world models, contrasting Meta's current direction. body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

Derek: Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. name: Ryan Crosswell
subject: It's been five years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CROSSWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9uwjeeRNOOYCfQSAbCY7meD6yra0Bb7ge8VBnBj8kdED7ypIhhiwq-Zf56IjJKroTlMBYWAbeovlRhnbkUXCh9E3NPVTYVJKvKLi50Hf3cXNKHTTc7fV-dJSXAqnJPY4BHQquWbNwgIFfjSZx35v5uZsykJnaIJfSCwo_WXmFia4b4HF78ixSo-x9T-dDy03tLzqvoCTGhXnsgfTVSRhQpjq8MK97Rnzq1xxmDxrPTLba7lsVR3euxp3Al8jUzsBs5XsCeBrInaKYEH6WE8kbpuRrQPez0vSO3GoVOht9S3EO0UavubHMNDc1cy_fWg5ciczO_Ggr47xtFmZni_VnLoWbCkooLtputWdXo91ty9ofpB3hJ2lo37QZkQL_Bu1Z/4n2/vLXLb3RASvGRakhO2Fy2HQ/h0/h001.9BYj25Qs290C4UN0Qcs4apGnRrXK6vqsmgqPxnUwSy0)

It's Ryan. Five years ago, we all watched in horror as a violent mob, fueled by a lie, stormed the Capitol in an attempt to overturn the will of the American people. But here’s the thing — the attack never really ended. Donald Trump’s lie never died. Once Trump returned to power last year, he pardoned the very insurrectionists who tried to overthrow our government. And Republicans in Congress like Ryan Mackenzie? They’ve fallen in line, rewriting history and sabotaging our institutions to pave the way for something like this to happen again. **That’s why I’m running to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th district.** My whole career has been about holding the powerful accountable. At the DOJ, I prosecuted corruption. But we’ve learned the hard way that the most dangerous corruption isn't always in a backroom — it’s on a podium, spreading lies. Now, I’m running to be Pennsylvania’s voice against those lies. To fight for what actually matters here: good-paying jobs, safe streets, and a government that works for you — not for one man’s revenge tour. We either stand up now, or we risk losing the democracy those rioters tried to smash five years ago. I’m ready to stand — I just need you to stand with me. clean_body: | | If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Ryan. Five years ago, we all watched in horror as a violent mob, fueled by a lie, stormed the Capitol in an attempt to overturn the will of the American people. But here’s the thing — the attack never really ended. Donald Trump’s lie never died. Once Trump returned to power last year, he pardoned the very insurrectionists who tried to overthrow our government. And Republicans in Congress like Ryan Mackenzie? They’ve fallen in line, rewriting history and sabotaging our institutions to pave the way for something like this to happen again. That’s why I’m running to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th district. My whole career has been about holding the powerful accountable. At the DOJ, I prosecuted corruption. But we’ve learned the hard way that the most dangerous corruption isn't always in a backroom — it’s on a podium, spreading lies. Now, I’m running to be Pennsylvania’s voice against those lies. To fight for what actually matters here: good-paying jobs, safe streets, and a government that works for you — not for one man’s revenge tour. We either stand up now, or we risk losing the democracy those rioters tried to smash five years ago. I’m ready to stand — I just need you to stand with me. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Ryan * | PAID FOR BY CROSSWELL FOR CONGRESS If you would like to unsubscribe, .
