name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122795663/593478951/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODcwM2NlMS0yZGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8Y8dWkwFI8Ywgigy7ebTIhEgcMkc7ZH-XxKtuSxTqY=)
Team, Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. **[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between DASS and me so we can fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122795664/593478952/771101220?refcode=em-1.6.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODcwM2NlMS0yZGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8Y8dWkwFI8Ywgigy7ebTIhEgcMkc7ZH-XxKtuSxTqY=)** | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122795665/593478953/771101220?refcode=em-1.6.26-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODcwM2NlMS0yZGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8Y8dWkwFI8Ywgigy7ebTIhEgcMkc7ZH-XxKtuSxTqY=)**

subject: democracy check-in

body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?refcode=jtk368-su-fl-header&t=1001&akid=10521%2E434096%2EWMjy6C ]John Fetterman

Derek, five years ago today, Donald Trump incited a deadly insurrection on the U.S. Capitol, injuring 174 Capitol police officers and costing four of them their lives.

And since his second inauguration almost a year ago, he's done everything he can to undermine the will of American voters and cling to power, whether that's:

👉 Still lying saying he won in 2020 and eroding trust in our elections,

👉 Telling Texas and other Republican-leaning states to redraw their maps to rig the lines and save their fragile House majority,

👉 Threatening to end mail-in voting,

👉 Courting super PACs and dark-money groups to buy elections,

👉 Or even going so far as to pardon the **nearly 1,600** people who stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021.

This isn’t normal. It’s a power grab.

And with the 2026 midterms coming, he’s only going to push harder.

Each of us has an important role in protecting the right to vote and saving our country. That's why I'm reaching out to you, Derek. 👉 If you care about protecting our democracy, will you take my Voting Rights Survey right now? We need 10,000 responses by midnight.

name: Congress Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Urgent: Tell Congress – No Trump War in Venezuela!
disclaimer_text: paid for by OUR tax dollars while Trump slashes our health care and
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Trump says more attacks on Venezuela could be coming. We need to act fast.

THIS WEEK, Congress is set to vote on emergency action that could stop
Trump’s reckless military escalation in Venezuela – and we need to ratchet
up the pressure right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34928?source=email-20260106&t=1011&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Headline: Democratic lawmakers push to block Trump's unlawful war on
Venezuela

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34928?source=email-20260106&t=1012&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Add your name: Tell Congress to block Trump from launching a “second
wave” of attacks on Venezuela. We must act before it’s too late.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34928?source=email-20260106&t=1013&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]ADD YOUR NAME

President Trump made his intentions terrifyingly clear, saying that the
U.S. is going to “run” Venezuela, vowing there will be more attacks to
come and that he’s “not afraid of boots on the ground.” This isn’t just
tough talk. He’s openly threatening war and plans to seize the country’s
vast oil wealth – all without the authorization he is REQUIRED to get from
Congress.

Some members of Congress are fighting back, forcing a vote this week on a
bipartisan War Powers Resolution to block Trump from moving forward with
military action in Venezuela – unless Congress gives explicit
authorization. That’s the constitutional check our democracy demands.

Now, we need to flood Congress with public opposition to this illegal war
before the vote.

Our Revolution members across the country are already mobilizing: hitting
the streets in anti-war protests, writing their representatives, and
shining a light on this dangerous power grab. But now we need EVERY SINGLE
member of Congress to feel the pressure before this vote.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34928?source=email-20260106&t=1014&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Add your name NOW: Demand Congress stop Trump’s unlawful war on
Venezuela by passing the emergency War Powers Resolution to stop Trump in
his tracks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34928?source=email-20260106&t=1015&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34928?source=email-20260106&t=1016&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Photo of Our Revolution activists protesting the U.S. attcks on
Venezuela

Let’s be crystal clear. U.S. military action in Venezuela isn’t about
drugs or democracy. Trump himself admitted it’s about controlling
Venezuela’s government – and its oil. History shows U.S. military
interventions have led to chaos, suffering, and generations of instability
– paid for by OUR tax dollars while Trump slashes our health care and
nutrition assistance.

The Venezuelan people have endured years of hardship. More war and foreign
intervention would only add to their suffering. Congress holds the power
to stop Trump in his tracks by passing the War Powers Resolution. But
Trump’s oil oligarchs and the war lobbyists are working overtime to push
lawmakers the other way.

Together, we can show Congress that the American people demand peace – not
another endless, oil-fueled war.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20260106.8G2S06&t=1007&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20260106.eBi3kv&t=1008&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20260106.UIwoEW&t=1009&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20260106.TLQLsP&t=1010&akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10048%2E5885482%2Eyr2ZU0

name: Haley Stevens
subject: A personal note of gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I can't thank you enough, null

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11379?t=2&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11304?t=3&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj)
Wow, null. I’m so filled with hope and gratitude this morning that I had to share it with you!
Thanks to supporters like you, we reached our 2026 Founding Donor goal and are starting this election year off strong and ready to win.
I want to say, with all of my heart, ** _thank you_ **for being a member of this grassroots team.
_Thank you_ for investing your time, your money, and your energy in our campaign to build a better future for Michiganders and everyone across this country.
_Thank you_ for your unwavering commitment to keeping this seat blue so that Democrats can have a real shot at taking back the Senate and standing up to Donald Trump's extreme agenda.
Most of all, ** _thank you_ for believing in me. **It's an honor and a responsibility I do not take lightly.
We still have a long, tough fight ahead, but with you by my side, I am ready to take on everything my Trump-endorsed opponent and national Republicans throw our way. _[**And null, if you didn't get a chance to donate before last night's deadline, I wanted to remind you that you can still chip in anytime to officially join our movement.**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11304?t=4&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj)_
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11304?t=5&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj)
---
Thank you again – for everything.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11309?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11379?t=7&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=1835%2E49239%2EAS04Oj)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Team,
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
**[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Chris Pappas and me so we can fight back.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260106_1.B37Dw3&refcode=em20260106-1&t=1&akid=4417%2E582294%2EJM53ER)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260106_1.B37Dw3&amount=5&refcode=em20260106-1&t=20&akid=4417%2E582294%2EJM53ER)**
Don’t give up the ship.
Mark
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260106_1.B37Dw3&refcode=em20260106-1&t=21&akid=4417%2E582294%2EJM53ER)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260106-1&t=22&refcode2=4417_582294_JM53ER&akid=4417%2E582294%2EJM53ER)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=4417%2E582294%2EJM53ER)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=24&akid=4417%2E582294%2EJM53ER)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4417%2E582294%2EJM53ER)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

Manchester, NH 03105

## Tonight at 6pm ET Military lawyer Tim Parlatore - on the Venezuela striker, Birthright citizenship, etc join us for the premiere
Tune in for my conversation with Trump lawyer Tim Parlatore as we break down the headlines! Click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/8b9ca4bd-4c8c-44c2-bfc7-b2eaf5945b8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us at 6pm.
## Stories I'm reading...

## The Trump Doctrine: FAFO...
If you have not seen the social media saying "FAFO" lets just say it stands for Bad F word Around and Find Out.
I think it has come to sum up President Trump's foreign policy.
Screw around and find out the consequences.
Still not clear?
Ask Iran what that means.
Now ask Maduro what that means.
The warnings are clear as are the results. Maduro was given several off ramps from President Trump and he chose not to take them
Unlike the Biden administration, this administration means business.
We are back.
Let's break it down. ...

body:
We will never let Donald Trump or anyone else gaslight us about what happened on that day
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796134/593480442/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNzU5ZTY3LTMwZWItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n6wOGEn8nKps_vEi-4VEnIVnG7t4hZ0dgpA9uMc_lc8=&emci=37d20e1a-14eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=5e759e67-30eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, It’s been five years since one of the darkest days for democracy in my lifetime. The news stories we see today will reflect on January 6th as if it’s something in the rearview mirror, but that’s wrong. We’re still living through an ongoing, concerted attack on American democracy. We see it in our work at the NDRC each and every day. An attempt to overthrow the will of the people can look like a riot at the Capitol, or it can look like a mid-decade conspiracy to redraw congressional maps across the country. The current gerrymandering crisis launched by Donald Trump stems from the same impulse as his desperate attempt to “find” votes in Georgia: **A relentless pursuit of power and a flagrant disregard for representative democracy. ** We saw on January 6th the lengths that Trump and his extremist allies will go to in order to keep their grip on power. And now that they are back in power, they have picked up right where they left off. **We say: Not on our watch. Not then, not now, not ever. ** [**If you’re able, make a donation to help the NDRC defend our democracy from those who seek to undermine and attack it. Your support enables us to fight back against Donald Trump’s redistricting crisis and ensure that the will of the people prevails.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796135/593480443/1128139581?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Jan6Anniv_email_20260106-NDRC-Tier1-Jan6Anniv_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260106-NDRC-Tier1-Jan6Anniv_&utm_campaign=Jan6Anniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNzU5ZTY3LTMwZWItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n6wOGEn8nKps_vEi-4VEnIVnG7t4hZ0dgpA9uMc_lc8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

On day one of his presidency, Donald Trump granted clemency to every criminally-charged January 6 insurrectionist. In doing so, he sent a clear message that attempting to violently overthrow the will of the people and undermine a free and fair election is not only tolerated by the president, but encouraged.
One former defense lawyer for January 6th rioters has been hired by the Trump administration to advise a “weaponization working group” in the Justice Department, writing a report that’s “re-examining” the January 6th attack and potentially going after the former Department of Justice officials who investigated and prosecuted January 6th cases in the first place.
**For me, we must take a minute to mark this ugly anniversary because we can’t ever let Donald Trump sweep this under the rug. We can’t let his allies gaslight us about what happened on January 6th or what rioters were trying to do. We must hold the line against flagrant attacks on our democratic process, wherever they arise.**
[**Make a donation today to ensure the NDRC can continue our democracy-defending work and protect the will of the people from anyone trying to thwart it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796142/593480450/1128139581?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Jan6Anniv_email_20260106-NDRC-Tier1-Jan6Anniv_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260106-NDRC-Tier1-Jan6Anniv_&utm_campaign=Jan6Anniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNzU5ZTY3LTMwZWItZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n6wOGEn8nKps_vEi-4VEnIVnG7t4hZ0dgpA9uMc_lc8=)
Thank you for being one of the millions of Americans who stood up to protect our democracy since that dark day five years ago. We are honored to stand alongside you in this work.
— Biz

clean_body: We will never let Donald Trump or anyone else gaslight us about what happened on that day | Peter, It’s been five years since one of the darkest days for democracy in my lifetime. The news stories we see today will reflect on January 6th as if it’s something in the rearview mirror, but that’s wrong. We’re still living through an ongoing, concerted attack on American democracy. We see it in our work at the NDRC each and every day. An attempt to overthrow the will of the people can look like a riot at the Capitol, or it can look like a mid-decade conspiracy to redraw congressional maps across the country. The current gerrymandering crisis launched by Donald Trump stems from the same impulse as his desperate attempt to “find” votes in Georgia: A relentless pursuit of power and a flagrant disregard for representative democracy. We saw on January 6th the lengths that Trump and his extremist allies will go to in order to keep their grip on power. And now that they are back in power, they have picked up right where they left off. We say: Not on our watch. Not then, not now, not ever. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = On day one of his presidency, Donald Trump granted clemency to every criminally-charged January 6 insurrectionist. In doing so, he sent a clear message that attempting to violently overthrow the will of the people and undermine a free and fair election is not only tolerated by the president, but encouraged. One former defense lawyer for January 6th rioters has been hired by the Trump administration to advise a “weaponization working group” in the Justice Department, writing a report that’s “re-examining” the January 6th attack and potentially going after the former Department of Justice officials who investigated and prosecuted January 6th cases in the first place. For me, we must take a minute to mark this ugly anniversary because we can’t ever let Donald Trump sweep this under the rug. We can’t let his allies gaslight us about what happened on January 6th or what rioters were trying to do. We must hold the line against flagrant attacks on our democratic process, wherever they arise. = Thank you for being one of the millions of Americans who stood up to protect our democracy since that dark day five years ago. We are honored to stand alongside you in this work. — Biz John Bisognano President, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

subject: January 6 is not a day to agonize

Democracy bent but did not break on Jan. 6.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796255/593480916/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmUxY2M1ZC0zMWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBnKsL2vD5jbSN_ZRgBGetjH8394peZi-kBj3OjyidI=&emci=de7a9e7a-15e8-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c2e1cc5d-31eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **On Jan. 6, 2021, I was in the Congress Rayburn House Office Building as violent domestic terrorists stormed the U.S. Capitol building across the street.** Like you, I could only watch in disgust as these terrorists attacked law enforcement, vandalized the Capitol, and threatened the exercise of our democracy and the peaceful transfer of power. Democracy bent but did not break on Jan. 6. I never doubted the outcome of that day: Congress would affirm the election of President Biden and Vice President Harris. Five years later, progress has been made to hold accountable those responsible for the attack, protect our democracy, and restore trust in government. But at the same time, President Trump and the Republican Rip-Off have taken us backwards. During President Trump's first days in office, he pardoned everyone who took part in the attacks on the U.S. Capitol in 2021. January 6 is not a day to agonize, but we must remember the real history and use it to organize and move forward. On the fifth anniversary of the attack, join me in remembering the five officers who lost their lives defending our democracy and the Capitol. Join me in honoring the more than 140 officers who were physically injured and the many more who still bear the burden of that horrible day. And join me in organizing for voting rights to move our country forward and prevent another Jan. 6 from ever happening again. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

Happy New Year, Peter! I hope you had a chance to spend some time with loved ones and get some rest over the holidays. I really enjoyed taking a step back for a few days to relax with Caroline and the kids before hitting the campaign trail again this past weekend. **On Sunday, over 75 volunteers showed up in Cary to launch our canvassing effort for Wake County District Attorney.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796272/593480989/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260106_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmY0MGRhOS0zMWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hX6dyiU1OzTQO_srkSB-_mYrTyVLhxMnQe0VJssiMmM=&emci=e4f40da9-31eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=f2f40da9-31eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880) It was a cold, rainy day — which speaks to the commitment of this grassroots team to building a justice system that’s fair, accountable, and focused on real public safety. Grassroots organizing is how Democrats will win big in the midterms this year, and it’s how we bring our positive message for change across Wake County. With less than two months until our primary election, I’m counting on people like you to join us out on the campaign trail and help us speak to voters about our plans to hold the powerful accountable and keep Wake County safe. **[So what do you say, Peter? Will you join our efforts to engage voters all across Wake County by signing up to volunteer with our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796273/593480990/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260106_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmY0MGRhOS0zMWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hX6dyiU1OzTQO_srkSB-_mYrTyVLhxMnQe0VJssiMmM=&emci=e4f40da9-31eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=f2f40da9-31eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)** | [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796274/593480991/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20260106_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmY0MGRhOS0zMWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hX6dyiU1OzTQO_srkSB-_mYrTyVLhxMnQe0VJssiMmM=&emci=e4f40da9-31eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=f2f40da9-31eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)

name: George Latimer
subject: Five years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Five years ago our democracy was brought to a halt.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. Peter, Today marks the fifth anniversary of the January 6th attack on our nation’s capital, when a violent mob stormed the Capitol in an attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election. Like many of you, I watched in horror as our democracy was brought to a halt, and our nation’s leaders were put directly in harm's way. **It was not “patriotism.” It was an assault on our democracy, on the rule of law, and on the men and women in uniform who protect us.** Too many Republicans have chosen to rewrite history instead of telling the truth. They’ve downplayed the violence, smeared the Capitol Police, and tried to convince people that a safe and secure election was stolen. January 6th is a reminder that democracy is fragile, but resilient, and that it requires leaders with the courage to say what’s right even when it’s inconvenient. In Congress, I’m fighting to protect voting rights, defend our institutions, and hold extremists accountable for their attacks on our democracy. **But here’s the truth:** the people who justify January 6th are already working to entrench their power and silence dissent. They want a Congress that won’t check Donald Trump’s power — and the only way we can fight back is by electing a Democratic majority in November. **[If you believe elections should be decided at the ballot box — not by intimidation — will you chip in $10 right now to help us defend our democracy and build the campaign we need to take back the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122796885/593483283/1465465160?amount=10&source=GL_EM_FR_010626_B1_J6Anniversary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDY0ZjljMjItMzJlYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eUEzDxNGLTjKZ4Vj-SBsQnWvF-j_W20TxMncmqjo8H4=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: A trend we need to end in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010626_1&amount=25]
Team,
We know that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate.
The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot.
While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely.
The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic.
We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010626_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010626_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010626_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010626_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010626_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=010626_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010626_1&amount=35]
The problem is not just that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike.
These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to protect the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=010626_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010626_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=010626_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [] Team, We know that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate. The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot. While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely. The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic. We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] The problem is not just that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike. These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more. We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever. Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to protect the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. subject: Dear Greenland: "Sorry we have such a terrible president"
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Dear Greenland: Sorry we have a terrible president](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8246ab1f-1d91-46e9-8a75-0bb8857a1ef3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Quick links: [Go to action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11c6b18d-9f03-4e6d-a5a9-e4f663fcf293/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [Discuss ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94f9716a-8bcd-4fa2-b416-fa9c3b245460/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | Poll | [Other actions)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29bdf4f2-4796-48a6-b783-5373d721b1f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taab30637-63a6-494c-bf57-ee0f0a9e931b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ **To the people of Greenland from the people of America: "[Sorry We Have Such a Terrible President](https://default.salsalabs.org/T574bfcf8-f59d-4f81-9724-eea78cccb716/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)"** The people of America have zero desire to go to war with you, or take you over, and we have no idea why our terrible president (who is also a moron) is _once again_ pushing for it. We can only imagine how stressful his threats must be, particularly in light of his actions elsewhere, and we are sorry you have to deal with this. But the people of America do not want a war, and we will do our best to keep our terrible president from launching one. And we will try much harder in the future to avoid electing people like him again. **[Sincerely, the people of America](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfaf2f651-1158-4048-8243-d2237d9689bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td53a24c9-b89f-4c4f-a268-de4ab8be6e46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2355bb58-c046-43fc-8a84-ab837ced0756/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8589474e-57e0-443f-94f3-1f816b8d111c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c18ef69-26af-4410-b5d0-840817431784/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

**[Welcome to Endless Urgency. I'm a Democratic strategist who's spent years fighting the Trump machine and trying to help the good guys win. These rants are free because of paid subscribers. If you value blunt, no-BS takes that call out MAGA, consider supporting our work. Become a paid subscriber today ➔](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5d1167-80a0-442a-8618-3305b6514d19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5d1167-80a0-442a-8618-3305b6514d19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Today is January 6th--the anniversary of one of the most horrifying and destabilizing attacks on our democracy. And while a lot of people are going to spend today replaying the horrific images and reliving the trauma of that insurrection Donald Trump incited, I want to focus on something that still doesn't get enough attention: the pardons Trump handed out at the beginning of his second term to the very people who attacked the Capitol.
**I believe those pardons were the original sin of his second term. They represent everything that 's broken and insidious about Donald Trump's presidency.**
They revealed the governing philosophy of this administration: loyalty and profit above all, no accountability for Trump and his allies, and the American people pay the price.
Here's a man who promised he was going to fix grocery prices, housing prices, and promised no new wars--a golden age of America. He told women struggling with infertility that IVF would be free. He told American farmers and ranchers that he was going to fight for them--only to sell them out to Big Ag and foreign governments. He pledged to release the Epstein files! He made a million promises, and he's broken almost all of them.
But the one promise he actually did keep? The one he made to his most loyal, violent supporters: to pardon the January 6th rioters.
And those pardons didn't just excuse past crimes--they set a precedent. They sent a message that violence in service of Trump would not only be tolerated but rewarded. You don't think that sent a message to ICE agents terrorizing immigrant communities across the country?
And look what followed. A lot of those same people have already been rearrested--on gun charges, stalking members of Congress, child exploitation. Are they going to get pardoned again? Who knows... I wouldn't be shocked.
* * *
**[If you made it this far, odds are you're just as sick of the bullshit as I am. I'm not a reporter--I'm a strategist who's spent years fighting the Trump machine and electing Democrats. If you want more unapologetic rants that cut through the gaslighting and hold MAGA accountable, become a paid subscriber. Help fuel ](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5d1167-80a0-442a-8618-3305b6514d19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[Endless Urgency](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5d1167-80a0-442a-8618-3305b6514d19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[for just $8 a month.](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5d1167-80a0-442a-8618-3305b6514d19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5d1167-80a0-442a-8618-3305b6514d19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Just like he kept his promise to Big Oil this week--who were assured a massive payday if they supported him in 2024. And now he's launched the assault on Venezuela and installed a regime that would play ball. All so Big Oil could cash in.
And while that corruption plays out in plain sight, let me ask you this directly: how are you actually doing?
Ask the average American--they'll tell you they're struggling. Sixty percent of Americans are still living paycheck to paycheck. And that number is growing rapidly. Many just saw their health care premiums double or triple because Congress failed to act. How many people are financing their groceries on Klarna!?
But it's more than that. People are giving up. They don't believe they'll ever own a home, pay off their student loans, start a family, or retire with dignity--let alone take a vacation or live a life that includes joy and usefulness. People are exhausted. Disillusioned. Praying to win the lottery or hit it big with their cousin's crypto scam.
And that's not an accident. While Trump protects his people and cashes in, the rest of the country is left with higher costs, fewer protections, and no accountability.
Let's not kid ourselves--Washington's been broken for a long time. Corruption runs deep on both sides of the aisle. And Democrats have spent too long pretending not to see it in our own house. That has to stop. We have to root it out.
But Trump has made the whole game worse--and more brazen. He's not subtle. He's loud about it. So loud that some Americans have actually started to admire it--like, "Well, at least he's honest about being corrupt." That's where we are.
Look at Venezuela again. For months they told us it was about fighting drug trafficking. Then the second Maduro was ousted--who, by the way, is a gigantic piece of shit and deserves no sympathy--Trump's out there bragging about all the oil we're going to get.
And let's be real: a lot of oil companies don't even want that oil--it's a different type that requires a whole separate process.
This was never about drugs or democracy. It was about corruption. It was about self-enrichment. Plain and simple.
It's the same deal Trump offered on January 6th: do my bidding, and I'll protect you--with pardons, with power, with profit.
And coming back to January 6th--that day, and those pardons, are the clearest, ugliest snapshot of everything Trump's Washington has become. He's weaponized the pardon power more than any president before him. He's profited off the presidency more than any president before him. And he's hurt the American people.
I said this in my rant yesterday: I feel like I'm stuck in a loop. I spent my high school and college years protesting a Republican president who wrecked the economy and dragged us into dumb, oil-fueled wars. And now it's happening all over again.
But we can break the cycle. And we must.
This year's midterm elections are a real chance to flip the House and flip the Senate. We're running amazing candidates. But we can't just focus on cleaning up the mess. Democrats are always cast as the adults in the room--the janitors who come in to mop up after Republicans torch the place--while corrupt billionaires keep getting what they want, and working people get screwed.
We need a Democratic Party that is the opposite, in every way, of what Trump represents. One that serves the public instead of protecting the powerful.
One that's ready to go on offense. One that's ready to put real money in people's pockets, fix our democracy, and rip the rot out of Washington. One that is unrelenting in rooting out its own decay and corruption. A party that's urgent, fearless, and dead serious about delivering justice--for the people, and against the corrupt.
I believe a reckoning is coming. And it's going to look like tens of millions of Americans showing up and voting for Democrats up and down the ballot. We're going to get at least one hand back on the wheel. We're going to hold these people accountable.
And God damn it, if we build the kind of Democratic Party that fights like hell to deliver--not just to manage chaos--we will get justice. From this administration, and for the American people.

subject: 5 years ago today, MAGA insurrectionists attacked our nation's Capitol

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122797678/593486176/-2140435400?refcode=header-img&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhkMjgwYS0zNGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqr-JxBaPN7vMgGEr-haFD4b-lTXJ63vzNbzvt6aihw=)

**It’s been five years since Jan. 6, 2021 – one of the darkest days in American history.**

Five years ago today, a mob of insurrectionists attacked the US Capitol in an attempt to violently overturn the 2020 election results. Thanks to the brave efforts of Capitol Police, Congress was able to fulfill its constitutional duty to certify the Presidential election, but our nation and democracy were left shaken.

This attack realized our greatest fears since Donald Trump took office and threatened the very foundations that our country is founded on – that extremism could stop democracy and could destroy our nation.

**That’s why New Dems got straight to work after January 6th to fight for our democracy:**
* New Dem Members voted to impeach President Trump to hold him accountable for his role inciting the insurrections
* New Dem Members led legislation to investigate the January 6th attack and prevent another one
* New Dems endorsed voting rights legislation to strengthen our democracy
* New Dem Member Rep. Pete Aguilar served on the House Select Committee on the January 6th Attack, and their tireless efforts led to criminal referrals of Donald Trump to the Justice Department.

But the threats to our democracy go deeper than one day. **Donald Trump and too many Republicans across the country continue to threaten political opponents with physical violence, imprisonment, and continue to sow distrust in our electoral system.**

The fight to protect our democracy is far from over. And now, New Dems are fighting harder than ever to take away power from the dangerous far-right by electing Democrats and winning a Democratic House Majority.

[**Today, we’re respectfully asking for your support so that New Dems can continue our important work, and elect pragmatic, thoughtful leaders who will stand up to protect our democracy. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122797679/593486177/-515927819?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NDCAF_20260106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhkMjgwYS0zNGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqr-JxBaPN7vMgGEr-haFD4b-lTXJ63vzNbzvt6aihw=) | **[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122797680/593486178/-515927819?amount=7&refcode=NDCAF_20260106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDhkMjgwYS0zNGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqr-JxBaPN7vMgGEr-haFD4b-lTXJ63vzNbzvt6aihw=)**

The work ahead will be challenging, but we know the American people are with us. Today and every day, thank you for standing with us in our efforts to protect our progress and defend our democracy.

clean_body: | = It’s been five years since Jan. 6, 2021 – one of the darkest days in American history. Five years ago today, a mob of insurrectionists attacked the US Capitol in an attempt to violently overturn the 2020 election results. Thanks to the brave efforts of Capitol Police, Congress was able to fulfill its constitutional duty to certify the Presidential election, but our nation and democracy were left shaken. This attack realized our greatest fears since Donald Trump took office and threatened the very foundations that our country is founded on – that extremism could stop democracy and could destroy our nation. That’s why New Dems got straight to work after January 6th to fight for our democracy: New Dem Members voted to impeach President Trump to hold him accountable for his role inciting the insurrections New Dem Members led legislation to investigate the January 6th attack and prevent another one New Dems endorsed voting rights legislation to strengthen our democracy New Dem Member Rep. Pete Aguilar served on the House Select Committee on the January 6th Attack, and their tireless efforts led to criminal referrals of Donald Trump to the Justice Department. But the threats to our democracy go deeper than one day. Donald Trump and too many Republicans across the country continue to threaten political opponents with physical violence, imprisonment, and continue to sow distrust in our electoral system. The fight to protect our democracy is far from over. And now, New Dems are fighting harder than ever to take away power from the dangerous far-right by electing Democrats and winning a Democratic House Majority. = | = We will continue to champion legislation to protect and expand voting rights, defend our democratic institutions, and hold those accountable who attempt to undermine our elections. The work ahead will be challenging, but we know the American people are with us. Today and every day, thank you for standing with us in our efforts to protect our progress and defend our democracy. – New Dems | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. We flipped 5 seats from red-to-blue, elected 17 new Members of Congress, and defended 22 NewDems Frontline members. Please, consider making a =. _**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

clean_body: | | | | | | | Untitled Document | | Peter, We couldn't believe the news when it came across our desk this morning: We STILL couldn't find your name in our "Trump Approval Records." This has marked your survey file as UNCONFIRMED. Your approval response is one of the final outstanding submissions--and without it, we cannot finalize our report. We are counting on you to close this gap and deliver the clarity we need. ⬇️⬇️⬇️ President Trump: Approve? | EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice. Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee: Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee: Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable. Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: Stop the Steal
subject: MAGA’s 2026 midterm playbook: steal districts instead of votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
We can stop the steal and thwart Trump’s new plan to subvert American democracy by forcing red states to rig their maps mere months before voters will be considering who they can vote for.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_MLmwgdcpnv3z49rJCYzlr44refu2bbcadMd3TeLFaK7Kr88f0TOAYsgRpTSY6zxtolyj7kDwVg2_yTlJk9d_YP_dGvKqCrwKgEfi7cS8oVC4eclQ9PlruKLq280QPMt4Tk9FikhZo0IbCCvn8bhBNK9mHwB1NkahSejJhFzo9-mQILtvIie0h8pcWbsX_yJcumeT-x4Aze8d-pMu8w22P0TnW8gkZ2D&c=k082JaAhWqOISDk1A54k9G7zEl0dnW_gWipCJkNeltME7MQf8R-_HQ==&ch=2sBCkwMEOGF4eyfMZhWibhZTXfYW7JIGHoUyIyplnCHSltHOEsvwNw==)
---
Peter,
In the hours and days after voters cast their ballots across the country in election 2020, it was increasingly clear that Donald Trump had lost the election and was on track to lose almost every major swing state.
MAGA got worked up into a lather. Trump and his loyal followers in Congress fanned the flames.
The infamous slogan that came out of MAGA Trump supporters trying desperately to have valid votes thrown out instead of counted is now our rallying cry to prevent MAGA from rigging the 2026 Midterms before voters can even get to the polls: Stop The Steal.
Donald Trump knows that he is barreling toward a massive historic loss this year and if the rules of the game stay the way they are now, the GOP may not recover from the blue wave that is forming over their heads.
But we can stop the steal and thwart Trump's new plan to subvert American democracy.
Colorado Draws The Line is standing in the way of Trump's ultimate ambition: rigging every election so he and his party will never have to give up power ever again. We are leading the charge to redistrict blue state Colorado--creating an exception to allow for political redistricting to counter Trump's unprecedented power grab.
Our work could flip up to 3 GOP-held seats, including redrawing carpetbagging January 6 planner and fangirl Lauren Boebert out of her district, making it impossible for her to win another election.
[Democracy is on the line. History will judge what we did or did not do in this moment. Will you please donate $50, $25, or whatever you can today to help us beat MAGA at their own game?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_MLmwgdcpnv3z49rJCYzlr44refu2bbcadMd3TeLFaK7Kr88f0TOAYsgRpTSY6zxIrLjxYULYPC_6S94H92KfYClR59kC2q0l2Ipz1Va6QtHcGx8fq5yqvWrKnS05v56r4ldU1uz0LkoLIEtn7wBDU6JQSnguGCSfmWYQ69H6IuzPTBrkYQZqXDOgi34Rwh49iKJ9WLXCel3ylxd6ZdTfB2jeg6ZDfZFobFzlFnj6Nw=&c=k082JaAhWqOISDk1A54k9G7zEl0dnW_gWipCJkNeltME7MQf8R-_HQ==&ch=2sBCkwMEOGF4eyfMZhWibhZTXfYW7JIGHoUyIyplnCHSltHOEsvwNw==)

name: Christopher Ahuja for Congress
subject: Illegal War in Venezuela. Higher Costs at Home.
body:
This is not "America First" policy.

| | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=799b473530&e=53c7d12fc7)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,Trump chose Venezuela. Who’s next? Colombia? Greenland?Controlling oil and other natural resources to enrich the elite is not a foreign policy plan. It’s corruption. Trump chose Venezuela over American workers, diverting billions of U.S. dollars toward rebuilding oil infrastructure that benefits oligarchs. Americans don’t want foreign nation-building or military escalation overseas. Americans want affordable healthcare, lower housing costs, and more affordable grocery and gas prices. While Republicans block action on Affordable Care Act subsidies, health care premiums have skyrocketed, impacting families, seniors, and small business owners.This is the cost of a political system rigged for the ultra wealthy. And Brad Sherman is complicit in his silence. I’m running for Congress to say no to illegal wars benefiting Trump’s friends and family. No to policies that punish working families. No to a corrupt MAGA regime that profits while the rest of us pay the price.Working people shouldn’t bankroll endless wars to set up new wealth pathways for the elite.[**Join us and become a partner in supporting a campaign to hold Trump, his enablers, and silent incumbents accountable.**](https://chrisahuja.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67424df89870d1cac00e55f46&id=460e9d3eba&e=53c7d12fc7) Your contribution today helps us build the power to stop this corruption and put working people first.
---

clean_body: This is not "America First" policy. | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter,Trump chose Venezuela. Who’s next? Colombia? Greenland?Controlling oil and other natural resources to enrich the elite is not a foreign policy plan. It’s corruption. Trump chose Venezuela over American workers, diverting billions of U.S. dollars toward rebuilding oil infrastructure that benefits oligarchs. Americans don’t want foreign nation-building or military escalation overseas. Americans want affordable healthcare, lower housing costs, and more affordable grocery and gas prices. While Republicans block action on Affordable Care Act subsidies, health care premiums have skyrocketed, impacting families, seniors, and small business owners.This is the cost of a political system rigged for the ultra wealthy. And Brad Sherman is complicit in his silence. I’m running for Congress to say no to illegal wars benefiting Trump’s friends and family. No to policies that punish working families. No to a corrupt MAGA regime that profits while the rest of us pay the price.Working people shouldn’t bankroll endless wars to set up new wealth pathways for the elite. Your contribution today helps us build the power to stop this corruption and put working people first. | | In solidarity, AhujaDemocratic Candidate for Congress, CA-32 | | | | | | mailto: | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2026 Christopher Ahuja for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: Five years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-ak [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-ak]Hello,
Five years ago, I watched something unfold that I never expected to see in this country.
On January 6, 2021, a mob violently stormed our nation’s Capitol in an attempt to overturn the results of a fair and free election, leading to the death of five Americans.
Like so many Americans, I was shaken and furious at those in power who stood by and justified the president’s election lies. I believe that leaders who undermine those fundamental truths have no business representing Colorado in Washington.
This was a direct attack on our democracy, the rule of law, and our Constitution.
I couldn’t sit back and watch our leaders encourage their followers to threaten the very institutions that protect our freedoms.
Since then, the attacks on our fundamental rights have only risen. Jeff Hurd has made it clear that he will fall in line with Trump’s efforts to rewrite history and ignore the Constitution.
If elected, I promise to stand up for democracy every chance I get and always put our country above self. I hope you’ll join me in the fight for our state’s future.
Thanks for taking a moment to read this message.
— Alex Kelloff

name: Team Wes Moore
subject: We’ll be completely vulnerable
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1165%2E1086043%2EpQsF7-)
We have exciting news, Peter:
After crunching the numbers, it’s clear that we hit our end-of-year goal for 2025! 🎉 This grassroots team’s support is the reason we’re already starting 2026 stronger than ever.
We’re so proud of what we’ve accomplished together so far, but our work isn’t over yet.
**On January 14th, Maryland state law requires us to pause all fundraising for _three months._** That means:
❌ We can’t send emails like this asking for donations.
❌ We can’t run ads that spread Wes’ message and bring new supporters into our coalition.
❌ **We’re left vulnerable if an opponent decides to jump into the race while we’re unable to fundraise.**
That’s why we need your support right now, Peter.
By chipping in before the fundraising freeze, you’re ensuring that we have the resources necessary to keep this campaign running through April. **[Please, pitch in $5 now to help us get ahead:](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260106-1.GnGgPq&refcode=em-20260106-1&t=2&akid=1165%2E1086043%2EpQsF7-)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260106-1.GnGgPq&amount=5&refcode=em-20260106-1&t=21&akid=1165%2E1086043%2EpQsF7-)**
This team met the moment last year. Let’s do it again.
Thank you, thank you, thank you!
— Team Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260106-1&t=22&refcode2=1165_1086043_pQsF7-&akid=1165%2E1086043%2EpQsF7-)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=1165%2E1086043%2EpQsF7-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1165%2E1086043%2EpQsF7-)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Seth Moulton
subject: January 6th was not a protest.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
| |
---
Friend, Five years ago today, our country witnessed something we never should have seen. A violent mob stormed the United States Capitol in an attempt to overturn a free and fair election. Police officers were beaten. Members of Congress, including myself, were forced to flee and shelter. The peaceful transfer of power, one of the most basic obligations of a democracy, was nearly broken. January 6th was an attack on the rule of law and on the basic idea that in America, the voters decide who leads. [From inside the safe room in the Capitol, I wrote about what we were experiencing — as we were experiencing it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798250/593488357/-759950618?refcode=260106_sm_jan6th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWEyZThiMC0zNmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vo7M2DQwrTtMaZyVTMovgi2mOcnk5zTxXP206X5Ekis=&emci=023bfce4-15eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=05a2e8b0-36eb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=194769)**** It was clear in that moment that this was not a protest. This was a direct attempt to stop the constitutional process by force. This was domestic terrorism. When President Trump later pardoned the people who carried out the attack on January 6th, it sent a message that political loyalty matters more than accountability and that attacking our democracy comes without consequences. I’ve worn this country’s uniform. I’ve sworn an oath to support and defend the Constitution. That oath doesn’t change based on who’s in power, and it doesn’t disappear when it becomes politically inconvenient. If we want this democracy to endure for the next generation, we have to be willing to tell the truth about January 6th and reject violence, no matter who commits it, and no matter who benefits. I’ve spent my career pushing back when our democracy is threatened, whether it’s by political violence or by the leaders who excuse it. **[If you’re able, please consider making a contribution today so I can take this work to the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798251/593488358/2090747700?refcode=260106_sm_jan6th_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWEyZThiMC0zNmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vo7M2DQwrTtMaZyVTMovgi2mOcnk5zTxXP206X5Ekis=)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798252/593488359/1375639745?amp;refcode=260106_sm_jan6th&refcode=260106_sm_jan6th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWEyZThiMC0zNmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vo7M2DQwrTtMaZyVTMovgi2mOcnk5zTxXP206X5Ekis=)
---
Thank you,
Seth
| | |
---|---|---

Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. name: Shawn Harris
subject: The Oath Does Not Expire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA
body:
| | [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/v5_8jYCjktXR4SKkshv9WQ~~/AAPPABA~/-0WAEBChByz7vP0sKb0vUrWkN3-41dkqON50qFMLrSb30UGDNPzRp3144q6iy6dFf8efYRV8jOojbJdtyg5AZrEINOJhWuub5wR7I5ccfXnPQPfkPYq3bh4VtYXN3cLsFT0KYcvV0htub6jXVznEv8tbcYClF8fFMk2l4BWdAwaurnHuFeybz8FqoPSx6dQdJuLgazrWuwwZZEbfsSAOv9gYgthk8qQw-pHPhnv7AS_CS7Wdl17fi-Wy7F4ONhEJflF6NYpnFtiDfuVzA-dgfV9EV1CuKPWfXED-rfqFBa7g8e8DsrZ3UpTB7_itSs4f)
---
Today marks five years since the attack on our U.S Capitol. As a retired Brigadier General who spent 40 years in uniform, I look at January 6th through the lens of the oath. Marjorie Taylor Greene failed to live up to her's when she attempted to overturn the 2020 election on January 6, 2021. In the years since, she has advocated for the release of those who participated in the insurrection.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/v5_8jYCjktXR4SKkshv9WQ~~/AAPPABA~/-0WAEBChByz7vP0sKb0vUrWkN3-41dkqON50qFMLrSb30UGDNPzRp3144q6iy6dFf8efYRV8jOojbJdtyg5AZrEINOJhWuub5wR7I5ccfXnPQPfkPYq3bh4VtYXN3cLsFT0KYcvV0htub6jXVznEv8tbcYClF8fFMk2l4BWdAwaurnHuFeybz8FqoPSx6dQdJuLgazrWuwwZZEbfsSAOv9gYgthk8qQw-pHPhnv7AS_CS7Wdl17fi-Wy7F4ONhEJflF6NYpnFtiDfuVzA-dgfV9EV1CuKPWfXED-rfqFBa7g8e8DsrZ3UpTB7_itSs4f)
---
For too long, Georgia's 14th District has been represented by rhetoric that chooses chaos over the Constitution. That chapter has now officially closed - and with it comes a choice. **There is an upcoming special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene, and with it, the Republican House Majority. ** **My name is Shawn Harris. I 'm a Democrat, a husband, a father, a Retired Brigadier General, a farmer, and I intend to win that election for Georgia and for the American people.** [**If you are in a position to support our campaign, we have a pivotal fundraising deadline tonight at midnight. clean_body: | | Today marks five years since the attack on our U.S Capitol. As a retired Brigadier General who spent 40 years in uniform, I look at January 6th through the lens of the oath. Marjorie Taylor Greene failed to live up to her's when she attempted to overturn the 2020 election on January 6, 2021. In the years since, she has advocated for the release of those who participated in the insurrection. | For too long, Georgia's 14th District has been represented by rhetoric that chooses chaos over the Constitution. That chapter has now officially closed - and with it comes a choice. There is an upcoming special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene, and with it, the Republican House Majority. My name is Shawn Harris. I 'm a Democrat, a husband, a father, a Retired Brigadier General, a farmer, and I intend to win that election for Georgia and for the American people. ~~ ~~ ~~ Leadership matters - especially in moments like this. If you believe our district deserves steadiness over spectacle, principle over politics, and service over self-promotion, I hope you will stand with me. This campaign moves fast, and every show of support helps us build the coalition we need to win. Thank you for being part of this fight, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Five years since January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
We have to keep fighting
| Hi there, it’s Mandela Barnes. Five years ago today, our country watched in horror as a violent mob attacked the U.S. Capitol on January 6 - fueled by Donald Trump’s lies and his refusal to accept the will of the people. It showed that our democracy isn’t a given, and that we must fight to protect it every day. As Trump and his allies continue to stoke fear and chaos, I’m focused on running for governor to build a movement that fights for everyday Wisconsinites, stands up to fascism, and delivers real results for working families. The Wisconsin Way is about lifting each other up, building safer communities, and delivering common sense solutions for everyday problems. [If you believe in building a Wisconsin that works for all of us, please chip in $15, $27, or whatever you can to help us start this new year with the right foot forward.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010626_B1_J6&t=2&akid=5760%2E196590%2ErCFaxC) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_010626_B1_J6&t=3&akid=5760%2E196590%2ErCFaxC)

subject: It starts with moments like this.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798378/593488978/-785282667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE4NGQ2YS0zOGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_Pa9R36HZ_ywvvKQFpZrbRNxQzirJ6oO4Qzbexa3OM=)
