Peter, **I wanted to start the new year by sharing something important with you, not because it makes for a good headline, but because it shows exactly who Becca Balint is and how she’s choosing to lead.** Just last week, Becca was in Burlington for a citizenship ceremony, where more than _40 new Americans from 24 different countries_ took the oath. Becca stayed to talk with them about the work and sacrifice it takes to become a citizen, and to thank them for choosing this country and believing in its future. For Becca, moments like this matter. She knows democracy isn’t something we can take for granted — it’s built by people who show up, do the work, and stay committed to one another, even when it isn’t easy. That same belief is what drives her every day in Congress. But this kind of leadership only works if it’s backed by people who believe in it. **[Will you click here and chip in $20.26 right now or whatever feels right to help fuel Becca’s work and build the momentum we need to win this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798379/593488979/237042326?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE4NGQ2YS0zOGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_Pa9R36HZ_ywvvKQFpZrbRNxQzirJ6oO4Qzbexa3OM=)** **[CHIP IN $20.26 TODAY!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798380/593488980/237042326?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE4NGQ2YS0zOGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_Pa9R36HZ_ywvvKQFpZrbRNxQzirJ6oO4Qzbexa3OM=)** While others are staying quiet, Becca is also speaking out and pushing back against President Trump’s reckless and illegal unilateral military action in Venezuela. She’s calling out the dangerous erosion of congressional authority and making clear that Americans do not want another war launched without oversight or accountability. Becca is demanding answers for Vermonters about the lack of transparency surrounding Vermont’s Air National Guard sent to the region —**calling for briefings that still haven’t happened and refusing to accept silence when Vermonters deserve clear answer** s about the safety, readiness, and leadership of those who serve. That’s how Becca is kicking off the new year: Not talking about values —**living them.**
Not waiting her turn — **standing up RIGHT now.** But you all know, this kind of leadership takes resources. [**If you believe in what Becca is doing, I’m asking you to click here and kick this new year off with a contribution to the hard work. Chip in $5, $15, or even $20.26 to help us start the year strong and keep Becca on the front lines during this important election year!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798381/593488981/237042326?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE4NGQ2YS0zOGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_Pa9R36HZ_ywvvKQFpZrbRNxQzirJ6oO4Qzbexa3OM=) Becca doesn’t believe in performative politics. She believes in action. And with your help, we can make sure she has the backing to keep doing exactly that. Thank you for standing with us — and with Becca. name: Autism Health
subject: Weekly News from Autism Health...
body:
Join Us At The Autism Health Summit!

Autism Health Summit 2026

April 24–26, 2026 | Legacy Center Resort & Spa | San Diego, California

The Autism Health Summit is our flagship educational event, bringing together leading voices in research, medicine, advocacy, and integrative health for three powerful days of learning, connection, and collaboration. This annual gathering is designed for parents, practitioners, researchers, and advocates who are seeking deeper insight into autism and neurological health from a whole-body, whole-family perspective.

We are honored to welcome an extraordinary lineup of speakers, including Aaron Siri, Del Bigtree, Dr. Toby Rogers, Dr. Sabine Hazan, Dr. Dayan Goodenowe, Dr. Brian Hooker, and many more respected experts and thought leaders. Together, they will explore cutting-edge research, clinical insights, environmental factors, and practical strategies that families and professionals can use. For a full list of speakers, click HERE to see our agenda (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/ahsconference.com%2Fagenda%2F/b43o/XYvCAQ/AQ/f50b5bd4-0afa-49b4-895b-9d75104dd132/1/huTbaTxpnL?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

The Summit will be held at the beautiful Legacy Center Resort & Spa (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/legacyresortandspa.com/b43o/XYvCAQ/AQ/f50b5bd4-0afa-49b4-895b-9d75104dd132/2/mVnSkUhk-7?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID) , where attendees can book a room at a special group rate of $199 per night. To reserve your room, please use the conference room block link HERE (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/ahsconference.com%2Fhotel%2F/b43o/XYvCAQ/AQ/f50b5bd4-0afa-49b4-895b-9d75104dd132/3/s4WhfE7QME?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID) or call (619) 782-9155 and use block code: Autism26. The room block dates are from April 23 to April 26. If you are staying longer, call in and use the discount code.

We are deeply grateful to our top sponsors for their continued support and leadership: Cellular Performance Institute (CPI) (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/cellularperformanceinstitute.com/b43o/XYvCAQ/AQ/f50b5bd4-0afa-49b4-895b-9d75104dd132/4/n_lhcN5KIJ?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID) , Dr. Goodenowe Enterprises (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/drgoodenowe.com/b43o/XYvCAQ/AQ/f50b5bd4-0afa-49b4-895b-9d75104dd132/5/dWktVV3ejJ?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID) , and European Wellness (https://track.pstmrk.it/3s/european-wellness.eu/b43o/XYvCAQ/AQ/f50b5bd4-0afa-49b4-895b-9d75104dd132/6/GJ091mQGmj?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID) . Their commitment helps make this event possible and supports ongoing education and outreach within the autism community.

We look forward to welcoming you to San Diego for an unforgettable weekend of education, empowerment, and community.
REGISTER HERE (https://ahsconference.com/?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** Sign Up for Our Monthly Educational Webinar!
------------------------------------------------------------

Foundational Biological Substrates for Autism & Toxicity: What They Are and How to Use Them Safely

We are excited to invite you to our upcoming educational webinar featuring Dr. Krishna Doniparthi, a respected physician known for his work in functional and integrative medicine with a focus on complex chronic conditions and neurological health.

In this informative session, Dr. Doniparthi will explore the foundational biological substrates that play a critical role in autism, toxicity, and overall neurological function. Understanding and supporting these core systems is essential for safe and effective healing, especially for individuals with heightened sensitivities.

In this webinar, you will learn:

• What foundational biological substrates are and why they matter

• How toxic exposures can disrupt key metabolic and detoxification pathways

• The connection between biological imbalances, behavior, and neurological health

• Safe, practical strategies to support these systems at home

This webinar is designed for parents, caregivers, and health-conscious individuals seeking science-based, thoughtful approaches to supporting children and families impacted by autism and environmental toxicity.

Date: Saturday, January 17th
Time: 9:00 AM (PST)

We hope you’ll join us for this valuable educational opportunity as we continue our mission to empower families through knowledge, integrity, and compassionate care.
REGISTER HERE (https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_9oWHI_K_S36gG9vCPKLFZA?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID#/registration)

** Save the Date: Hearts & Vines Fundraiser
------------------------------------------------------------

Please save the date for our Hearts & Vines Fundraiser, an elegant evening benefiting Autism Health Inc., proudly sponsored by Sunstone Winery.

Join us on Saturday, February 21st, from 5:00–9:00 PM PST, in San Marcos, for a special night of community, connection, and purpose. Guests will enjoy fine wine, delicious hors d'oeuvres, and inspiring presentations from Dr. Sabine Hazan and Dr. Toby Rogers, who will share insights on autism, health, and the most up-to-date research.

Tickets are $95 and include wine, hors d'oeuvres, and complementary wine glass.

This intimate fundraising event supports Autism Health Inc.’s mission to advance education, research, and resources for families affected by autism and neurological disorders.

We look forward to sharing this meaningful evening with you.
REGISTER HERE (https://givebutter.com/2026_HnV?gbtid=95f585f7-a853-4622-b8ff-76d699531a20&mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID)

About Autism Health Inc.
Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events, research, and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
DONATE HERE (https://autismhealth.com/donations/?mc_cid=c2d5b75e8a&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance! For more information about Autism Health, visit www.AutismHealth.com

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

|
#
---
_Peter, this is Mazie. Below is a message from my colleague Sen. Mark Kelly, who is being targeted for political retaliation by Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. Please read his message below._
* * *
Peter, Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. **[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Mazie Hirono and me so we can fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798508/593489537/-752791550?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkMTg3Yy0zOWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NVtpAlTgdAVJXbDWRw15kXrAO-jJ6nXKlIfhePjcH0M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Mark Kelly will go through immediately:_ **** | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122798509/593489538/-752791550?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTFkMTg3Yy0zOWViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NVtpAlTgdAVJXbDWRw15kXrAO-jJ6nXKlIfhePjcH0M=)**

clean_body: You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. | Peter, this is Mazie. Below is a message from my colleague Sen. Mark Kelly, who is being targeted for political retaliation by Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. Please read his message below. Peter, Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mazie Hirono and Mark Kelly will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Don’t give up the ship. Mark Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. |

I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. clean_body: You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. | = Team: Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Jason Crow will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Don’t give up the ship. Mark Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Mai Vang
subject: Will Congress stop Trump's war?
body:
Here's what we need to be doing.

| | | | | [|
---](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=583e77c738&e=dd5af5b7b1)
| [ELECT A FIGHER TO CONGRESS](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=56b81c7727&e=dd5af5b7b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump launched a war against Venezuela — without congressional authorization.
That’s illegal. And Congress has failed to stop him.
The Constitution gives Congress — not the president — the power to declare war. Yet Trump bombed Venezuela, arrested its leader, and pledged to “run the country” and seize its oil.
What comes next is extremely dangerous and uncertain, and could spiral the US into another endless, expensive war that will claim more lives. **Meanwhile, US lawmakers issue statements instead of taking action.**
I’m running for Congress to stop this Administration’s corruption, criminality, and endless wars so we can prioritize our working families.
_**Here’s what Congress members should do immediately:**_
* Invoke the War Powers Resolution to end this war.
* Draft articles of impeachment against all administration officials involved in this illegal invasion.
* Subpoena communications between the Administration and oil executives that knew about the invasion before it happened.

**It’s time for new leadership.**
[**Please chip in $25, $50 or whatever you can today to help elect a member of Congress who will stop endless wars — not enable them.**](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=f7bfaecc43&e=dd5af5b7b1)
In solidarity,
Mai Vang, MPH

clean_body: She's already raised MILLIONS!!! Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, The battle lines have been drawn: Make no mistake--Crockett represents the most extreme wing of the Democratic Party in Congress, and her election would spell for our state and our nation. If she wins, she'll sabotage President Trump at every turn, block our conservative agenda dead in its tracks, and turn the Senate into her personal circus of chaos. Jasmine Crockett's far-left rhetoric has made her a darling of progressive activists nationwide. We need every conservative Texan standing with us right now to fight back. Don't Mess With Texas, John Cornyn | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1519%2E251025%2E8dkFmG ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1519%2E251025%2E8dkFmG ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Data centers are quickly becoming one of the biggest issues in this year’s
midterm elections, and it’s important you know where the candidates in
Michigan’s Senate race stand.

Luckily, a local news outlet, The ‘Gander, asked every candidate about
data centers and AI. Here’s what they found, and why it matters to you:

First off, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers gave... no comment. 🦗

The other Democratic candidates gave broad statements on supporting
“innovation” and “workforce development,” but failed to provide any
specific, concrete answers to the questions we’re all asking, like “Who
pays for the massive energy demands of new data centers?”

Abdul wasn’t afraid to name names. He called out utility companies like
DTE and Consumers Energy and demanded clear rules that any new project
guarantees union jobs, delivers real community benefits, and runs on clean
energy, fully paid for without higher utility bills for Michiganders.

He’s also the *only* candidate who’s never taken money from these
companies or any corporate PACs, and never will. Coincidence? Absolutely
not.

That independence is exactly why Abdul can hold powerful corporations
accountable — but it’s also why those same corporations will spend big to
stop our campaign.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260106-1-ak.UR2uSw&amount=10&refcode=em20260106-1518&t=1004&akid=1519%2E251025%2E8dkFmG ]Peter, if
you want a senator who answers to working people instead of utility
executives, we need you with us. Please chip in $10 today to
help keep this campaign 100% people-powered and unbought:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260106-1-ak.UR2uSw&amount=10&refcode=em20260106-1518&t=1023&akid=1519%2E251025%2E8dkFmG ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Radical Left Lunatic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Here’s what Donald Trump said about me:
#
Peter, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day.
_And recently, he directed one at me._
Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is _terrified_ that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people.
Peter, I’m not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too.
**[I need your help to face what’s ahead. I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee in whatever you can afford so we can have the resources to fight back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99091?refcode=em20260106-9912&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9912%2E614464%2ECgH0_e)**
So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me.
He called me a _“radical left lunatic.”_
**If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it.**
You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, Peter. I need to know if you’re with me.
**[I’m not asking because I want to, but because I have to. This is the most consequential Senate race on the map. clean_body: Here’s what Donald Trump said about me: Peter, at this point, there’s nothing President Trump could say that would shock me. His tirades and rants make the news every day. And recently, he directed one at me. Trump attacked me personally because he doesn’t like that I stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. Even more than that, Trump is terrified that this campaign can defeat his handpicked candidate here in NC and take back power for the American people. Peter, I’m not afraid of the president calling me names or riling up his MAGA base against me. But I know that this is just the start of the GOP directing all their attention at us. We’ve seen it time and time again: When Donald Trump attacks a candidate, the GOP money-machine revs up against them, too. So, you may be wondering what exactly Trump said about me. He called me a “radical left lunatic.” If fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, good schools, and a livable planet makes me a “radical left lunatic,” then so be it. You know where I stand and what I’m fighting for, Peter. I need to know if you’re with me. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nina2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nina2025]
Hi Friend,
I wanted to share with you that I will be live on The Ladies Room on Fox Local TOMORROW - Wednesday, January 7, 2026 at 8:00 pm . I hope that you will watch if you're able and share this information widely with your network.
I will be discussing the Menopause Bill that I was so proud to pass into law last year. Together, we made Philadelphia one of the first cities to enact workplace protections for menstruation, perimenopause, and menopause . People shouldn’t have to suffer in silence or worry about their job because their health is acting up. I can't wait to share more details and continue to destigmatize tomorrow evening!
Thank you and I'd love to hear any feedback!
Nina

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Five years later, we still remember
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Team,

I’m on my way to DC for our first week back in Congress in the new year.

As I’m traveling, the impact of this day, January 6th, weighs heavily on my mind. We will never forget the impact of this day from five years ago:

* More than 140 police officers were injured.
* Several lost their lives.
* Our democracy was significantly dented.
* MAGA Republicans in Congress are trying to rewrite history and erase the events of that day.

I wasn't in Congress on January 6th, but I remember watching in horror from New Jersey as MAGA leadership sought to undermine democracy with a violent insurrection. To always remember, I have placed in front of my office a copy of the plaque honoring our law enforcement that they buried and refused to display. Regardless of the story that they now try to sell about that day, history has not changed and the need for strong leadership in Washington who respect lives of heroes lost and stand up for truth and working families has only increased.

I will always fight for our police officers, to protect our democracy, and to make America work for working families again. I am laser-focused on delivering for our district, lowering costs and working families across the country, no matter what MAGA says or does.

If you're with me, please support my campaign by making a contribution today and helping us take back the House to get Congress back on track and put a check on this administration. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260106_np_jan6]

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260106_np_jan6]

Thank you,

Nellie Pou
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/6/2025
body:
When outages become policy: Colorado’s energy accountability gap
| | | | [](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
| | Hi friends,
**It's the first podcast of 2026!** Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.joinrmv.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.joinrmv.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.joinrmv.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Colorado saw major shifts in health care, global politics, and family costs as hospitals [halted gender-transition treatments for minors](https://link.email.joinrmv.) following a federal warning, raising new questions about oversight and compliance. Reactions also rippled statewide after President Trump announced the [capture of Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro](https://link.email.joinrmv.), drawing both relief and concern from Colorado’s Venezuelan community. Meanwhile, a new law [limiting childcare waitlist fees and requiring refunds](https://link.email.joinrmv.) took effect, offering relief to families long frustrated by costly, nonrefundable deposits.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** National scrutiny intensified as a [Minnesota fraud scandal tied to Obama-era policies](https://link.email.joinrmv.) exposed widespread abuse of public programs, renewing calls for accountability. Election integrity concerns resurfaced after Fulton County, Georgia, [admitted to violating tabulator rules](https://link.email.joinrmv.) from the 2020 election, while economists again conceded they [misjudged the Trump economy,](https://link.email.joinrmv.) which outperformed gloomy forecasts with stronger growth and easing inflation.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Today’s commentary warns that [policy—not chance—is behind rising power outages](https://link.email.joinrmv.) and energy costs, as regulators shift risk onto ratepayers. It also points to New York’s collectivist path as a [cautionary tale for Colorado](https://link.email.joinrmv.), challenges the [myth of “non-partisan” government](https://link.email.joinrmv.), and shows how climate-driven “Just Transition” policies [quietly force families to foot the bill](https://link.email.joinrmv.) for decisions made by unelected officials.
This is your Mountain Minute for January 6, 2026.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[When outages become policy: Colorado’s energy accountability gap](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
The mid-December power shutoffs weren’t a weather anomaly or a one-off emergency. They were planned. And for tens of thousands of Coloradans, that fact changed everything.
Families scrambled for generators. Hospitals shifted to contingency plans. Small businesses began calculating losses they may never recover.
What followed stripped away the abstractions surrounding Colorado’s energy agenda. Policy decisions once discussed in targets, timelines and rulemakings showed up in daily life.
For readers who missed it, that concern was put on the record on Dec. 23, when Republican lawmakers sent a letter to Gov. Jared Polis, calling on him to reverse his electrification agenda and rein in the Public Utilities Commission (PUC).
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**[New York’s Collectivist Experiment: A Cautionary Tale for Colorado Too](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **New York’s embrace of collectivism offers a warning for Colorado:** The article argues that policies like rent freezes, government-run services, and expanded state control may offer short-term relief but historically lead to housing shortages, reduced investment, and long-term instability—outcomes Colorado risks repeating as costs rise.
* **Price controls and mandates undermine supply, not just profits:** By capping rents and imposing higher wages while costs continue climbing, New York’s approach discourages private investment, slows construction, and shifts more burden onto government systems already struggling to keep up.
* **History shows collectivist experiments hurt working communities first:** Drawing parallels to past crises in New York and abroad, the piece warns that when enforcement weakens and public programs outgrow capacity, low-income neighborhoods face declining services, fewer jobs, and higher everyday costs—despite promises of fairness.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
|
---
**[There is No Such Thing as “Non-Partisan”](https://link.email.joinrmv.)** BY MICHAEL J BADAGLIACCO "MJB", [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
* **“Non-partisan” government is a myth that hides ideology:** The commentary argues there is no neutral decision-making in school boards, city councils, or local offices—every vote reflects deeply held beliefs, values, and worldviews, regardless of labels on the ballot.
* **Removing party labels disguises politics instead of eliminating it:** The piece contends that non-partisan elections don’t reduce partisanship but conceal it, allowing candidates to advance ideological agendas while avoiding transparency about who funds, endorses, and influences them.
* **Voters deserve honesty, not performative neutrality:** The author calls the “unaffiliated” label intellectual cover for avoiding accountability, arguing that civic debate improves when leaders openly state their convictions rather than hiding behind claims of objectivity.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Serving Together — Mature Language of Love**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
[****](https://link.email.joinrmv.)**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JANUARY 4** _If love is who we are, what does it look like when we put that love to work? Interesting question. There is a special kind of strength that emerges when God’s people connect, bond, and pray... they serve together, which is the language of love._ __
[**After the rhetoric, Colorado secures $200 million for rural health care**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | JANUARY 2** _“People will die—tens of thousands, perhaps year after year after year—as a result of the Republican assault on the health care of the American people.” That’s what House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries said on July 3, during the longest speech in House history, in an effort to delay passage of H.R. 1—a.k.a. the One Big Beautiful Bill (OBBB)—before it was sent to President Trump for signature._ __
[**When caps don’t cap costs**](https://link.email.joinrmv.)
**BY SHAINA COLE | STATE | JANUARY 2** _Voters are often told that a policy includes a built-in safeguard — a cap, a limit, a hard stop designed to keep costs under control. In Colorado, that promise came with the Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights, approved by voters in 1992 as a constitutional amendment limiting how much revenue state and local governments can keep and spend without voter approval._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).

body:
When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. |

Fellow Patriot,

Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself:

When something is broken, you don't complain - _you fix it._

That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient.

But today, something bigger is broken.

Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. _The people_.

The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom.

They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough.

**That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it.** To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone.

If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - **[I'm asking you to join this mission.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=7955c29661084e1a93a8299d93a87ce7&_e=4s7YMg3BVwZJtUOE-BaL4NbnXuY7EgWySdmcZvGCqsGgXMabaHW4VB9iOmNAXMBzUgTJ3gIOQ4iDF1ZtLcLT1mYEWCz_P7ivdQ3SNC1pSZsZ4WzsQpCYPEOprOqBS11NsMuZ9qQGJLXFfTEo4R3_qV1Qr_k85PkgSt8T7QDHwR1a9o1tEOt9oVpgThaBSGhejS3dG1kOw6r8UFRFbn0juMox1Mk11ohWZuHqqL0XpzU6Ibo6lHj__aB9T7AMwK916oLzQV_9yyydLhS0KJdV4PorwAAeaKWXNjcTZlDgOm9AifDoMN1ahffHFg-qMNLntSNcruADg4uuio91xpmETPVHgsdr2ys9e_21pGScjPn6FO9K6_oNqH7-VzemMOmXjm48AejvYP-R_lQ-CH0bMZPUTcF-PXztnGoTZZ1YHYbNQ8pIn6_L2TZFVKP3VPYji7fBnFXkBA8yoJVjiB5KY5qgynItAt9RPUAiFXCPVd0ygYZV5WqFEz8n-luI8MrC8ZCyNZhTonK1ZGZUDoRm_yMf7TYmBfIDmkDBo7CQga7UhE05honvIPGVqFk4I8KXQIUDT0poHQTFGK7fOIG2h029uaB8dCUxB7JGMPwxLTm9bRyBn93ZspM3-oIeVl2T_ZeEte_lA3J_u1tkIPoK5UEAgvA_8oex8M9x7Cj-CLc%3D)**

clean_body: When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. | Fellow Patriot, Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself: When something is broken, you don't complain - you fix it. That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient. But today, something bigger is broken. Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. The people. The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom. They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough. That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it. To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone. If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - Thank you for being in this fight, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Thank you, friend.
body:
|
#
Hi friend, Happy New Year -- and thank you. Because of your support, we closed out 2025 strong and hit our final fundraising goal of the year. That’s no small thing -- especially when GOP super PACs spent nearly $1 million last year attacking me. Your support couldn’t have come at a more important time. When MI‐08 was named the “tipping point” district for control of Congress, the attacks only ramped up. But we stayed focused -- fighting to lower costs, protect essential programs like Social Security and SNAP, and deliver real solutions for working families here in mid-Michigan. With 2026 officially underway, our work to win re-election is far from over -- and I plan to hit the ground running. **This week, we’re pushing to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits that expired at the end of last year.** Without action, millions of Americans will face higher premiums, and many will lose coverage altogether. I’m committed to finding a solution that keeps health care affordable and accessible for everyone. That’s exactly the kind of problem I came here to work on -- not chasing headlines, but focusing on the nuts and bolts of how to improve the lives of working families.**Shoulders back, chin up, forward -- that’s how we approach every challenge.** Thanks for being in this fight with me, and here’s to what we’ll take on together this year. More soon,
Kristen | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122799770/593494191/-1606559032?refcode=em-1.6.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWQyYzE2Yi0zY2ViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v20fiSH-pcCD_7QKSGq6fpSjkeUdjVhqSE1Ny6JSspE=)

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: I'm running for Congress!!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=010625_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=010625_2]
It's official...
I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home.
Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero.
In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress.
This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. So, if you're willing to be one of the first donors to my campaign, will you split a donation between myself and Real Texas PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=010625_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=010625_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=010625_2&amount=25]
I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy.
I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today.
Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research.
We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it.
And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool.
None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard."
Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Real Texas PAC ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=010625_2]
Talk soon,
Jack

clean_body: [] It's official... I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home. Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero. In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress. This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. So, if you're willing to be one of the first donors to my campaign, will you split a donation between myself and Real Texas PAC right now? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy. I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today. Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research. We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it. And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool. None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard." Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and Real Texas PAC ? subject: They don’t want talk. Or Debate. Just violence.

Fight!” — I’ll never forget it| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3ac5b00367324303bbda6408f2ed8ed7&_e=5D4n7Dddc8LP9uheyzhU2xAOi1uoX_fjnVQzSEXtvlBKtSCiBB34FswEDvm-IPYJPpa8l5L3aq0x2jCuZkU_A8xxdvAfYvTBgtnPks_nfgF6Il7tHbY0RkjdfVI5UvWegGyGR_f7tt94-jysoOYc514Sj6IM2O9nCar10NkPcI5jJDEWAT5A8eePmXgSAtTJ8AJZLzEZr_l3fdL-YmSRnK1gHiZTRpJVeq3DAeUQrICC3A57qtF2XUcwtdyq2kwexY3-7HLjow8rv59hyLAHVHG24EYIvE1ztI5yG9ljOf76vjaTK_bzFuCbuq-b_3QcA-xXmRbDb2QR25LayyG1T_BBMBvFj1pTVYcoXCkCtRl3AJk5_Kps3He9YXpithiHwUx-SDBsHSzdJUzoe0yk4EOLMAfhlbV8hhHimP2lHuyJOZc5IJMl16KUHnCpuOYlTLriyRuqLNG7rzSkHBOZEdzwgGccfnnfE-C1ldc4qyXiBL7xoMrtvD5viDS-9umP-Z66smsJXS71i5vqAA9aX57bBIZSbTLMnywsk8aUnIf1C5HYvwMs1QmA1MuWznrkZousOdAbN4fgaXCMi5Naf1I1nNc8Q90lEcN1Kj-mH2YLbSeL3ZL1R1QZ3HW0lw2JSYZJc-MWFwPr5v_HASPsMpXL_Ssjch2cF8PaCPdX0S6sASkp8rFYjuMP7H5l7lUsxaUKdL5Gu7oXhK1RDzqgnpEfHjk8X5dahdqoNBbLU_M%3D)
---
Patriot, In the wake of the assassination attempt on my father's life - and the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk - the opposition has made things clear:

**Violence is all they have left.** They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. **It 's called _Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation._**_ _
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3ac5b00367324303bbda6408f2ed8ed7&_e=5D4n7Dddc8LP9uheyzhU2xAOi1uoX_fjnVQzSEXtvlBKtSCiBB34FswEDvm-IPYJPpa8l5L3aq0x2jCuZkU_A8xxdvAfYvTBgtnPks_nfgF6Il7tHbY0RkjdfVI5UvWegGyGR_f7tt94-jysoOYc514Sj6IM2O9nCar10NkPcI5jJDEWAT5A8eePmXgSAtTJ8AJZLzEZr_l3fdL-YmSRnK1gHiZTRpJVeq3DAeUQrICC3A57qtF2XUcwtdyq2kwevE7tQbf-fPQjVnGHlFweMeSKfaNqyUXkjOgcC7VrILfLYNxBwvSIzpd8SLrLosikOE_z_QBh6EXHhzryDAixlJm8CICIIHaooABcftTaW1aufnY1dtID6fSVsv1cuUhIBPgqf1UcVFGKsajJ4D5av9ssAkgrJywL0Tz2VxJXl2kNA-Bqdv1-nXr00e27O5Kiaj013Gw56GcsFjlWu3LisaJVL-hio5L838J0WDd0TuH--KbgGMtRCXB63zQPLmcM6lT22zZfAaMOmNtPiB--eUWG9QS2hgT6KjtuMmRDpG6Gn68J_2v8uylFqsg6_uqsuuNEOTzPhaEPcIU_FOr40ULBzDAEBHp3OevDRlcvrMmAZeHM-FI6iMoqXuwMFavN8M7yBOVmxYyHHXbzinlM0j7DP8yjkoNbYH03WSnFzs5K4x34FSttVNYGpvg66nOMllt1wuz9mKFAln0cwPC6l2nn1L1HEDmpg_UcPQwJSgw%3D)
---
Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. I'd like to send you a copy, Patriot. Because we all need to know how to look evil in the eye - and overcome it.
---
[ **Yes, Eric! Send Me Your Book >>**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=3ac5b00367324303bbda6408f2ed8ed7&_e=5D4n7Dddc8LP9uheyzhU2xAOi1uoX_fjnVQzSEXtvlBKtSCiBB34FswEDvm-IPYJPpa8l5L3aq0x2jCuZkU_A8xxdvAfYvTBgtnPks_nfgF6Il7tHbY0RkjdfVI5UvWegGyGR_f7tt94-jysoOYc514Sj6IM2O9nCar10NkPcI5jJDEWAT5A8eePmXgSAtTJ8AJZLzEZr_l3fdL-YmSRnK1gHiZTRpJVeq3DAeUQrICC3A57qtF2XUcwtdyq2kwernTP7u7SAM8qQpqy6cD4sWA2cYDumeU4sycjmT0pvDRUggx7Hee-AFriiLIcKtcBX2U3yBy8Z4d8Ahd6-bKcpys-P91ISSxIgCHWCPYItUvVRwCfsPeTpYxC9SiLXUs_cBQYLO4imu05s-_5Feh442Jh2NEERPotYRzPv3nAtZ9acd6YwWLs_rGOkKF0RDhJPYAU-VPdXrDuIpE021zupMNjd6i96EBKic60SJOt_gWRgOqONXkd_EnSkYi8IGVQhJN4YwzzKjmPb0igtD6aagH72holfExslY5O7tJe94BBxkqhib8_jha4UOg0OqJiQUhRbMysBYLRSPiKVAhoCrBA3gjHjIOUL7GvwxlPgY57FNo669luvL-FOwK6DbTOsXZcEVNhUDG9LMWVEMQdk73X5zZUtG0tp27Cxz_G-k4ZXr6T09kjcB9ieOA4bQETN_1GYhcsKxxKMd8NKOpUgPkQ0AbiXUMppPXXL4dJ2zw%3D)

That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. These people defaced public property, assaulted police and chanted threats against elected officials, including then-Vice President Mike Pence. Today is a grim reminder of the ways he can wield that power to damage our democracy. = | | | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = One of Donald Trump’s first acts in his second term was to pardon the thousands of his supporters who took part in that attempted insurrection. ---
Peter, Today marks five years since the violent insurrection at our Capitol – a day when our democracy was tested like never before. Like many of you, I watched in shock and horror as a mob of extremists stormed the halls of government, threatened countless lives, and sought to undermine the integrity of our elections. January 6th was just one of the many ways Donald Trump has assaulted our democracy, and since entering the White House once again, he has continued to find ways to undermine our Constitution. His disregard for the rule of law, attacks on a free press, and abuse of executive power threaten the very foundations of our democracy. Donald Trump has repeatedly placed personal loyalty above national interest, challenged the legitimacy of elections, and sought to weaken the checks and balances that protect our freedoms. **Democracy requires leaders who respect the limits of their authority and the rights of the people, qualities Donald Trump has repeatedly failed to demonstrate.** And Peter, our democracy isn’t strengthened by looking away from moments like this. It’s strengthened by facing them head on and recommitting to the values that unite us. In Congress, that’s exactly what I’m working toward every day: protecting the right to vote, defending the rule of law, and ensuring our government works for the people it was created to serve, not for Donald Trump. If you share that belief, I hope you’ll stand with me as we work to keep Congress accountable to our democracy and focused on the American people. **[If you’re able, a contribution of $10, or whatever you can give today, helps us build the people-powered campaign it takes to win and support a House majority that will hold Donald Trump accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800258/593495970/-2051124973?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_010625_B1_Jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjI5M2Q1NS0zZmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCtA8ar_cd1cOFkf4ZmnpAj6NJbZM0OFkQ0Rkcigsrg=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800259/593495971/-2051124973?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_010625_B1_Jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjI5M2Q1NS0zZmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCtA8ar_cd1cOFkf4ZmnpAj6NJbZM0OFkQ0Rkcigsrg=)

Thank you,

Valerie Foushee

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, Today marks five years since the violent insurrection at our Capitol – a day when our democracy was tested like never before. Like many of you, I watched in shock and horror as a mob of extremists stormed the halls of government, threatened countless lives, and sought to undermine the integrity of our elections. January 6th was just one of the many ways Donald Trump has assaulted our democracy, and since entering the White House once again, he has continued to find ways to undermine our Constitution. His disregard for the rule of law, attacks on a free press, and abuse of executive power threaten the very foundations of our democracy. Donald Trump has repeatedly placed personal loyalty above national interest, challenged the legitimacy of elections, and sought to weaken the checks and balances that protect our freedoms. Democracy requires leaders who respect the limits of their authority and the rights of the people, qualities Donald Trump has repeatedly failed to demonstrate. And Peter, our democracy isn’t strengthened by looking away from moments like this. It’s strengthened by facing them head on and recommitting to the values that unite us. In Congress, that’s exactly what I’m working toward every day: protecting the right to vote, defending the rule of law, and ensuring our government works for the people it was created to serve, not for Donald Trump. If you share that belief, I hope you’ll stand with me as we work to keep Congress accountable to our democracy and focused on the American people. = | | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

body:
Let's be clear about something

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800376/593496267/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDgwN2VlNy0zZmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vo4Inu9hyDhW2zdLX0Qksbh8G5L9m2jom9v7QAx3jY=) Let’s be clear about this: the Kansas GOP isn’t trying to gerrymander me out of office because they actually believe an extreme Republican will get more done in my place. **They’re doing it because they want _more_ gridlock. _More_ chaos. _More_ blind partisanship.** I’ve gotten a lot done for Kansas over the last seven years. And that’s why the Kansas GOP, National Republicans, and countless extremist groups are so determined to replace me. Now, they’ve set their plans into motion: on January 12th — the very first day of the 2026 legislative session — Kansas Republicans will try to re-draw our maps and wipe out every last Kansas Democrat in Washington. A Republican candidate for Governor has even gone up on the airwaves, running ads urging state legislators to gerrymander KS-03 — all to protect one party’s political power. **_[Listen, I know Kansans won’t blindly follow this DC-backed scheme. But taking on National Republicans — and the immense amount of resources they have — won’t be easy. That’s why I need to ask: will you chip in before our deadline on January 12th? If we don’t act fast, we won’t be able to counter all the attacks and misinformation that Kansas Republicans are desperate to spread.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800377/593496268/-538008740?refcode=email_010626_plan&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDgwN2VlNy0zZmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vo4Inu9hyDhW2zdLX0Qksbh8G5L9m2jom9v7QAx3jY=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800378/593496269/-538008740?refcode=email_010626_plan&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDgwN2VlNy0zZmViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vo4Inu9hyDhW2zdLX0Qksbh8G5L9m2jom9v7QAx3jY=)

clean_body: Let's be clear about something = Let’s be clear about this: the Kansas GOP isn’t trying to gerrymander me out of office because they actually believe an extreme Republican will get more done in my place. They’re doing it because they want more gridlock. More chaos. More blind partisanship. I’ve gotten a lot done for Kansas over the last seven years. And that’s why the Kansas GOP, National Republicans, and countless extremist groups are so determined to replace me. Now, they’ve set their plans into motion: on January 12th — the very first day of the 2026 legislative session — Kansas Republicans will try to re-draw our maps and wipe out every last Kansas Democrat in Washington. A Republican candidate for Governor has even gone up on the airwaves, running ads urging state legislators to gerrymander KS-03 — all to protect one party’s political power. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Laura Friedman
subject: Let’s recommit to a blue wave in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800388/593496305/-2092947258?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzJjNzI2MTQtNDBlYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-PMQWKQEicvKTkUkraYYTeNPfBXaM6_ucdpQOgGE54c=) Friend, I want to express my sincere gratitude for your support throughout my first year in Congress, and for making our final fundraising deadline of 2025 a success. I know we ask a lot, and I’m humbled by every donation we receive. With your support, we can have a strong showing in CA-30 and help Red-to-Blue candidates in California and across the country deliver a Democratic House majority in November. This weekend reminded us yet again of why we need to win. Nicolás Maduro was a brutal dictator who has not respected his people's elections, but that doesn’t justify Donald Trump starting a war over oil company profits. And he is threatening aggression against Cuba, Mexico and Greenland. I’m committed to working across with any allies in Congress who have the will to reassert our Congressional authority and ensure that the American people are not dragged into more costly, endless wars. And I'm committed to ensuring we have the majority in November that this never happens again with Trump in office. Let’s make 2026 the year when we recommit to our democracy -- and elect representatives who protect science, facts and the Constitution. Thank you, Laura

name: Mark Teixeira
subject: 6 weeks out
body:
Our momentum is STRONG

| | | | | [|
---](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=181a2a6c25&e=2814cf23ed)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Peter,
Early voting in the Republican Primary begins **SIX WEEKS from today — just 42 days away**. The sprint is on, and our campaign has more momentum than ever.
Today, we announced that we have **more than**[**$2.5 million**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=c37a6ca583&e=2814cf23ed)**cash on hand** , putting us in a very strong position as we enter the home stretch.
We’ve also earned the support of an incredible group of conservative leaders, including:
* Texas [**Gov. Greg Abbott**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=47ebd83656&e=2814cf23ed)****
* [ National Border Patrol Council](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=8c39d15c77&e=2814cf23ed)
* 70+ conservative and community leaders from TX-21
* The Cattle Raisers PAC
* Leading women’s advocate [Riley Gaines](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=34b8c402dc&e=2814cf23ed)
* 9 Texas Congressmen
* Conservative congressional leaders Steve Scalise and [Jim Jordan](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=5dec8f597a&e=2814cf23ed)

Now, we need you to [stand with us](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=a97b6769b0&e=2814cf23ed).
In the coming weeks, there will be many opportunities to volunteer and get involved — starting with **block walking this Saturday**.
Can we count on you to be part of our team in the home stretch?
[**Sign up to VOLUNTEER**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=4c767ea51e&e=2814cf23ed) and get a [yard sign](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=2b5def35db&e=2814cf23ed).
Thank you for your willingness to engage with our campaign over the [past four months](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=0d44c300e1&e=2814cf23ed). I’m truly grateful for all you do for Texas and our district!
For Freedom,
— **Mark “Tex” Teixeira** 🇺🇸 America First ConservativeTexas’ 21st Congressional District
---
|
---
| |
_**What They’re Saying About The Teixeira Campaign
**_
**TEXAS GOVERNOR GREG ABBOTT**
“Mark “Tex” Teixeira has proven his commitment to Texas values, fighting for conservative principles and supporting Republican leaders. He’ll stand strong for border security, economic freedom, and the America First agenda Texans deserve in Washington.”

**NATIONAL BORDER PATROL COUNCIL**
”Teixeira represents a new generation of leadership who will stand with our agents, secure the border, and fight for the men and women on the front lines.”

**RILEY GAINES, LEADING WOMEN’S ADVOCATE**
“I’ve been fortunate to get to know Mark Teixeira, and it’s clear he has a deep love for his family, his Christian faith, and our country.”

**SUE PINER, FORMER COMAL COUNTY GOP CHAIRMAN**
“In the open seat for TX-21, Mark Teixeira stands out as a political outsider and a breath of fresh air.”

**ANNE NEWMAN, FORMER KENDALL COUNTY REPUBLICAN CLUB PRESIDENT**
“Mark has a servant’s heart who puts principles over politics. He wants to serve our country, and he will fight for We the People.”

**GEORGE RODRIGUEZ, SAN ANTONIO CONSERVATIVE LEADER**
“I’ve spent decades in the political trenches fighting for the conservative cause, and I could not be more excited to support Mark Teixeira for Congress.”

**CONGRESSMAN BRANDON GILL, HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS**
“Mark Teixeira is a true America First patriot. We can count on him to work with President Trump to fully secure the border, and he will stand with us to hold government accountable to the people.”

name: Tom Leonard
subject: The Positive Path
body:
[](https://sendy.right-strategies.us/l/cve9YluPeAoOO3uAO6KV4g/LDZvnnd7634djRNjKDeptC6w/R48929zUk3G3lRj892UGePF0RA)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Happy New Year!

As we welcome in 2026, my family and I are deeply grateful for the blessings of the past year and incredibly excited for what lies ahead.

As we reflect on the joy of the holidays and everything that unfolded in 2025, we're reminded why we're in this fight: to build a Michigan where individuals can thrive, succeed, and feel confident about the future.

As we kick off the new year, our campaign is more energized than ever. We're building real momentum, both within our team and across the campaign trail. 2026 is the year we turn Michigan around together.

That's why we're also excited to introduce this weekly newsletter. Throughout 2026, we'll use it to keep you regularly updated on the campaign, the issues that matter most, and the path forward for
Michigan.

Transparency, accountability, and clear communication are core to this campaign, and we hope this newsletter becomes proof of that commitment. Thank you for being part of our team.

**Accountability & Reform**

Michiganders deserve a government that works for them, not insiders in Lansing.
---
The people of Michigan should be empowered - not the government, or even the Governor. That's why a key component of my campaign is delivering real accountability and reform in our government. Here's a breakdown of some of my key policy proposals on this issue:
* Subject the Governor's Office and Legislature to FOIA: End exemptions so the public can access official records, calendars, and communications - true transparency for all branches.
* End Rule-Making by Unelected Bureaucrats: Shift power back to elected officials and the people.
* Create an Independent Ethics Commission: Strengthen oversight and prevent corruption.
* Modernize Michigan's Hatch Act: Prohibit government employees from playing politics on taxpayer time or with state resources.
* Strengthen Whistleblower Protections and Ban NDAs in Government Deals: Protect those who speak up and ensure no more secret agreements hide decisions from the public.
* Zero-Based Budgeting: Require every dollar to be justified annually, cutting waste and prioritizing families.

_**Join Our Team!**_
This race will be won with grit, determination, and hard-working supporters like you.
With the primary this year, we need your help now more than ever.
Volunteer Today: Sign up for phone banking, door-knocking, events, or hosting a meet-and-greet in your community. Your time makes all the
difference! Sign Up Here and reach out to our Field Director, Tony, for more volunteer opportunities at [tony@tomformichigan.com](mailto:tony@tomformichigan.com)

Continue sharing our positive vision on social media - follow my X account's, [@Tom4Michigan](https://sendy.right-strategies.us/l/cve9YluPeAoOO3uAO6KV4g/RJhMUWq8hp9gOQlQO6duNw/R48929zUk3G3lRj892UGePF0RA) and [@TomLeonard28](https://sendy.right-strategies.us/l/cve9YluPeAoOO3uAO6KV4g/0cNxs8FaOMdCky6HMxkWGg/R48929zUk3G3lRj892UGePF0RA), my [Facebook page](https://sendy.right-strategies.us/l/cve9YluPeAoOO3uAO6KV4g/ZadgDwFFd2IVCl763Ctdb9uw/R48929zUk3G3lRj892UGePF0RA), and my [Instagram](https://sendy.right-strategies.us/l/cve9YluPeAoOO3uAO6KV4g/ecIU9IJOwkp89240IwiYqoUA/R48929zUk3G3lRj892UGePF0RA).

clean_body: Dear Friend, Happy New Year! As we welcome in 2026, my family and I are deeply grateful for the blessings of the past year and incredibly excited for what lies ahead. As we reflect on the joy of the holidays and everything that unfolded in 2025, we're reminded why we're in this fight: to build a Michigan where individuals can thrive, succeed, and feel confident about the future. As we kick off the new year, our campaign is more energized than ever. We're building real momentum, both within our team and across the campaign trail. 2026 is the year we turn Michigan around together. That's why we're also excited to introduce this weekly newsletter. Throughout 2026, we'll use it to keep you regularly updated on the campaign, the issues that matter most, and the path forward for Michigan. Transparency, accountability, and clear communication are core to this campaign, and we hope this newsletter becomes proof of that commitment. Thank you for being part of our team. Accountability & Reform Michiganders deserve a government that works for them, not insiders in Lansing. The people of Michigan should be empowered - not the government, or even the Governor. That's why a key component of my campaign is delivering real accountability and reform in our government. Here's a breakdown of some of my key policy proposals on this issue: Subject the Governor's Office and Legislature to FOIA: End exemptions so the public can access official records, calendars, and communications - true transparency for all branches. End Rule-Making by Unelected Bureaucrats: Shift power back to elected officials and the people. Create an Independent Ethics Commission: Strengthen oversight and prevent corruption. Modernize Michigan's Hatch Act: Prohibit government employees from playing politics on taxpayer time or with state resources. Strengthen Whistleblower Protections and Ban NDAs in Government Deals: Protect those who speak up and ensure no more secret agreements hide decisions from the public. Zero-Based Budgeting: Require every dollar to be justified annually, cutting waste and prioritizing families. Join Our Team! This race will be won with grit, determination, and hard-working supporters like you. With the primary this year, we need your help now more than ever. Volunteer Today: Sign up for phone banking, door-knocking, events, or hosting a meet-and-greet in your community. Your time makes all the difference! Sign Up Here and reach out to our Field Director, Tony, for more volunteer opportunities at mailto:tony@tomformichigan.com Continue sharing our positive vision on social media - follow my X account's, and , my , and my . This is OUR Year Thank you for your belief in a better Michigan. Let's make 2026 the year we restore accountability, grow our state, and put families first. God bless you and your loved ones in this new year. Best, Tom Leonard Candidate for Governor To learn more, get involved, and donate visit

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800478/593496742/754198883?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_KellySplit_260106_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RiY2U4ZC00MGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cRnkPZQY0PqryaJ1v4ujmzlv3oKE7MCVh5I8dv1Rodk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800479/593496743/754198883?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_KellySplit_260106_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2RiY2U4ZC00MGViLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cRnkPZQY0PqryaJ1v4ujmzlv3oKE7MCVh5I8dv1Rodk=) Derek,

Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.

I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.

My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.

You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.

If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Restore the ACA subsidies
body:
Join me and call on Congress to act.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=303%2E124072%2EpZbMxl)
Peter, President Trump and his far-right allies let health care costs shoot up rather than come to the table and find a solution. This is unacceptable. First, extreme Republicans decided to slash Medicaid because it was politically convenient (my opponent even called their legislation a “huge win”). Then, they let Affordable Care Act subsidies expire because their radical ideology is more important than keeping Americans healthy. **Now, millions of Americans are starting 2026 wondering if their budgets will stretch to cover an unexpected cost or making impossible choices about what and where to cut back.** _This is a crisis._ Improving health care access — making care more affordable and accessible — has been at the top of my priority list for my entire career. And when I was Governor of North Carolina, we made a heck of a lot of progress by expanding Medicaid. But North Carolinians and folks across the country are now at risk of losing access to the care that they deserve, and I will not stand for it. As the next Democratic Senator from NC, I will fight for affordable health care for every American. But I need you to join me now, because there’s still time for lawmakers to start making this right by extending the ACA subsidies. **[Add your name here to join me and call on Republicans to come to the table and restore ACA subsidies.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/em_RC_PET_ACAsubsidies_010626/?source=em_RC_PET_ACAsubsidies_010626&t=7&akid=303%2E124072%2EpZbMxl)** | [SIGN ON](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/em_RC_PET_ACAsubsidies_010626/?source=em_RC_PET_ACAsubsidies_010626&t=8&akid=303%2E124072%2EpZbMxl)
---
Thanks for standing with me,
Roy
[](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/em_RC_PET_ACAsubsidies_010626/?source=em_RC_PET_ACAsubsidies_010626&t=9&akid=303%2E124072%2EpZbMxl)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=303%2E124072%2EpZbMxl)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=303%2E124072%2EpZbMxl)
---

Raleigh, NC 27602

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. name: Joey Czajkowski, Executive Director
subject: 11 months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122800539/593497118/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGRkM2YzZGMtNDFlYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5AApri2bzhxUEBL844R3bgIEwPab4AChZBNVPoHJtzQ=)
---
**Eleven months, team.** Now that 2026 is here, we have eleven months to put ourselves in the best position possible to flip Arizona **blue** in the midterms. After a decade working in Arizona politics, I can confidently say that to win in this battleground state, you’ve got to act _fast_ and _early._ Organizing early. Investing early. Refusing to fall behind. That’s how we’ve protected statewide offices.
